name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Beckwith?=
subject: Dave Beckwith for Congress - Primary is SATURDAY MAY 21!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE DAVE BECKWITH FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davebeckwithforcongress.com/dave-beckwith-for-congress-fighting-for-americas-future-9020975?e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| | [ ](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=af7e81775b&e=70e89e3dc3)
---
| |
---
# THE BECKWITH BRIEFING

#### News & Notes
from the Campaign
---
| **VOTE SATURDAY, MAY 21st **
---
| | **This is it****Virginian Voter! The time is NOW!**
---
| **Primary day is tomorrow... will you help me finish strong?

Voter turnout is forecasted to be low for this primary...

I’m counting on YOU to get your friends and neighbors to the polls to vote for me! **
---
| You’re probably tired of campaign ads, mailers, and calls. Believe me, I get it. But you know **this is no ordinary primary** – this is your chance to nominate me, the candidate that can **beat Jennifer Wexton** in November, help **turn Virginia “red,”** and **put Joe Biden in check!** It all starts with you; here’s what you can do:
* Mark your calendar, set an alarm, tie a string on your finger... and vote!
* **Tell your friends and neighbors to vote for me – it’s easy! Forward this email, send a text, or share my social media posts. Tell them about my Fight for Virginia’s Future!**
* Help get others to the polls – don’t let transportation or schedule issues keep District 10 from voting for me on Saturday!

See the info below and check out my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=8afe745cb4&e=70e89e3dc3) to make sure you don’t miss your chance to vote for me! (Some websites say the primary is June 21st, but the VA10 GOP Primary is May 21st! Don’t miss out!)

We’re almost there... I’m counting on you!
---
|
---
| | Voting Information
---
| **Don’t miss your chance to vote for Dave!**
* **Voting is on _Saturday, May 21st,_** not Tuesday
* Polls are open from **9AM to 4PM only**
* **Congressional Districts have changed!** You may now be in District 10! Check out my [website](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=a1ed59c06b&e=70e89e3dc3) for an interactive district map, list of polling places, and registration info.
* **Find me on your ballot!** Candidates have been randomly placed on the ballot. Voters will rank the candidates in order of preference. I'll be the 11th name listed - but** I need your #1 vote!**

---
| [Click to Receive a Reminder to Vote!](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=05e6775e0e&e=70e89e3dc3 "Click to Receive a Reminder to Vote!")
---
|
---
| | How You Can Help
---
| _Dave Beckwith for Congress needs your support!_
* **Tell your friends and neighbors about my plans for a prosperous, secure, and free America! Urge them to vote on Saturday, May 21st.**
* _Forward this email, send a text, or make a call... it only takes a moment._
* **Help others get to the polls! Don’t let transportation or schedule issues keep anyone from voting!**
* Check me out on [Facebook](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=c6e2f22d57&e=70e89e3dc3), [Twitter](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=f5fc14f578&e=70e89e3dc3), and [Instagram](https://davebeckwithforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fae606123cc47ee5c50436c39&id=502a364962&e=70e89e3dc3) – like, follow, comment, save, and share!

---
|
---
---

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: I just filed

body:
I just filed
Now I need you.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60427628:6GMBtPoN0:m:1:3299561967:7407EFEFE9DD4BA35410B4E5BB5BBF14:r)
Patriot,

After more than a year on the campaign trail, [**I officially filed to run for US Senate in Washington.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60427628:6GMBtPoN0:m:1:3299561967:7407EFEFE9DD4BA35410B4E5BB5BBF14:r)

As an Army wife, mother of 3, former triage nurse, and veterans advocate, I know the problems our country is facing firsthand.

**In April of 2005 when I learned that my husband serving in Iraq was severely wounded. He fell into a coma and permanently lost sight in both eyes.**

From the moment I arrived at Walter Reed Medical Center to visit him, I knew it was time for me to put my aspirations aside and **ensure my husband received the care he deserved**. To this day, I have continued the battle to ensure every veteran gets the benefits and care they have fought for.

_Unlike career politician Patty Murray_ who has spent decades in office cozying up to Senate Dems, while neglecting the issues we're facing back home.

Patriot, I am a Conservative running for Senate in Washington State with an optimistic agenda to help families achieve their American Dreams.

**[I humbly ask for $5, $10 or $15 to help get me across the finish line. The fight for Washington begins now.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60427628:6GMBtPoN0:m:1:3299561967:7407EFEFE9DD4BA35410B4E5BB5BBF14:r) **

Humbly,

Tiffany Smiley
* * *

**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home.
Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That is why I 'm running for Senate. **

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60427629:6GMBtPoN0:m:1:3299561967:7407EFEFE9DD4BA35410B4E5BB5BBF14:r)

[**If you agree we need to stand up for our nation 's heroes, will you chip in to help me reach my major upcoming goal? I need your support, Friend!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60427629:6GMBtPoN0:m:1:3299561967:7407EFEFE9DD4BA35410B4E5BB5BBF14:r)
| **[**MEET MY IMPENDING DEADLINE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60427629:6GMBtPoN0:m:1:3299561967:7407EFEFE9DD4BA35410B4E5BB5BBF14:r)**
---

And we have one question for you: Can you find Imani’s name? = = = New Jersey ballots are designed to disadvantage progressive candidates and give an unfair advantage to corporate-backed machine favorites like Donald Payne Jr. But let’s be clear: we can beat the ballot line, Peter — Barack Obama did it in 2008, and there’s no doubt Imani can do it in 2022. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. = Thanks! — Team Oakley | | = | | Paid for by Oakley for Congress Oakley for Congress PO Box 1181 Montclair, NJ 07042 United States | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Casey Kulla
subject: Thank you.
body:
Thank you so much for your support, vote, challenges, and lessons. | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6287a603c25899076484d307&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D628713292c06d60b0bddce95%26ss_email_id%3D6287a603c25899076484d307%26ss_campaign_name%3DThank%2Byou.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-05-20T14%253A31%253A20Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=QCcDKrINLFz7Asc_rlvyOJOSS2s%3D)
---
|
## Thank you.
---
Gratitude and sadness. Delight at the success of others and regret at so much time and money gone.We’re three days out from the Primary (and in Clackamas County, they are just starting to ramp up counting), and I want you to know that while I ended up at 3rd place in the Labor Commissioner race, my love for you and Oregon grows stronger by the hour and I am not going anywhere. Christina Stephenson and Cheri Helt received the top two spots and will go to the general election, and my time around them tells me that they both love Oregon and want the best for each Oregonian. The Bureau will be in good hands.We all have important choices to make this fall, like who our next Governor and Congresspeople will be. And here in Yamhill County, we will decide on the person to replace me as Commissioner. We must choose wisely. It has been the honor of my life to serve as Yamhill County Commissioner, and while I don’t yet know what I will do after December of this year, rest assured that I will be out there working for you, with joy and stubbornness, listening and seeking the right path.Thank you so much for your support, vote, challenges, and lessons. If you want to connect, send me an email at [casey@caseykulla.com](mailto:Casey@caseykulla.com) or give me call at 971-241-685.Casey Kulla
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6287a603c25899076484d307&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D628713292c06d60b0bddce95%26ss_email_id%3D6287a603c25899076484d307%26ss_campaign_name%3DThank%2Byou.%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2022-05-20T14%253A31%253A20Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=QCcDKrINLFz7Asc_rlvyOJOSS2s%3D) Kulla for Oregon, PO Box 1698, McMinnville, OR 97128, United States [ Unsubscribe ](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6287a603c25899076484d307&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcampaign-preferences.com%2Funsubscribe%2FWB7iY6r4dMMrXNy6wZkbG-CzeoLGPRe6Kasi_-CNfAPOhoPPihr6l3abGWTAkwCXKw1HSSVJNUURfc-5EvgYA1tUsjktV2v1vCIzt4qMkeM_cCCKlCx7HXlA-qdSLUfeVLNpbZjaB96GvqtkF228ISUkIHw3bSOK97AgNFqwVszJi_6f0ow_kOPkm4hsHwaBD_eKB9xr5pvA8ViNqjHoHG2WHirFylg3URqv8Tn0DbnIrsRcLlYJIIaoA9qTDZ92XDeC8uwdiYBTZW4VsjsbJ2-HsxM2yI9SlAgsCE5zU0Rk&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=K32B2VymapS4sv77xRkkBmgleds%3D)

| 🚨 TRUMP RALLY ALERT: Next week, I'm heading back to the place where I held a HUGE rally against anti-Trump RINO Liz Cheney... her home turf!
That's right - I'll be hitting the campaign trail with Donald Trump to a place that Liz should check out sometime: Wyoming, the state she claims to represent!
Peter, we need this RINO out of Congress. She has voted to IMPEACH Trump, served on a witch hunt committee with Nancy Pelosi to try to smear all of his supporters and is even echoing left-wing propaganda right now saying our party is racist. She has to go.
Our movement was with me the last time I went to Wyoming to campaign against this America-Last hack. name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: This was just the beginning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
We still have so much work to do up and down the ballot to support candidates who remain on the frontlines fighting for progress.
#

Friend —
When I launched this campaign back in February 2021 we had some big goals.
We set out to make health care a human right, pay workers a living wage, ensure equal protection under the law for all, elect leaders who answer to the people, and hold police accountable for violence against black and brown people.
And while the campaign may not have ended the way we wanted it to, we still shined a light on these important issues and paved a path for others to continue these fights.
This was just the beginning. We still have so much work to do up and down the ballot to support candidates who remain on the frontlines fighting for progress.
Which is why today I have to humbly ask:
[Will you split a donation today between myself and the Pennsylvania Working Families Party? By supporting their work, you will help train and elect the next generation of progressive leaders in Pennsylvania.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45536457/346401716/1658477202?refcode2=0d637ecb-4ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=em220520-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYzN2VjYi00YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw57461_-ind-vq9_a4dgLKrhS9pYhOw5fm_-aabBtM=)
**[SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45536458/346401717/1658477202?refcode2=0d637ecb-4ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=em220520-1-30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYzN2VjYi00YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Uw57461_-ind-vq9_a4dgLKrhS9pYhOw5fm_-aabBtM=)**
With your support, we’re building an unstoppable movement that’s powered by working people, unapologetically for working people.
Thanks for everything you do,
Malcolm

www.philarballo.com

Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. name: Nikki Fried
subject: When people show you who they are…
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter,
This is a bit of a long story, but I hope you’ll bear with me.
To get an idea of Charlie Crist’s real stance on abortion, we need to go back to 2008, when Republican Governor Crist appointed Justice Charles Canady.
At the time, Planned Parenthood called the appointment a “crushing blow to the health and safety of Florida women,” called Canady an “anti-choice extremist,” and said it was Charlie’s “attempt to shore up his base and pander to the extreme right.”
Fast forward 14 years, and Charles Canady is our Chief Justice, abortion rights are hanging by a thread, and Charlie Crist is pretending like none of this ever happened.
But, Peter, when someone shows you who they are, you believe them.
Charlie Crist fundamentally reshaped the Florida Supreme Court into the extremist, anti-choice body it is today. He set the wheels in motion for the 15-week abortion ban. And when DeSantis and his GOP allies decide to ban abortion entirely, it will be a direct result of Charlie Crist’s actions.
When it comes down to it, both Ron DeSantis and Charlie Crist paved the way for today’s attacks on women’s rights. And both Ron DeSantis and Charlie Crist belong nowhere near the Governor’s office with reproductive freedom hanging in the balance. If you agree, click here to rush a $10 donation and support my fight for abortion rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=520canady]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=520canady]
Let’s be honest here: Charlie didn’t just show us who he was in 2008. He’s told us — as recently as last weekend — that he still considers himself pro-life and that nothing’s changed since he was the Republican Governor of Florida.
Meanwhile, I’ve never wavered on this issue. And you can trust that, as your next Governor, I’ll keep fighting until every woman in Florida has the right to make her own decisions.
That’s my promise to you — that I won’t rest until pro-life men like Ron DeSantis and Charlie Crist have no more power over Florida women. Can you donate $10 today to help me win this fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=520canady]
Thank you for standing with me.
— Nikki
Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Lauren Micek-Vargas
subject: My husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I told him I'd be the one to ask this time.

|
---

| | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money.

But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. [**_So, yes -- I’m about to ask for $14 before midnight. Let me explain why. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537627/346407758/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537628/346407759/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=) _Tony and me after he won his primary -- I was SO proud of him!_ I know Tony can flip this seat in November for Democrats:

**[One of the things I admire most about Tony is that when he believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537629/346407760/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=)**

When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds, and he won.

When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding.

When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law.

And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief:

[**Tony stepped up to unseat him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537630/346407761/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=) [**_Everyday folks deserve a fighting chance, but my husband’s opponent doesn’t have the interests of our community at heart. Tony is determined to win the general election, but it won’t be easy -- or cheap. Don Bacon already has over $1 million cash on hand. That’s why Tony needs to raise another $10,775 before midnight, and why I said I’d ask you today on his behalf. Will you chip in $14 to help him close this gap? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537631/346407762/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=) Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record.

But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him.

It’s personal.

It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds.

It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him.

And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca.

[**I know you work hard for your money, and I wish I didn’t have to ask.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537632/346407764/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=)

But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign.

And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats in a critical election year. [**_So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony like I do, will you chip in $14 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537633/346407765/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=) | | [Chip in $15 now >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45537634/346407766/1129282168?refcode=20220520_em_fr_b1_lauren_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzE3OTY4Yi00ZGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q1JSQ0vqAOjw-sH80grEXZG37A-lqexaXSe9ax4fYlI=)

This fight is personal. The American Dream made Tony’s story possible. He refuses to sit on the sidelines while others struggle to achieve the same dream.

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

clean_body: I told him I'd be the one to ask this time. | | | I know it’s usually my husband Tony asking you for money. But today, I told Tony I’d be the one to ask, and explain what this campaign means to us. = = Tony and me after he won his primary -- I was SO proud of him! I know Tony can flip this seat in November for Democrats: = When he ran for the state Legislature, Tony fought for his principles against all odds, and he won. When local businesses were struggling due to the pandemic, Tony secured relief funding. When Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19, Tony demanded safer working conditions for essential workers like my father-in-law. And when Republican Congressman Don Bacon favored tax cuts for billionaires and voted against COVID relief: = = Now you know a bit about Tony’s amazing track record. But I want to be clear: running for Congress isn’t just about politics for him. It’s personal. It’s rooted in his experience growing up in poverty and fighting to defy the odds. It’s rooted in the lessons he learned as a public school teacher, working with kids like him. And it’s rooted in his desire to leave the world a better place for our kids, Ava and Luca. = But if Tony misses his $10,775 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign. And it will be that much harder for him to flip this important seat for Democrats in a critical election year. = | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m so proud of Tony. I hope you are too. subject: Let’s Get Herschel Walker Over the Goal Line
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "Headline") Peter: Do you want to know the easiest way to take away the Dems ability to use the race card in the Georgia Senate race against Ralph Warnock? **Make Herschel Walker the GOP nominee.** What better way to show Black voters in Georgia that the Republican Party shares their values than with Herschel on the general election ballot. But that's only going to happen if he makes it past the primary on May 24th. **[Help us get Herschel across the goal line with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "Help us get Herschel across the goal line with your $25, $50, or $100 donation today.")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "Herschel")Herschel is the complete package - he's a conservative Republican who can go toe-to-toe against Child-Support-Dodging Warnock... and he's been endorsed by President Trump! **But Herschel isn 't the nominee yet. That's why we need your help to raise the last $82,174.88 we need by midnight tonight** to make our final push to ensure that Herschel Walker is representing the Republican Party against Wacky Warnock. **[Can you help us reach our goal by chipping in $50, $100, or $250 by midnight tonight?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "Can you help us reach our goal by chipping in $50, $100, or
$250 by midnight tonight?")** My name is James Golden, but you may know me as Mr. Snerdley, former call screener and producer for the late, great radio legend Rush Limbaugh. I worked for Rush for almost 30 years, and I learned a lot sitting beside a great man like him every day. I started New Journey PAC for just a time like this, to engage Black voters and show them that the GOP is the true party of freedom and liberty. There's no better way to engage Black voters than with a Black Republican candidate. **[That's why we need your $100, $500, or $1,000 donation today to make sure Herschel wins this Tuesday night.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "That’s why we need your $100, $500, or $1,000
donation today to make sure Herschel wins this Tuesday night.")** The Democrats' chains of bondage are loosening up on Black Americans. I'm confident with Herschel as the GOP nominee, we can break free of the Democrats' hold on Black Voters and show them that the Republican Party truly is the party of freedom and prosperity. **[Donate today and help us get Herschel over the line.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "Donate today and
help us get Herschel over the line.")** For a New Journey, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60428793:68xvXPoNZ:m:1:3317145305:9FE3A3A362718A7EAE37C8891EDE7AF2:r "James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC

name: John Fetterman
subject: Officially the Democratic nominee in Pennsylvania
body:
THANK YOU FOR HELPING ME BECOME THE DEMOCRATIC NOMINEE FOR U.S. SENATE IN PENNSYLVANIA!!!!!!!! 😭😭
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220518_CGVA_Fetterman [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220518_CGVA_Fetterman]
I'm so deeply honored, Derek.
And trust me, I do NOT take being the *official* Democratic candidate for the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate seat in the country for granted. 😁
Nor do I take going up against our Republican opponent, in November lightly.
Look, I can win in places other Democrats can't because I’m a different kind of Democrat.
I’ve already run + won statewide before, and I can do it again in November, Derek.
I just need your support, which is why I have to ask:
Will you split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign and CommonGood and become a Fetterman for PA Founding Donor? We need to raise a *lot* of money right now in order to flip PA blue to save our Democratic majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220518_CGVA_Fetterman]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=25]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=35]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman]
Over the past year, this campaign has built a true grassroots movement across PA, powered by over <checks notes> 500,000 individual donations + an average donation of just $27.
No dirty money. No corporate PACs. Everything we do is fueled by the donations of people who believe in me + our campaign. That’s the kind of grassroots enthusiasm we need over the next few months to flip this seat blue.
Will you split a donation between my campaign and CommonGood and become a Founding Donor for our campaign to send me to the U.S. Senate? Our campaign is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you + we need all hands on deck if we’re going to flip this seat in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman]
One last time: Thank you, thank you, thank you. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lt. Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S. One of the best ways to show your support for our campaign is by establishing yourself as a Founding Donor. Please make any donation you can today to join this historic campaign. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_jf?refcode=20220520_CGVA_Fetterman]
(This is a sponsored send hosted by CommonGood. CommonGood is dedicated to helping Democratic campaigns and organizations win critical races in Virginia and across the country.)

And trust me, I do NOT take being the official Democratic candidate for the #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate seat in the country for granted. 😁 Nor do I take going up against our Republican opponent, in November lightly. Look, I can win in places other Democrats can't because I’m a different kind of Democrat. I’ve already run + won statewide before, and I can do it again in November, Derek. I just need your support, which is why I have to ask: Will you split a donation of any amount right now between my campaign and CommonGood and become a Fetterman for PA Founding Donor? [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $35 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE $250 [] Donate ANY [] Over the past year, this campaign has built a true grassroots movement across PA, powered by over <checks notes> 500,000 individual donations + an average donation of just $27. body:

| | Peter,

Matt Birk and I are officially filing for Lt. Governor and Governor on Monday. This campaign is about the people and we want _you,_ the people, to be there with us. Join us at the Minnesota State Capitol!

We _also_ want _all_ Republican-endorsed candidates with us too - from school board on up (even if you've already filed). Open to the public, join us for a PEOPLE'S RALLY on the front steps of the capitol. Let us together show our unified spirit in replacing the failed policies of the far-left DFL Party.
**Here are the details:
Date: **Monday, May 23rd
**Time:** 2:15 PM

**Location: **
Minnesota State Capitol Front Stairs
75 Rev Dr Martin Luther King Jr BLVD
St. Paul, MN 55155

Join us and hear from the team that's going to DEFEAT Tim Walz and the far-left DFL up and down the ballot. See you there!

name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs1lDGQhNT

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os1lDGQhNT

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear
Fellow American,

A few
years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did
Everyone Become a Socialist?"

This is,
of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left
in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and
our way of life.

In a
recent issue of Imprimis-Hillsdale College's digest of
liberty-author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of
the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'-a
two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on
top and socialism for the majority below."

Today, as
a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand
the extent of support for-and opposition to-socialism.

Your
input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight
for the future of liberty in our country.

Will you
please share your views on the political, social, and cultural
forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your
National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/

Sadly,
socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the
young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that...

. . .
during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those
16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also
increased in popularity among all ages.

Why is
this?

Draconian
government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated
competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream
come true for corporate socialists.

At the
same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what
socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures
wherever it has been tried.

This is a
result of the far-Left's "long march through the
institutions"-including colleges and universities, K-12 schools,
and the media.

Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once
confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race
theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as
school boards and even the military.

But it is
in our schools where the effects of critical race theory-which
teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens
according to race-are most dangerous.

You may
recall that many young Americans with college degrees who
championed socialist policies participated in the riots and
violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020.

In the
face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free
markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and
teach millions has never been more urgently needed.

That's
why I need your thoughts quickly.

By
responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five
days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent
rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach
increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty.

We hope
to hear from friends representing every part of the country.

Education
is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your
partnership with Hillsdale College is critical.

As
Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure,
the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy."

If you
agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey
on Socialism today.

https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/

Despite
the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember-it is
NEVER too late to defend liberty through education.

Warm
regards,

Larry P.
Arnn

President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing
Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: I am so excited to get this campaign under way. To ramp up events, to hear from voters, to WORK for every vote. This team is busy setting up our campaign. After running a nearly all-virtual campaign in 2020, we’re working hard to get back out in front of everyone again. | | I am so excited to get this campaign under way. To ramp up events, to hear from voters, to WORK for every vote. This team is busy setting up our campaign. After running a nearly all-virtual campaign in 2020, we’re working hard to get back out in front of everyone again. But the first thing on my agenda is you. | Republicans think they’re going to take control of the House in November. Our majority margin is so thin. They are targeting this district with an unprecedented investment in flipping CT-05 red, including an RNC headquarters in Connecticut for the first time ever. But we can stop their advance by making sure that we’re focusing on the issues that affect all of us daily. That’s where you come in. We’ve got work to do! – Jahana = | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. body:

| Peter, I have some very important information that you need to know about Idaho and what is happening here. It is not all good but we have much to look forward to. Come to the Keep Idaho IDAHO Rally this Saturday at Storey Park in Meridian to get this information. This rally will be a family fun event with live music, bounce houses, face painting, speakers and so on. Let's rub shoulders and unite together and get armed with information to act in preserving Idaho. PLEASE SHARE AND BRING FRIENDS! Here is more information for the rally: <https://www.votebundy.com/events/keep-idaho-idaho-rally-uniting-idahoans/>Also, here is a video interview with me covering information about the Idaho primary and what is happening in Idaho. <https://youtu.be/YetRTXT5Eg4>Thank you, Ammon BundyP.S. name: Team Lizzie
subject: What #TeamLizzie is saying about the economy →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/DR5tL_YRoEW3saYk8G1DOg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DR5tL_YRoEW3saYk8G1DOg2]
Last month, we asked you to share your thoughts on the economy [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DR5tL_YRoEW3saYk8G1DOg2] and how we should talk to voters about it as we get closer to Election Day.
We want to share some of the responses we received:
JOBS, JOBS, JOBS!
We heard from many supporters who said we need to talk to voters about how fast the economy is growing — the record job gains, rising wages, and declining unemployment. Lizzie is focused on building on those gains by lifting up working families, creating more jobs, and supporting small businesses.
GUN SAFETY
People said they want to see something done to address gun violence in our communities and we couldn’t agree more. Lizzie is tirelessly working to advance common sense gun-safety reforms and close gun purchase loopholes.
LIZZIE’S LEADERSHIP
Others said we need to emphasize how hard Lizzie works for TX-07, how effective she is at addressing the challenges facing our communities, and her efforts to work across the political divide in Washington to get things done for Texans.
AND FINALLY... VOTE!
Another supporter said we need to stress the importance of showing up at the polls and voting this year — to re-elect effective leaders like Lizzie and hold the House majority so we can continue strengthening our economy and making progress on the big issues facing us.
We noticed we haven’t heard from you yet. There’s still time to take our survey and share your thoughts on the economy and how we should get our message out to voters this year. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/DR5tL_YRoEW3saYk8G1DOg2]
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe220519sur?refcode=lpfe220519sur_ns]
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
Lizzie Fletcher for Congress
3262 Westheimer Road, PMB 636
Houston, TX 77098
United States

subject: Make a plan to vote this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for and authorized by Lawson for Congress")
body:
Read below for a full list of voting locations and additional details. I hope I can count on your vote and we look forward to seeing you this Saturday | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f542606a905e/make-a-plan-to-vote-this-saturday-5395491?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=3e37b1193b&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
|
,

The Republican Primary Election is THIS SATURDAY, May 21st from 9am-4pm.

Make sure you have a plan to vote, know where you're going, and bring your photo ID!

If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com

Thank you,

Jeanine

**_FIND YOUR MAY 21ST VOTING LOCATION_**
On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at [www.JeanineLawson.com/Voting](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=089fd38442&e=fc83fb200d)

For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com) and we can help you determine where to vote.

**Prince William County: **your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district.

If you live in **Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson** , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville.

If you live in **Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland**, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville.

If you live in **Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District**, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas.

**Loudoun County: **Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district _unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington._

If you live in **Blue Ridge district** , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the [State Board of Elections website](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=92750d4fdd&e=fc83fb200d).
Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School.
Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School.

If you live in **Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge** districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville.

If you live in **Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run** districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn.

If you live in **Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge **districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie.

**Fauquier County:** Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton.

**Rappahannock County** : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington.

**Fairfax County** : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton.

**Manassas City** : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas.

**Manassas Park City** : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park.

If you have any questions, please call 571-484-4425 or email [info@jeaninelawson.com](mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com)and we can help you determine where to vote.
---
|

[Please also consider making](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=497d0f7b2b&e=fc83fb200d)[ a contribution of $100, $50, $25, or even just $10 ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=6ae5b96570&e=fc83fb200d)[to support our campaign in the final days and get us across the finish line!.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=a86e52f4cf&e=fc83fb200d)

Jeanine Lawson

clean_body: Read below for a full list of voting locations and additional details. I hope I can count on your vote and we look forward to seeing you this Saturday | | | | | | | "Donate" | , The Republican Primary Election is THIS SATURDAY, May 21st from 9am-4pm. Make sure you have a plan to vote, know where you're going, and bring your photo ID! If you have any questions or need help finding your voting location, please call us at 571-484-4425 or email info@jeaninelawson.com Thank you, Jeanine FIND YOUR MAY 21ST VOTING LOCATION On May 21st, voting will be open from 9am-4pm. Your voting location is determined by where you live, and you will not be allowed to vote anywhere other than your designated voting location. You can find a full list of voting locations at For additional help determining your voting location, please call 571-484-4425 or email mailto:info@jeaninelawson.com and we can help you determine where to vote. Prince William County: your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district. If you live in Brentsville District represented by Supervisor Jeanine Lawson , your voting location will be Gainesville Middle School located at 8001 Limestone Drive, Gainesville. If you live in Gainesville District represented by Supervisor Pete Candland, your voting location will be Bull Run Middle School located at 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville. If you live in Coles District represented by Supervisor Yesli Vega or in Occoquan District, your voting location will be Lake Jackson Fire Station located at 11310 Coles Drive, Manassas. Loudoun County: Your voting location will be determined by your magisterial district unless you live in Blue Ridge District represented by Supervisor Tony Buffington. If you live in Blue Ridge district , your district is split between two voting locations. Find your precinct by visiting the . Blue Ridge precincts 301, 302, 303, 305, 308, 310, 311, and 315 vote at Loudoun Valley High School. Blue Ridge precincts 307, 309, 312, 313, 314, 316, 318, 319, 320, 321, and 322 vote at Mercer Middle School. If you live in Catoctin, Leesburg, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location will be Loudoun Valley High School located at 340 N. Maple Avenue, Purcellville. If you live in Algonkian, Ashburn, or Broad Run districts, your voting location is Broad Run High School located at 21670 Ashburn Road, Ashburn. If you live in Sterling, Dulles, or portions of Blue Ridge districts, your voting location is Mercer Middle School located at 42149 Greenstone Drive, Aldie. Fauquier County: Your county-wide voting location will be Fauquier High School located at 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton. Rappahannock County : Your county-wide voting location will be Rappahannock County Elementary School located at 34 Schoolhouse Road, Washington. Fairfax County : Your voting location for all voters in the 10th district will be the Clifton Town Hall located at 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton. Manassas City : Your city-wide voting location will be Grace E. Metz Middle School located at 9950 Wellington Road, Manassas. Manassas Park City : Your city-wide voting location will be the Manassas Park Community Center located at 99 Adams Street, Manassas Park. **Earlier this month, we launched our first TV ads of 2022. We urgently need your grassroots support to keep our ads on the air and fight back against the GOP's relentless million-dollar attacks – but we're still falling $2,291 short of our $15,000 emergency goal. **
[**Please, will you rush a gift of $3 right now to help us keep our ads on the air and keep New Hampshire and the Senate blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45541998/346422815/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk991-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZGJkZmU4Ny01NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cyQUt5ZWYCSTziCZhoGaqokWamqgmjrkaWO9ywIELNc=)

Team Hassan

| | |

This is really critical, team. Experts are saying that control of the Senate runs through Maggie's race in New Hampshire.

The GOP knows this. That's why they've spent $8 million – and counting! – in attack ads against the Senator, and with a new poll showing her 2 points behind a GOP opponent, we need your help now more than ever.

**Here's the good news: Earlier this week, we launched our first TV ad of 2022 to fight back against GOP misinformation and ensure Maggie's message is reaching every voter in the Granite State.**

**But we just ran the numbers, and we're falling $5,178 short of our $15,000 emergency goal to keep these ads on the air.** If we don't catch up, our ads could go dark, ceding valuable airtime to extreme GOP groups.

Despite mountains of evidence from her own social media accounts and public appearances, Greene denied and denied and denied that she remembered anything at all about the events of the past three years. We know Marjorie Taylor Greene conspired with the insurrectionists to commit treason. She must be held accountable for her role in the deadly January 6th insurrection and for lying about it under oath. Hello,
Facebook just took down Chuck Grassley’s ads against us – but not before they were seen by tens of thousands of people and targeted over one million:
This is what we’re up against. Chuck Grassley is running ads so misleading that they’re being taken down – but they were still running for over a week. Come on, Facebook!
I’m going to be facing millions of dollars ads full of lies and twisted disinformation. In my last campaign, a Super PAC ran over $1 million in ads attacking my military record. I’m a hard target to attack, but with Senate control at stake, they’ll make up and say anything.

Hope that our grassroots movement will be able to expand our Democratic majority in Congress so we can get to work on the priorities that matter to working families. = Ron Wyden ** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. ---|--- | This email was sent by ** Wyden for Senate P.O. Too much email? . Click here to If you no longer want to hear from Ron Wyden, . Questions or concerns? . |

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zm004ucqpf75kou07baers4fo8q5k566ctg7lt3g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk1p7fcdkmcqjas3h6gonact66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u5rrcdr4sjgr0p31mhpj6tbl6jgred1ge5j79cdichie4sbiceom6tb3ccqjco37q9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphhmapm0ptie9j3ap5lmkrr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or5cpg66oj1cljm49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr8r0iv5aa6i822ud0fdbdvsoaa0ahkc54k7lfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1hm4ob5cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuvh7l209k72gu24bsc0dubctrsj7asdd1d85iv0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1hm4ob5cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuau9d8nd87qcb62fj9u49ve53im6o2nf41thcb0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1hm4ob5cth2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: South Bay CRA
subject: Tonight CRA Candidate Forum Torrance
body:
South Bay Republican Assembly News South Bay CRA News Special announcement! Don't forget tonights candidate forum! Also South Bay CRA meets Monday
| |
---
|
---
## South Bay Republican Assembly News
---
|
---
# **South Bay CRA News**
**Special announcement!**
Don't forget tonights candidate forum!
Also South Bay CRA meets Monday night the 23rd. We have Several exciting people speaking including the first Latina Stunt women in Hollywood. She is now a successful comedian and leading the stand against mandates by the screen actors guild.
**Remember our club meets the 4th Monday of every month.**
Blessed and Free
**Nena Gates**
President
nenarenae2@gmail.com
---
## May 20th LA County-wide CRA candidate Forum.
---
**This will be an incredible night with our future leaders in California and the Nation. Come with your questions and an attitude to help change the Nation. 7pm Pyramid Office & Medical Park 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance**
---
|
---
|
---
# **Cordie Williams for US Senate**
Dr. Cordie Williams is a former United States Marine and has built a successful chiropractic business in San Diego County with his wife Dr. Tania Williams. Dr. Williams co-founded an organization as an expression of his desire to protect Californians’ right to make important decisions for themselves and their families due to the pandemic eroding freedom to make individual choices. Therefore, the time is now to elect leaders who have more faith in the citizenry than in government.
Cordie Williams will be challenging controversial appointed incumbent Alex Padilla in the June 2022 Open California Primary Election. Vice President Kamala Harris held the seat prior to the 2020 election.
[Click to visit Cordie website](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=29671.79.1.d3e84801a4fbe1c35500dfe22bbc50c3)
|
---
# Derrick Gates for US Congress CA-36
Derrick has 15 years of experience in corporate mediation, revitalizing churches, starting ministries, equipping leaders, and helping the less fortunate around the United States.
Derrick has conservative values and an ability to see them reestablished in our communities.
Derrick Mentors multicultural leaders from around the United States.
Derrick desires to raise Bold, Moral, Men, and Women of Integrity to lead our country. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=29671.80.1.cff884e4b17d3bc11f7517650b8afd63)
|
---
# Eric Early for CA Attorney General
Eric Early is a husband, father, small businessman and attorney who is running for California Attorney General in 2022.
In the 2020 election cycle, Eric came in the top two in the June 2020 Primary, becoming the official Republican candidate against Adam Schiff for Congress for California’s 28th Congressional District. His great campaign was fueled by thousands of volunteers and supporters from around the country. Before that, in the 2018 election cycle, Eric entered his first campaign for public office running against Xavier Becerra for California Attorney General and received almost 1 million votes statewide.
Eric is the co-owner and Managing Partner of a 25 lawyer nationally recognized law firm which litigates in courts throughout America, handling constitutional, contract, fraud, real estate and general business disputes. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=29671.81.1.adee5fd95de79b6960f178898fcd85ca)
|
---
# Jack M. Guerrero CA Treasurer
Jack Guerrero brings a unique combination of public and private sector experience, with a quintessential American story. Jack’s experience as Mayor, City Councilmember, Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Stanford economics graduate, Harvard MBA, Bank Vice President, Treasury professional, auditor of municipalities and government agencies, investment banker, and M&A due diligence advisor to Fortune 500 companies (with professional stints in New York, San Francisco, Los Angeles, London, and Zurich) – establishes him as the candidate with BOTH Treasury experience AND a public service record of fighting for taxpayers and working people. [Learn More](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=29671.82.1.b9181b30ab2e2654f2db58b7b0ae02a4)
|
---
# JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY
**On the 23rd** we have our Monthly South Bay Republican Assembly Meeting. We have some exciting speakers lined up That will be announced next week. We meet currently at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pm
**Correction from our last Newsletter:**
**I mistakenly said that we meet on the last Monday of every month and it is the 4th Monday of every month. And currently, we meet at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pmI apologize for the confusion**
If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link!
[CLICK TO JOIN THE SOUTH BAY CRA](https://sable.madmimi.com/c/436516?id=29671.83.1.2da79172b70cbe1d727e38200b3c6290)

clean_body: South Bay Republican Assembly News South Bay CRA News Special announcement! Don't forget tonights candidate forum! Also South Bay CRA meets Monday | | | South Bay Republican Assembly News | South Bay CRA News Special announcement! Don't forget tonights candidate forum! Also South Bay CRA meets Monday night the 23rd. We have Several exciting people speaking including the first Latina Stunt women in Hollywood. She is now a successful comedian and leading the stand against mandates by the screen actors guild. Remember our club meets the 4th Monday of every month. Blessed and Free Nena Gates President nenarenae2@gmail.com May 20th LA County-wide CRA candidate Forum. This will be an incredible night with our future leaders in California and the Nation. Come with your questions and an attitude to help change the Nation. 7pm Pyramid Office & Medical Park 22939 Hawthorne Blvd, Torrance | | Cordie Williams for US Senate Dr. Cordie Williams is a former United States Marine and has built a successful chiropractic business in San Diego County with his wife Dr. Tania Williams. Dr. Williams co-founded an organization as an expression of his desire to protect Californians’ right to make important decisions for themselves and their families due to the pandemic eroding freedom to make individual choices. Therefore, the time is now to elect leaders who have more faith in the citizenry than in government. Cordie Williams will be challenging controversial appointed incumbent Alex Padilla in the June 2022 Open California Primary Election. Vice President Kamala Harris held the seat prior to the 2020 election. | Derrick Gates for US Congress CA-36 Derrick has 15 years of experience in corporate mediation, revitalizing churches, starting ministries, equipping leaders, and helping the less fortunate around the United States. Derrick has conservative values and an ability to see them reestablished in our communities. Derrick Mentors multicultural leaders from around the United States. Derrick desires to raise Bold, Moral, Men, and Women of Integrity to lead our country. | Eric Early for CA Attorney General Eric Early is a husband, father, small businessman and attorney who is running for California Attorney General in 2022. In the 2020 election cycle, Eric came in the top two in the June 2020 Primary, becoming the official Republican candidate against Adam Schiff for Congress for California’s 28th Congressional District. His great campaign was fueled by thousands of volunteers and supporters from around the country. Before that, in the 2018 election cycle, Eric entered his first campaign for public office running against Xavier Becerra for California Attorney General and received almost 1 million votes statewide. Eric is the co-owner and Managing Partner of a 25 lawyer nationally recognized law firm which litigates in courts throughout America, handling constitutional, contract, fraud, real estate and general business disputes. | Jack M. Guerrero CA Treasurer Jack Guerrero brings a unique combination of public and private sector experience, with a quintessential American story. Jack’s experience as Mayor, City Councilmember, Certified Public Accountant (CPA), Stanford economics graduate, Harvard MBA, Bank Vice President, Treasury professional, auditor of municipalities and government agencies, investment banker, and M&A due diligence advisor to Fortune 500 companies (with professional stints in New York, San Francisco, Los Angeles, London, and Zurich) – establishes him as the candidate with BOTH Treasury experience AND a public service record of fighting for taxpayers and working people. | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY On the 23rd we have our Monthly South Bay Republican Assembly Meeting. We have some exciting speakers lined up That will be announced next week. We meet currently at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pm Correction from our last Newsletter: I mistakenly said that we meet on the last Monday of every month and it is the 4th Monday of every month. And currently, we meet at the Walteria Business Club 24004 Neece Ave, Torrance, CA 6:30 pmI apologize for the confusion If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! ©2022 South Bay CRA | South Bay CRA | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |

name: Steven Olikara
subject: Sheldon Lubar Endorses Steven Olikara!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Olikara for Senate
body:
Image of Olikara campaign logo with photo of Steven Olikara and link to campaign website:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/OfS%20logo%20w%20headshot.png]
[https://www.stevenolikara.com]

Image of Milwaukee Journal Sentinel headline announcing Sheldon Lubar's endorsement of Steven Olikara:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/MJS_Headline_Lubar_Endorsement.jpg]

Dear Peter,

I am both honored and excited to announce that Sheldon Lubar, Milwaukee businessman and philanthropist, has endorsed our campaign! He is the founder and Chairman of Lubar & Company, a private investment company in Milwaukee, and a fellow Badger, with degrees in Business Administration and Law from the University of Wisconsin-Madison.

Photo of Sheldon Lubar with Steven Olikara:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/90801/images/Sheldon_Lubar_Endorsement_Graphic.JPG]

Mr. Lubar has held governmental appointments under three U.S. Presidents. President Jimmy Carter named him Commissioner of the White House Conference on Small Business in 1979-80. President Richard Nixon appointed him Assistant Secretary, Housing Production and Mortgage Credit, Department of Housing and Urban Development, and Commissioner of the Federal Housing Administration, and Director of the Federal National Mortgage Association, in 1973-74. He completed this service under President Gerald Ford.

“I thought, what do we need? We need a person of integrity and decency who is not just a Republican or a Democrat but who is an American,” Lubar said.

In addition to his many career accomplishments, Mr. Lubar and his wife, Marianne, have provided generous philanthropic support to many organizations in arts and education, including strong support for the University of Wisconsin-Madison and the University of Wisconsin-Milwaukee. I am inspired by their commitment to giving back and truly grateful for their support.

“Here is a guy who really understands the problems,” facing the country, Lubar said in an interview announcing his Olikara endorsement. “He is a sincere, honest guy.”

Campaign endorsements matter. While I was out collecting signatures for our nomination papers the other night, I spoke with someone who’d seen the article announcing Sheldon Lubar’s endorsement and signed our nomination papers because of it. Our campaign has earned many other endorsements, including the only statewide endorsement in the race, former Wisconsin Lt. Governor Barbara Lawton . Other endorsements include: Kriss Marion , Lafayette County Supervisor, Todd Larson , UN Retiree and Senior Obama Appointee, and Scott Legwold , Brigadier General (retired) US Army/Wisconsin Army National Guard.

Support for our campaign is growing. We witness the momentum building on the ground every day at our events and with the addition of new volunteers to our team. I invite you to add your support by making a contribution to our campaign today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0520email] .

With Gratitude,
Steven

We need your help to gather the signatures necessary to get on the ballot for the August 9th primary. Please reply “YES” to this email if you can help gather signatures from your friends and family and please consider making a contribution to our campaign to ensure dignity for all.

Button that says "Support Our Campaign" with link to campaign donation page: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/steven_olikara_for_us_senate_email?refcode=0520email]

[Paid for by Olikara for Senate.]

Facebook logo with link to Steven Olikara's Facebook profile: [https://www.facebook.com/olikaraforsenate]
Twitter logo with link to Steven Olikara's Twitter profile: [https://twitter.com/stevenolikara]
Instagram logo with link to Steven Olikara's Instagram profile: [https://www.instagram.com/stevenolikara/]
TikTok logo with link to Steven Olikara's TikTok profile: [https://www.tiktok.com/@stevenolikara]

Olikara for Senate
P.O. Box 510216
Milwaukee, WI 53203
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vm-mq4Gg5UqIJ2AlcfSDqw2?unsubscribedata=Uyrqq%2BdEQSY4pwkynxniXd%2BXXaNUu8gq5Hz0NI8Bk3wsd6k%2FoNTgD%2FGK%2Bm2vGRBHwichMxQLGDREnrqrMM45qQqL9dNLSsk63mgFH7PQdRylV5C2QVM83%2BDpuMpfQSARR%2BhkVqX7YUrnaSdRKlM%2FPZCJgV5BFmIl21KgKAg4hjLTc51RWUqGlVaH126P3lRGQjk5BcBMppVvZUsK5IhzU4KQw%2Bl9%2Ff5T%2Fr3s3%2FcuO7So8lHNeVdexdnRzIrfMQyQvs2oIQ2KojBEgL%2FIISoD55yCDg095dN2mh4u3auLo7eJSP5hAnyCIkn1B4VzyrrA7gILMsibFaeBnqlMLKOn3Rahc7zvOGaNXRN0LXciciPLSQmNnYL9qFyAPMy2K0s%2BMLdHJ4f3M%2FhqjT9RwiGMTrAWbfOIlK3ABWrNVpEBxFCNGDga4r3FkGq7kOdyvhli .

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My plan to fight back against corporate price gouging:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
I’m going to keep attacking inflation from every which way. But it’s going to take a grassroots team to get Washington’s attention and get this done. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545159/346434896/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgxYmQxZC01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mx5XdiHH5D5m0OOoRd6i-YXVKzVPWrfxgkyz-r52WYY=&emci=5608ffc3-56d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=3f81bd1d-5ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9027908)
---
Inflation is kicking families in the teeth — but a lot of people aren’t hearing the full story. On top of the pandemic, Putin’s invasion of Ukraine, and supply chain tangles, giant corporations are using inflation as a smokescreen to hike up their prices for necessities like milk, cereal, diapers, and meat — big time. In fact, a recent study by the Economic Policy Institute concluded that **fatter corporate profit margins have driven more than half of price increases since 2020.** And the proof is in the corporate-balance-sheet pudding: If corporations were just passing along cost increases, their profits wouldn’t be shooting up into the stratosphere. But from Kroger to Hershey to Tyson, companies in all sorts of industries are seeing record profits. Executives have been bragging to shareholders about how they are using inflation to their advantage instead of keeping prices stable for consumers. Right now, big corporations are pulling the strings. It’s their puppet show — but we don’t have to keep living in it. I’ve just introduced a bill to fight back. **My Price Gouging Prevention Act would empower the Federal Trade Commission to investigate excessive prices during market shocks to stop corporations from squeezing American families in difficult times.** It would also require public companies to be transparent about their pricing strategies so they can’t hide their price increases behind inflation. **If we get this passed, we’ll bring real relief to families across the country. But it’s going to take all of us fighting side by side as a grassroots movement.** [_**Will you add your name to say you support our Price Gouging Prevention Act? Let’s fight back against the giant corporations taking advantage of inflation to raid the pocketbooks of working people.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545160/346434897/109996081?refcode=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&ms=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgxYmQxZC01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mx5XdiHH5D5m0OOoRd6i-YXVKzVPWrfxgkyz-r52WYY=&emci=5608ffc3-56d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=3f81bd1d-5ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9027908) There’s another piece of the price-hike puzzle — it sets today’s inflation apart from previous bouts, and I’ve got a plan to address it, too. The playing field has totally changed due to unchecked corporate consolidation. For years, giant corporations have gobbled up their competitors for a bigger share of the pie. As a result, they can control things like pricing — without any fear that their consumers would go across the street for a cheaper price — because they own both sides of the street. Take the meat industry. In 1977, the four biggest beef-packing firms had control of 25% of the market. Today, they control 82% of the market. The fewer firms in an industry, the easier it is for them to collude and fix prices. So a couple of months ago, I also introduced a bill to help stomp out rampant industry consolidation. **I’m going to keep attacking inflation from every which way. But it’s going to take a grassroots team to get Washington’s attention and get this done.** [_**Add your name as a grassroots co-sponsor of our Price Gouging Prevention Act. Let’s make it clear that the American people are calling for change.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545161/346434898/109996081?refcode=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&ms=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgxYmQxZC01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mx5XdiHH5D5m0OOoRd6i-YXVKzVPWrfxgkyz-r52WYY=&emci=5608ffc3-56d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=3f81bd1d-5ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545162/346434899/109996081?refcode=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&ms=EMZ5I_COR_E_20220520_V1S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjgxYmQxZC01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mx5XdiHH5D5m0OOoRd6i-YXVKzVPWrfxgkyz-r52WYY=&emci=5608ffc3-56d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=3f81bd1d-5ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=9027908)**

name: Team Holland
subject: Tonight is the night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holland for Kansas

Right now, Mark is traveling all over Kansas to meet rural voters face to face and hear about their top concerns for Kansas. Mark understands the rural voters are often neglected by big money politicians – _including Jerry Moran._ As a Senator, Mark is ready to represent all Kansas interests and take the time to get to know his constituents.

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

subject: Have you met Jeremy Shaffer?

body:
Here’s just some of our opponent’s radical record:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545221/346435325/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.20_b1_ch_all-nd&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzBlZDVjZS01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cTWvIqB2584ikkDpKTP4-LinuyyHinjBasUlD6u34Uk=) Hi Derek,

In a moment, I’m going to tell you about our **MAGA right-wing opponent Jeremy Shaffer.** But before I do, I have to ask:

[**We have a tough election ahead, and only six short months to defeat Shaffer and the radical right in PA-17. Can you chip in just $5 today to keep our campaign running at full speed?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545222/346435326/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.20_b1_ch_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzBlZDVjZS01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cTWvIqB2584ikkDpKTP4-LinuyyHinjBasUlD6u34Uk=)

Jeremy Shaffer has nothing to offer for the problems families across western Pennsylvania are facing. **He won’t fight for our common good** – he only cares about power and profit at whatever cost.
* **He wants to overturn _Roe v. Wade_** and favors a nationwide ban even in cases of rape and incest.

* **He opposes the _Equality Act_** and wants LGBTQ people like me to have to live in the shadows.

* **He would ship your job overseas** in a heartbeat if it meant a penny more in profit for corporate bosses.

* **He would love to kill the union way of life** and have workers begging for scraps.

* **He threw in $500,000 of his own money** to his Congressional campaign run so far, and he’s sure to put in more to try to buy this seat now that we’re in the general election.

**If Shaffer wins in November, he will work alongside Kevin McCarthy and right-wing extremists to push through a radical agenda that hurts Pennsylvanians._We can’t let that happen._**

**[Chris has brought together a labor-backed coalition of progressives and moderates. It’s going to take all of us to win, so Derek, can you chip in $5 or more to help our people-powered movement defeat Jeremy Shaffer and the radical right in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45545223/346435327/-2143054902?refcode=em_fr_2022.05.20_b1_ch_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzBlZDVjZS01YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cTWvIqB2584ikkDpKTP4-LinuyyHinjBasUlD6u34Uk=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Here’s just some of our opponent’s radical record: | = Hi Derek, In a moment, I’m going to tell you about our MAGA right-wing opponent Jeremy Shaffer. But before I do, I have to ask: = Jeremy Shaffer has nothing to offer for the problems families across western Pennsylvania are facing. He won’t fight for our common good – he only cares about power and profit at whatever cost. He wants to overturn Roe v. Wade and favors a nationwide ban even in cases of rape and incest. He opposes the Equality Act and wants LGBTQ people like me to have to live in the shadows. He would ship your job overseas in a heartbeat if it meant a penny more in profit for corporate bosses. He would love to kill the union way of life and have workers begging for scraps. He threw in $500,000 of his own money to his Congressional campaign run so far, and he’s sure to put in more to try to buy this seat now that we’re in the general election. If Shaffer wins in November, he will work alongside Kevin McCarthy and right-wing extremists to push through a radical agenda that hurts Pennsylvanians.We can’t let that happen. =** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for your support, Caitlin Handerhan Campaign Manager Chris Deluzio for Congress | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. Peter,The World Health Organization (WHO) is meeting next week in Geneva, Switzerland to consider amendments proposed by Biden’s radical administration to sell out America’s health care system and our national sovereignty by granting **complete global control** to WHO.WHO assisted with the mainstream media’s efforts to play up the pandemic by covering up their lies and propaganda. The globalist group denied all evidence of the gain-of-function research at the coronavirus lab in Wuhan, China. Thanks to conservative fighters like Senator Rand Paul, the truth has been exposed and we have all the information we need to fight back. Now, the Biden regime wants to strengthen WHO’s abilities to intervene with our national affairs under the guise of a “public health emergency of international concern.” Peter, if these amendments are passed, WHO will have the complete authority to **dictate how the federal government must respond** once a _public health emergency_ is declared by the global elites. Do we really want to grant a board of non-elected globalists who promoted the lies of the Chinese Communist Party the authority to declare another global pandemic whenever they see fit?
[**Make a donation to elect the Proven Conservative Fighter in this race who has stood in the trenches with you since Day One fighting COVID tyranny >>>**](https://JeremyMunson.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ed4007ca3497aee312b2b63d0&id=7124084a61&e=f4c2e54596)
