There's no question why this is happening so close to an election . . . **Midterms are in November and THE LEFT WANTS ME GONE**.

Well, I've got news for them: I won't back down without a fight. But **[I need all of my supporters to rally together today so that I can show the Left that they're not just coming after me, they're coming after the American people that voted conservatives into office](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60430299:69DDqPoIN:m:1:3317145305:F8054E7077B0C50498981C16A8E2E756:r)**.

With you in the fight
Jim Jordan

Delaware, OH 43015

subject: Falling short is not an option
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45557862/346467736/265476937?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU5YTk3Mi03MGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvpmJ5G7_boFRmEkMMl9463UHelyffMVB63BUHqdBmU=)
---
Peter, it’s because of supporters like you that I became the first Black woman EVER to be elected to hold New York statewide office in 2018.
But the moment I was elected I knew that this historic accomplishment would only be meaningful if I used my platform to fight for New York’s voiceless and vulnerable. And so, for the last few years, I’ve put my head down and worked day and night to ensure that families like my own would finally have someone in government fighting for their best interests.
**Peter, I’m running for another term as attorney general of New York because my work is far from over – but I need to raise at least $10,000 before midnight tomorrow to keep my campaign running strong. Winning a race like this depends on hitting every single goal, so please:[Will you rush a donation of $5 or more now to help me reach my May mid-month fundraising goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45557863/346467737/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk483-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU5YTk3Mi03MGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvpmJ5G7_boFRmEkMMl9463UHelyffMVB63BUHqdBmU=)**

---
Republicans across the country are attempting to wrestle away all of the hard-fought progress we’ve made in the last few decades – and they’re starting to win. That’s why, with reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun reform under attack, New Yorkers need someone who will NEVER stop fighting for progress.
**But my continued fight relies on your support, Peter.** Because both my GOP opponent and the multimillion-dollar Republican Attorneys General Association are DETERMINED to defeat me in November.
**That’s why falling short of my mid-month fundraising goal is not an option, but I can’t hit this goal unless every fearless fighter who is able to give does. [So please, will you chip in $50, $25, or even just $5 to ensure that I have the resources I need to stand tall against GOP attacks and win re-election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45557866/346467740/379053316?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk483-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGU5YTk3Mi03MGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WvpmJ5G7_boFRmEkMMl9463UHelyffMVB63BUHqdBmU=)**

clean_body: | | | = Peter, it’s because of supporters like you that I became the first Black woman EVER to be elected to hold New York statewide office in 2018. But the moment I was elected I knew that this historic accomplishment would only be meaningful if I used my platform to fight for New York’s voiceless and vulnerable. And so, for the last few years, I’ve put my head down and worked day and night to ensure that families like my own would finally have someone in government fighting for their best interests. Peter, I’m running for another term as attorney general of New York because my work is far from over – but I need to raise at least $10,000 before midnight tomorrow to keep my campaign running strong. Winning a race like this depends on hitting every single goal, so please:= = | | = Republicans across the country are attempting to wrestle away all of the hard-fought progress we’ve made in the last few decades – and they’re starting to win. That’s why, with reproductive rights, voting rights, and gun reform under attack, New Yorkers need someone who will NEVER stop fighting for progress. But my continued fight relies on your support, Peter. Because both my GOP opponent and the multimillion-dollar Republican Attorneys General Association are DETERMINED to defeat me in November. That’s why falling short of my mid-month fundraising goal is not an option, but I can’t hit this goal unless every fearless fighter who is able to give does. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for making history with me. Letitia James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY PO Box 476 New York, NY 10034 United States | | Paid for by James for NY

**EXPIRATION NOTICE:**
Thanks to Joe Biden, Title 42 will expire THIS MONDAY. It's a major anti-illegal immigration policy from President Trump. **Border states are sounding the alarm -- I hope you 're listening.******

Brace yourself. If you think our border is out of control now, just imagine what it will look like with tens of thousands more illegal immigrants streaming across our border every month. We need to move NOW before Title 42 expires.

Hi Peter, We'd like to introduce ourselves. We're The Real Texas PAC, a Texas-based, Texan-led organization working to fight against the far-right takeover of our great state. It seems that every day, there's a new unbelievable story coming out of Texas. From Greg Abbott to Ted Cruz, the bad guys get all the airtime. **But here’s what we know for sure: they do not represent the REAL Texas.** The Real Texas is a place where we want to protect LGBTQ children, not bully them via discriminatory legislation. A place that believes healthcare decisions should be between a woman and her doctor. A state that knows children deserve education and access to food, regardless of their immigration status. THIS is The Real Texas, and it’s what we’re fighting for. Will you join us? [**Add your name now if you believe Texas is worth fighting for.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45559489/346469140/-1815300798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NzM1NzE1LTcyZDgtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bp6MivPJyh4yYanL8MuakAmIJa-wG4bPXUW1VqjK2Ls=&emci=4baccac3-70d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=84735715-72d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1305532)

[I'm all in to fight for Texas >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45559497/346469144/-1815300798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NzM1NzE1LTcyZDgtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bp6MivPJyh4yYanL8MuakAmIJa-wG4bPXUW1VqjK2Ls=&emci=4baccac3-70d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=84735715-72d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1305532)

| | Texas is not a red state. It's a gerrymandered and voter suppressed purple state. It's up to Democrats like us to fight for the Texas we know and love, and to ensure that we have better days ahead. We're ready to fight, and we're in for the long haul. _Because Texas is worth it. _ [**We hope you'll join us. Add your name now if you believe like we do that Texas is worth fighting for.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45559505/346469148/-1815300798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4OTE5IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg0NzM1NzE1LTcyZDgtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bp6MivPJyh4yYanL8MuakAmIJa-wG4bPXUW1VqjK2Ls=&emci=4baccac3-70d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=84735715-72d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=1305532) More soon, The Real Texas PAC

name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Reminder: Even The Boston Globe admits the "numbers don't lie"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
| | | |
---
Dear Delegate,
When even The Boston Globe starts talking about it being a good year for Republicans, you know we must be on to something!
That's what Globe columnist Joan Vennochi concluded in [her most recent column](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jjxBEzKigqO4Qcn8CO3Tv_FyZYMbKyUMXhuLfv2Eh8InGn9S1EX8c3w9hMZB6QcwLA_IGarX-JvlCsxyke53yjnpEAfzUi7SzF8lFASsb7q45Hom65ZaRbPOUwtyPS-LYszJWKaFMhdG2kk_zmKclIrgAlLq-sybMmj2FeNhqaq2U2bag4ViYjVfaBFIj03XArv7hyjmNUJSDQ1T3k0RxdigCK7s1fyxYGZXe5hBe9U=&c=dnwlww5ZY74owHAGdVCta3mkCFYiC-vn1NNpVdlYB7CagpyhRZb6ng==&ch=O1OVoj4OpVENM2e-Jh1hwuTNNGDzn1ttITuAGRVd4cyNfKoK9cgPxA==) \-- Republicans have momentum and this is potentially shaping up to be a very bad election year for Democrats in Massachusetts.
According to Vennochi, Secretary of State Bill Galvin confirms my campaign has submitted 16,673 certified signatures to secure a spot on the ballot \-- far more than my Republican challenger, and compared to just 14,000 signatures for Maura Healey.
As Vennochi says in her column, "numbers don't lie."
Of course, this all comes on the heels of the last pre-convention poll, showing my campaign is leading my Republican challenger by a four-to-one margin amongst likely GOP primary voters.
The conclusion is clear. I am the only candidate capable of taking on Maura Healey and the progressives this fall, and we are going to win. The numbers prove it. And, we have you to thank for that.
For weeks, you traversed the state with us, collecting signatures at stores and shopping malls. Throughout the process, we had a chance to talk with voters about the problems we see in our state:

* We reject the Biden economy and its sky-high inflation, government spending, and taxes, at all levels of government.

* We will fight against unfair mandates that take away your rights and freedom.

* We oppose inappropriate content being taught in classrooms and the marginalization of parents as decision makers.

* And that's just the start....

Leah Cole Allen and I aim to replace the status quo. We are running to build a better Massachusetts every day. And, with your help, we have the momentum we need to win in November.
Thank you for your support. Let's go get this victory, starting with a big win at this Saturday's MassGOP Convention in Springfield.
Sincerely,

---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
| PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
---
|
---

Exciting news, Peter: **Kim officially filed for re-election to continue representing Washington's 8th District in Congress.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45539982/346417968/-1350766262?refcode=em22_220520_filed_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220520_filed_fnd_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NmYzNiOS01MWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uKmySQtkCGwNyNklTZU4OiIkmvfrtmyCm4UyxS-QFNw=) Four years ago, this grassroots team sent Kim to Congress because you knew she would advocate for you the same way she's stood up for children and families as a pediatrician. Since then, she's been the leader our district needs, fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect access to reproductive care, combat climate change, and so much more.

Kim's accomplished a lot over these last four years, but there's still work to be done. That's why she filed to run for re-election so she can continue fighting for Washingtonians in Congress.

clean_body: Kim officially filed for re-election to continue representing Washington's 8th District in Congress. Exciting news, Peter: Kim officially filed for re-election to continue representing Washington's 8th District in Congress. = Four years ago, this grassroots team sent Kim to Congress because you knew she would advocate for you the same way she's stood up for children and families as a pediatrician. Since then, she's been the leader our district needs, fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs, protect access to reproductive care, combat climate change, and so much more. Kim's accomplished a lot over these last four years, but there's still work to be done. That's why she filed to run for re-election so she can continue fighting for Washingtonians in Congress. Now that Kim's name will appear on the ballot, this race is officially on. With four conservative opponents running to defeat Kim, $3.9 million in super PAC attacks coming our way, and election experts calling our race a "toss-up," we need your help to ensure we have the resources to defend Kim's seat and our Democratic House majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Schrier To hold the House majority, we must re-elect Rep. Kim Schrier in WA-08. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: INDEMS
subject: Fast Facts Friday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
**\- It’s that time again: #BigDemWeekend - ** Big Dem Weekend is back! Between the Hoosier Hospitality Dinner on June 17 and the State Convention on June 18, Democrats from across the state will meet in Indianapolis to celebrate the brighter future leaders like André Carson and Frank Mrvan have created for Hoosier families. Here are our special guests for Big Dem Weekend: ****
**** From new jobs, well-funded public schools, and a once-in-a-generation investment in our infrastructure – Democrats have delivered for families in all 92 counties. It’s time to celebrate this work before the campaign season. _Snag your tickets here:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561143/346470955/-1823536925?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=)_ _Make your overnight reservations[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561144/346470956/1351751907?src=envision_email_grpreserv_ENG_20210804_GroupBooking_TC000000170A000007762ENG_G-_93048&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535)_
**\- Be a Part of Hoosier History as a State Convention Delegate - ** The State Convention is where delegates get to vote on the party platform, offer resolutions, and nominate our candidates for Secretary of State, State Auditor, and State Treasurer. Delegates will also attend a congressional district meeting, hear from candidates, meet other democrats from around the state, and have the chance to attend constituency caucus meetings. If you are interested in learning more about being a state convention delegate you can register here for training: [https://www.mobilize.us/indems/event/454732/](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561145/346470957/1905785337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535) The next training date is: _**Tue, Jun 7, 6:00pm–7:00pm EDT**_ Please reach out to your [Democratic County Chair](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561146/346470958/532796064?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535) to inquire about being one of your county’s delegates. **\- INDems call on Indiana GOP to Save Hoosiers Money by Pause Impending Hike on Gas Tax, Pause Existing Tax on Motorists - ** Democrats across Indiana have called on Indiana Republicans to save Hoosiers money by pausing both the state gas tax AND [the impending hike expected to fall on July 1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561147/346470959/184853316?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535). This would save families cash at the pump during this burdensome global inflationary period. It’s time to deliver this brighter future and win-win policy for Hoosiers. But, Indiana Republicans “[show no signs](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561148/346470960/407161222?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535)” of combating an issue that’s important to voters - proving once more they are a party with no plans for Indiana, just partisanship. **\- INDems Response to Indiana GOP Voting "NO" to Solve Baby Formula Shortage -** The U.S. House voted this week on a [$28 million package](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561149/346470961/1465542561?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535) to solve the infant formula shortage. Democrats like André Carson and Frank Mrvan stepped up to solve this shortage.

But, it looks like after many calls to action by the Indiana Republicans like [Jim Banks](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561150/346470962/2046423775?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535), [Dr. Larry Bucshon](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561151/346470963/-19474640?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535), and [Jackie Walorski](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561152/346470964/-2101315616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535), they chose to vote "NO" on what should have been a bipartisan vote to deliver this kitchen-table issue for Hoosier families. _"Hoosier families are struggling to find baby formula, and it was Democrats like André Carson and Frank Mrvan who voted 'YES' to solve this shortage. This is a common sense issue that needed to be resolved immediately, and Democrats stepped up and delivered when it mattered most. The Indiana Democratic Party hopes this measure can now swiftly move through the rest of Congress so production can resume and families can get what is a necessity for their little ones.

Unfortunately, many Indiana Republicans - after criticizing President Joe Biden on social media - voted 'NO' to address what should have been a bipartisan, unanimous vote. Instead, Republicans like Jim Banks, Dr. Larry Bucshon, and Jackie Walorski invoked lazy, divisive partisanship intended to divide communities rather than actually solve this shortage. Their vote is unbecoming of office holders, and it's another reminder the Indiana Republican Party has become a party with no plans for our future. They will choose partisanship over people every time - even when babies and their health is on line." **\- Lauren Ganapini, executive director of the Indiana Democratic Party**_ **\- How the American Rescue Plan and The Jobs Act are Delivering for Hoosiers - ** In this week’s Fast Facts Friday, here’s how Indiana Democrats have created a better future for Hoosier families:
* President Joe Biden’s [American Rescue Plan](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561153/346470965/2075701864?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535) is responsible for doubling the capacity of Jeffersonville’s North Wastewater Treatment Plant. The $11 million investment will cover both design and construction cost for the facility that is expected to double the plant’s operating capability
* The Jobs Act’s influx of funding for infrastructure projects sped up road repair and potholes projects for motorists in [Hamilton, Johnson, and Marion counties](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561154/346470966/966678378?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535) by a full year. With The Jobs Act and their call to suspend the state’s gas tax, Democrats have a plan to solve the kitchen-table issues voters care about most.
* The COVID-19 relief law is delivering $1.5 million to expand workforce training programs at Indiana Tech in Fort Wayne. The engineering and manufacturing related certification programs will bolster high wage job growth in Indiana and help [correct the Indiana GOP’s F-rated workforce. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561155/346470967/1944698831?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZmZlMmExNi03NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TW9K7baYMHZo9qOTViBEE_6SE86Cw0f44RyjpLhPm4=&emci=b3da4ac9-6fd8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=fffe2a16-74d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=4925535)

**\- Join Us in Columbus, New Castle for Indiana Democrats’ Town Hall Series - ** Democrats are continuing its “2022 Town Hall Series”, an effort by the Indiana Democratic Party and the Libertarian Party of Indiana to hear from all voters about the top issues facing Hoosier families ahead of the 2022 state and federal elections. Democrats believe it’s imperative for voters to hear from all major political parties, and this fact is why the tour will be held in about 15 communities - big and small - across Indiana. **Join us on the road! Here are next week’s town halls:** ****
****
_NOTE: The Indiana Republican Party has been invited to participate in these town hall events. Unfortunately, the organization declined this invitation. _

**\- Future Events and Opportunities -**
\- Saturday, June 18, 2022: Party Pride with Special Guest: Andrea Jenkins -
****

\- Saturday June 18, 2022: Indiana Young Democrats bring back their traditional HH Dinner After Party -
**** **######**

clean_body: Hi there, Peter. It's Amanda, Abby's campaign manager. Have you seen this message from Abby? We just launched the very FIRST ad of our campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), and I don't want you to miss it. This is a really exciting moment, but we can't take our foot off the gas for even a minute. The GOP has a war chest of $44 MILLION to take back the Senate, and national Republicans have already made it clear that they have no problem attacking campaigns like ours. We've got a winning message, and we need your help to make sure we can keep ads like this one up on the air all across Iowa. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks, Amanda Sands (Abby's campaign manager) \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Abby Finkenauer Date: Tue, May 17, 2022 Subject: we are OFFICIALLY on the air! | | | Peter, it's Abby with some really, really exciting news: we are OFFICIALLY live on the air in Iowa! That's right, our team just launched our first TV ad of this campaign. Today, we're closer to defeating Sen. Chuck Grassley than ever before. = = Ads like this one will reach people all over Iowa, giving us a critical opportunity to introduce our campaign to the voters who will decide this election in November. Getting on the air is only possible because grassroots supporters believed in our campaign and stood with me. Thank you so much for powering our campaign to this moment. Don't get me wrong, I'm celebrating today – but we can't lose perspective: the GOP have a $44 MILLION war chest to take back the Senate and defeat Democratic challengers like me. They could write a massive check at any moment to counter this ad and fill the TV time with their own right-wing messaging! Sen. Grassley has already launched his first online attack ad, and we have to ensure that we can keep our ad on the air and counter GOP attacks like his on our campaign. But ad buys like this are a serious investment, and I'm really counting on strong grassroots support here. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much for getting our campaign to this moment. I'm incredibly grateful to have your support. – Abby | |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Humbly asking for your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z94ua790vub815vbbielcdoa7p6d3mvhsopnce58_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1jmao32cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr0mqq7fdjmciq78p5km1ir8ob5ctj7ad9lc9q66o31ctibacrmmsqr6sbheerrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33cljc1g74tb66hgb6p9nm2qmash5u)

| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting began May 2 for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoar6nu4eii6je0dlo9ll66tposv02d12epl7pu8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1jmao32cth2bs "Senator Raphael Warnock \(D\) has outraised every candidate in the country – including our campaign, so we’re doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.")**_

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zipo5dmv5s7ro2gjk24dlgjfn1n9e9m0ejd75teo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1jmao32cth2bs)
---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0gdssh53hppa1bs6i07g08bjn7gsbotk93jpfr0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1jmao32cth2bs "I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I’m humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.")**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1fl2bsnjhhbbglse68kbb4o4jmd6ljsu63k84v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1jmao32cth2bs "Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute \(for a combined $105\) and help us close the fundraising gap?")**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjkffiq5890bdilijnq5sqs4v63tl2svv8v6gqdg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c1jmao32cth2bs)

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: We’re speechless
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The amount of grassroots support we’re able to demonstrate now will help us plan what the next few months will look like.
#
Derek,
It’s been less than 72 hours since John won the official Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate + all 67 PA Counties.
Candidly, we’re speechless. Thank you, thank you, thank you.
But you should know. _As we celebrate, the Republicans, political pundits, and corporate funded super PACs are quietly watching our every move + waiting to see how much money we raise._
[**Every single dollar donated right now will make a difference as John takes on the general election. So, please donate $5 right now to show John you’re in his corner.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5913&refcode2=5913_434096_7Kc8fp&akid=5913%2E434096%2E7Kc8fp)

Launching a campaign the right way is an expensive, labor-intensive process, and despite the unprecedented level of excitement we’ve seen over the past year of campaigning, we’ve still got a hell of a lot of work ahead of us.
This race is one of the most important of 2022 — and already the most expensive Senate race — so what happens in these next few weeks will shape the state of the race for months to come. We’ve got a good feeling we can win this thing, but our success will depend entirely on the amount of support we receive from folks like you, Derek.
**[Chip in $5 now to let John, Gisele, and the entire Fetterman team know that you’ve got their backs in this campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5913&refcode2=5913_434096_7Kc8fp&akid=5913%2E434096%2E7Kc8fp)**

More to come,
Team Fetterman
P.S. The honest reason we’re asking for contributions right now is so that John, his family, and our campaign team can see how many folks we can count on in the months leading up to November. **[If you’re with John, donate $5 to be on record as one of John’s founding donors as we head towards Election Day.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5913&refcode2=5913_434096_7Kc8fp&akid=5913%2E434096%2E7Kc8fp)**

clean_body: The amount of grassroots support we’re able to demonstrate now will help us plan what the next few months will look like. Derek, It’s been less than 72 hours since John won the official Democratic nomination for U.S. Senate + all 67 PA Counties. Candidly, we’re speechless. Thank you, thank you, thank you. But you should know. As we celebrate, the Republicans, political pundits, and corporate funded super PACs are quietly watching our every move + waiting to see how much money we raise. Launching a campaign the right way is an expensive, labor-intensive process, and despite the unprecedented level of excitement we’ve seen over the past year of campaigning, we’ve still got a hell of a lot of work ahead of us. This race is one of the most important of 2022 — and already the most expensive Senate race — so what happens in these next few weeks will shape the state of the race for months to come. We’ve got a good feeling we can win this thing, but our success will depend entirely on the amount of support we receive from folks like you, Derek. More to come, Team Fetterman P.S. The honest reason we’re asking for contributions right now is so that John, his family, and our campaign team can see how many folks we can count on in the months leading up to November. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

body:

Friend,
---
Serving as governor was one of the greatest honors of my life.
---
It is a tough and important job. **I am reminded of that as we look to this year’s election.**
---
Governors play a key role in strengthening our nation. Governors must balance the budget, protect the rights and interests of the people of their state, and create new opportunities, all while fending off federal overreach and facing unexpected tragedies and natural disasters.
---
That’s why it’s so important that we rally behind bold conservative leaders who will make an incredible difference as governor.
---
**[And that’s why I endorsed Rebecca Kleefisch, a conservative warrior who has the experience to get to work on Day One and has the courage to stand up and defend our values.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=63e67d4f1b244738ba08dc2b5ae23d35&_e=ilYCKLg5LygMhsNesoqE1b-VLUQsIzfSTKDM_uPkLD1w78Lj242xr2RPrx5DGzCmAhM8_-PXKsj3iEZQUDmxLTXBq_1Ubl7Rw_m98HPIwIciQszA9zeUwlo1nXqp6lUTPDCw4EkOpZ6X7p6Qm8gI74RrYaMjPpiAVWv5sVEaHSqgJqOnJTX5mlvTRxcqgQqI_-fg3C-sndNv-SKC1Paj1blLK_EnQ81NivT-jdgel7doLAnVg1BxnMZTDPYZbQZcv4ClpnGOxerig8C5hcTWhyl0Tutis8o_hxb846D0t9urpVDzm44qKpSPpzFPA3pChvWgqxZ1ModR8jrx7boFpODOKSnsslsEC8h954Onj9R4avVrSknOTQFdzLCnwn--HZT0TWZ4kjw3Eel5zP1068ZOMFh7Yf31Z3BZM-sZeT3jTnmtLWxMjaj9jII3oKjbbXC6HepOsVX7yBdv8FWDXaY7gSxGu5S2S3WujxJDLMU3De0_Mn5eADyYE_PWs_k9VZP4Z3nQL6Ys7bBBULurpA%3D%3D)**

---
Rebecca is a mom, a proven leader, and the former lieutenant governor of Wisconsin. With Wisconsin set to be a top battleground state, winning statewide won’t be easy. That’s where you come in. [**I’m asking every freedom-loving conservative to contribute a gift of any amount to her campaign today.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=63e67d4f1b244738ba08dc2b5ae23d35&_e=ilYCKLg5LygMhsNesoqE1b-VLUQsIzfSTKDM_uPkLD1w78Lj242xr2RPrx5DGzCmAhM8_-PXKsj3iEZQUDmxLTXBq_1Ubl7Rw_m98HPIwIciQszA9zeUwlo1nXqp6lUTPDCw4EkOpZ6X7p6Qm8gI74RrYaMjPpiAVWv5sVEaHSqgJqOnJTX5mlvTRxcqgQqI_-fg3C-sndNv-SKC1Paj1blLK_EnQ81NivT-jdgel7doLAnVg1BxnMZTDPYZbQZcv4ClpnGOxerig8C5hcTWhyl0Tutis8o_hxb846D0t9urpVDzm44qKpSPpzFPA3pCbRVueWDxrGJ5DRM8waQBLjmE4COX367iVQReSGKlrbSYVxM4ICtjuFbkK-Sj9g6fqGAK8BCeAwx7K5vUn65mEmisMk4UqUonBUfbYbZewnHXAVC85zDGpfW6Ksdw1E1kG_GFJdDidNAzO5BR7aJAR3zZQmKOYUaogYMnq-zYTZBHL-ZNiz73hZbQ3Rug6K-FtjwKoDkIJi2pHrsavMFWpw%3D%3D)
---
You see, this will be one of the toughest races in the country. It’s currently rated a TOSS UP, and it’s also a top pick-up opportunity for Republicans.
---
Democrats are pouring millions of dollars into the state to try and stop Rebecca from defeating the liberal incumbent. In order to make sure Rebecca has the necessary resources to fend off the Left’s attacks, it’s important that we all step up today.
---
[**Your immediate donation to Rebecca’s campaign will be a key part of pulling off a victory.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=63e67d4f1b244738ba08dc2b5ae23d35&_e=ilYCKLg5LygMhsNesoqE1b-VLUQsIzfSTKDM_uPkLD1w78Lj242xr2RPrx5DGzCmAhM8_-PXKsj3iEZQUDmxLTXBq_1Ubl7Rw_m98HPIwIciQszA9zeUwlo1nXqp6lUTPDCw4EkOpZ6X7p6Qm8gI74RrYaMjPpiAVWv5sVEaHSqgJqOnJTX5mlvTRxcqgQqI_-fg3C-sndNv-SKC1Paj1blLK_EnQ81NivT-jdgel7doLAnVg1BxnMZTDPYZbQZcv4ClpnGOxerig8C5hcTWhyl0Tutis8o_hxb846D0t9urpVDzm44qKpSPpzFPA3pCOxgvPmsCAsheptScHKAkMYjXWVbdFOQGGcpdbOzNY7DIWQlGtx3encjH8T3UDezmRL2A8rSf9-0QKIeeLxhYkwgX0vUbDaHYGBw8YyDk6GjdUlNstXEQ27_HBEYa0w0fYLr2G3oe_FOAid0BVxF6WdNslz9fuVqVZBv6pftDlU12h7zhtUUGN8XUDdWy2YIiSGa1BMbc67XcQPqMj8NoLA%3D%3D)

Friend,
Earlier this week, Kirsten took to the debate stage and proved why she is the most qualified candidate to represent the people and communities of AZ-06.
From her extensive knowledge of climate change, and the many solutions before us that will enrich our economy for generations to come, to her commitment to defend safe and legal abortion care for every Arizonan, the evidence is clear: **Kirsten Engel is the dedicated leader we need in Congress.**
**However, our Republican opposition is determined to keep Kirsten from becoming our next Representative in Congress.** Because after their success passing anti-abortion and anit-LGBTQ+ legislation, they believe they have the momentum needed to take back not only this seat, but the House of Representatives, as well.
But we're not going to let them slow us down. We're going to continue to prove to voters that Kirsten is THE candidate who can not only keep this district blue but who will bring real solutions to the issues Arizonans care about.

name: Joe Cunningham
subject: RE: competing against McMaster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina
body:
| I wanted to make sure you saw my message from yesterday because with less than a month left until the big primary election and the launch of the general, we are gearing up to finally go head-to-head with Henry McMaster.

Will you chip in $25 to help us prepare for the fight?

**[https://sc.joeisfor.us/a/may22-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45561489/346472258/80455362?amount=25&contactdata=SWB7%2BmOQ3OdSb5iqHImqhI6sDwKLg%2FLhFq%2BVIrvlnMeLC8uDGAwsO72tQu%2FQfozIKCG7rBS%2BwJBApu0%2FDS7tjU8ZeO8ZB5JH7A4Tnepa94c%3D&source=JC_EM_FR_3MO_20220520_1_3&utm_source=jc_em_fr_3mo_20220520_1_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODJlMjY4YS03NWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y1q6Ts7jxwpl5A6sHsCLqZ4qeV3KqXnU8MLr0lqSp-o=)**

Thank you for being part of my team,
Joe

* * *
**_My Original Message:_**

Hey folks —

Can you believe the primary and launch of the general election is less than one month away? My team is growing our base across the state — filming ads, knocking on doors, and more to make sure we’re reaching as many voters as possible.

**[The fact is, none of this comes cheap. That’s why my team set a $10,000 goal for this week to ensure we can keep going at this rapid pace. # **Weekly Recap:
****_May 20, 2022_**
---
| | Hi Team, Another great week is behind us! With just **60 DAYS LEFT** until the July 19th election, we are ramping up with more events, more ad buys, and more opportunities to volunteer with the campaign. Keep scrolling to read more about what we're up to — with social media highlights, pictures of the team, event recaps, and more ways to get involved.
Thank you again for your continued support. We can't wait to elect John King and Michelle Siri as Maryland's next Democratic ticket with you by our side. — Team King P.S. We are so proud of everything we have accomplished so far, but continuing our voter outreach, keeping TWO TV ads on air, and more in the coming months will take serious resources. name: Beto HQ
subject: Three reasons to chip in today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

We’re sure you’re getting a few emails from different campaigns right now
— but we wanted to reach out to share three reasons why you should make a
contribution to Beto today.

1. As governor of Texas, Beto can use the veto power to stop extremist
legislation from becoming law and defend reproductive rights, stop
attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, and protect democracy itself.
2. Beto is rejecting all corporate PAC contributions. This is a campaign
powered by people chipping in what they can because they believe in
Beto’s positive vision for Texas.
3. Greg Abbott’s campaign plans to spend $100,000,000 attacking Beto.
Your grassroots contribution today will help us fight back.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220520-1?refcode=ema20220520-190167&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=190167_444211_1AVSmP&akid=190167%2E444211%2E1AVSmP ]So what do you say? Will you make a
$3 contribution right now to help Beto defeat Greg Abbott
in November?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220520-1?refcode=ema20220520-190167&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&refcode2=190167_444211_1AVSmP&akid=190167%2E444211%2E1AVSmP ]Contribute $3

Every single donation that we receive today will help us go up against
Greg Abbott’s corporate mega-donors.

Thank you,

Team Beto

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1021&akid=190167%2E444211%2E1AVSmP

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: Odessa Kelly
subject: I’m so glad Summer Lee won the Democratic nomination in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ODESSA FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
What we can learn from our fellow Justice Democrat’s win | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xQsZ_uHW9ME9h2VPudEgVBlT0rAEcoX_uBPlqDgEOfEQIhz_Vu9SFmd68KrwuQ3aJegxlzx0WErTIW4hjJyWkR3J90f6KLMbnzRCJwbZ8APoNXc1Fnu1bI6YqEmlCS0-YcfuoN47jSlM8iBWGwzEYewks86tZvfwzx1vDcnFT5VALzvfxyet1NY_kFSG6cPDAZbImGsPo4AevHjXpRbQHwB_ChqXeyFtdC2nRTqG3c9GWmArUgxPaXvxlzRpj5TrI3nED1kfI0f_83gmwSyKzu1F_CLOl1SC95POS74c_kqrM_5ceByrlk6UPRbRA4van6YsvVhIvPLn3kbNfn4d9UnakQ6M5kGw7cYq1R2xIfsq37mwauSaNG7pxy2tu2SCg/3m7/Iv-wed3kTsCHSQRUP5TfSQ/h0/yCdvoPa2VDR3HlYxfpAoXTWYByEwNek6TbV_NIJJXKk) Peter, Tuesday night, my girl (and fellow Justice Democrat) Summer Lee won her primary up in western Pennsylvania, beating out a flood of dark money to win the fight for working people in her home district! Even though Summer faced tons of dark money from billionaires and special interest groups, she won by building a working-class movement. **It goes to show that even against super PACs and dark money donors, progressives can fight back and win.** [**That’s exactly what we’re going to do in TN-07 by out-working and out-organizing our multi-millionaire opponent and his corporate PAC-funded campaign. Can you help power our movement by contributing today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi8G8EEcwFGHREnu44HkxrFiGP-5BSRP6GF8yddV4T2f2RVGw2zCpmF6_Om3peS-WmAt3Lu-m5L5cP0JkxymoMmMM6fIyWHAqSUUfcKNn6ueB33ye5dsCqe9K1-lXNw6fs826K4nuthrXnAhNiFfIgfFeD09bbMT7s5ciwOxHuPIk-sgMuc9Kay52fS52_uXp-H_hOd9LExKPd_t4M80K4Rh4Ap5pZlL8usH--boeQtX31Ih8yqQ1LNlW6LN1qDzPGW_R5hIOa4QfYyz5pHpgZ1Y8FGf8iLh-HFjFW7aFrTF7lN8DSIpJTXMTyHy6PZnBU_41AF4zNhUUCvdeR03RHgjrs0r58Q_ntrtiWjpuvBq0/3m7/Iv-wed3kTsCHSQRUP5TfSQ/h1/zSC5Bm9IJARgZf63do7MfxmMWolq5dxAdo5xM8mdUlA) [Donate »](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xWIurlfE4kaqpZPqSu1iEi8G8EEcwFGHREnu44HkxrFiGP-5BSRP6GF8yddV4T2f3w5ysKG4USFWznsK6dGC5T6V_STwFP1JvF47sfo197HaYEeMAbxhfiCuHh7SF4odLLRbaFIm1I6yTDnM88XbObUpLI__wYzyI2U27ato3vDKwYMST7LqSY01UoO4ZicY2lyn345qgkfFNw3xprlKAZrWLDFoay-M1i263FM7KabBjFwEXxN9TclQGMa_U8FeyNpeTQgrCoCLD4HYWFXx3xvqpsx5zXUhOOkZ_pIoafHcGcxFfpbjRmBVL98rifoKN0IQgL1DmsYiR3yaqssvBATz8jja8JpLQNIIFUNBvoMOxMKoreHoHKGEUa4sg7HVw/3m7/Iv-wed3kTsCHSQRUP5TfSQ/h2/VasAEaTg3mWkSS8BA6QBvmW7dEE9nFd0k6VLcxpmDLQ) Outside special interests across the country are trying to stop movements like ours. clean_body: What we can learn from our fellow Justice Democrat’s win | | | Peter, Tuesday night, my girl (and fellow Justice Democrat) Summer Lee won her primary up in western Pennsylvania, beating out a flood of dark money to win the fight for working people in her home district! Even though Summer faced tons of dark money from billionaires and special interest groups, she won by building a working-class movement. It goes to show that even against super PACs and dark money donors, progressives can fight back and win. Outside special interests across the country are trying to stop movements like ours. They’re scared of working people winning voice and power in the halls of places like Congress because they know that our ideas are popular and will help people. But together, we know we can beat them. Thank you for everything you do, good people! Together, Odessa | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

name: Team Mastriano
subject: Grassroots Gazette, May 20
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO
body:
We did it!
| |
---
Peter, "We did it!" Thank you doesn't seem like enough! This week, our newsletter is a celebratory newsletter with some motivation, pictures, and memes, of course. Please take some time to re-energize and fuel up mentally, emotionally, physically, and spiritually for the road ahead. It is truly an honor to be here with each one of you! What an amazing "family" we have to support Doug and Rebbie. [**Read this week's Grassroots Gazette >>**](http://email.email.doug4gov.com/c/eJxdUMtOwzAQ_Br35sjdxHZyyAEoXBAgDkiUS-R6bdeS81DsgNqvxw2FA9JqpZ3ZHe0MtrViDas3vgUGwDiwrWBsywtRgdEHg4jKggFBKmZ65UOB4-IqN34Weuw3x5aj0roBBF3bpkJW8RIVt1LVVm-F4JvQHlOaIilvCDzk0jgUw6KDWaL1wcSLToaFWhsil6CpNFbQCjinDYCgsm60RH2w1kJec476GBdD62JCS8qHJfVdb9AvPSl365sExAWM4zJrk8FBh071U_D2dKV0HpV3QyZ_rVM3qxjncUyxc-psUjJdr04dsN-bcUhmSD969MZ93D_z9FQvme6G4DET_8Cjx2x9d_8Sopw3c4vTlw_BRyFzoG4N9JLj9bWWyFsCsB4BrJHB_nFQ--ObO79S-Qz03W0vFNzlnk6T-du7ShRX-0Dk7hum0pWa)

name: Kildee, Dan
subject: Our survey closes tonight and I need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dan Kildee
body:
| Hi — I’m heading into a meeting with my team in just a few hours to go over the results of our Supporter Issues Survey. I don’t think I saw your response come through, so I wanted to bump it to the top of your inbox.

Share your thoughts here:

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/2022-spring-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45562267/346477235/-336687945?refcode=DK_EM_SV_1MO_20220520_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjU4NzI5NC03N2Q4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1tglkQTAAkwDhQPHa8fjOaQ-0RycMVztOqnPRHTojw=&emci=e2587294-77d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=eb587294-77d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=31479900)**

_Note: Our records do sometimes take a few days to update, so if you already took our Supporter Issues Survey, thank you, and please disregard this message._

There is so much at stake in this election. The path to protecting the House majority runs straight through __this__ congressional district — which is more competitive than ever before.

That’s why I need to hear from you. Please take our short survey before it closes tonight to tell me what is worrying you the most and what is motivating you to get to the polls this election.

Here’s that link again:

**[https://go.dankildee.com/a/2022-spring-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45562278/346477242/-336687945?refcode=DK_EM_SV_1MO_20220520_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjU4NzI5NC03N2Q4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1tglkQTAAkwDhQPHa8fjOaQ-0RycMVztOqnPRHTojw=&emci=e2587294-77d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=eb587294-77d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=31479900)**

Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts,

Dan

---

* * *
Congressman Dan Kildee – a Flint native – is proud to represent mid-Michigan. As a Democratic party leader, Dan is fighting hard to ensure every American has access to quality health care, clean water and a good-paying job. The path to protect the Democratic majority in the House runs right through the Midwest, and Dan is dedicated to protecting and electing Democratic candidates. But we can’t do it without you! [**Join the team and chip in here to protect our House majority and keep Dan fighting for Michigan in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45562289/346477254/-869271610?amount=20&contactdata=p4vM%2FcYFWIIZLHmIIPYoRRooDwFrNEdY%2FReWGNkig%2BIUuDs8sYHHu8TplBBtp7mz&refcode2=eb587294-77d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&refcode=DK_EM_SV_1MO_20220520_1_4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjU4NzI5NC03N2Q4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=I1tglkQTAAkwDhQPHa8fjOaQ-0RycMVztOqnPRHTojw=)

name: Endorsement Notification
subject: Alexander Vindman

name: Gerrymandering Update (via NDRC)
subject: A.G. Holder is right!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
We’ve accomplished a lot since the NDRC launched in 2017, but we’ve still got more work to do.
|
---

---
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45562357/346477580/-169078196?amount=20&refcode=20220520.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM0NjQ3OTc0LTc3ZDgtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4YzMyZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rz7eE1ZxFsfwiBU0_Rh2uH9gbjVYIFQtd1nSeqI28Zc=)
---
A.G. Holder is right, folks:

We’ve accomplished a _lot_ since the NDRC launched in 2017 with a mission to end Republican gerrymandering. We’ve helped **break GOP supermajorities** in state legislatures, **flip some chambers outright, elect Democratic governors** who fiercely oppose gerrymandered maps, and **support successful fair maps ballot initiatives.**

Some experts have even noted that, thanks in part to our work, the next elections will take place on the fairest maps we’ve seen in a generation. _That’s_ the difference we’ve made together.

But friends, **there’s still more left to do.** In states like Florida, Republicans have ignored the will of the voters entirely to pass manipulated maps despite the fact that fair-map ballot initiatives passed over a decade ago. That’s why we’re getting ready to fight back in the states, in the courts, and at the ballot box this November.

The NDRC and our affiliates have experts on the ground who are doing the hard work needed to end gerrymandering every single day — but that work takes resources, and **we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you** to help us raise what we need to keep up the fight.

**Will you answer A.G. Holder’s call to action and pitch in anything you can right now to help us keep up the fight for fair maps?**

clean_body: We’ve accomplished a lot since the NDRC launched in 2017, but we’ve still got more work to do. | | = A.G. Holder is right, folks: We’ve accomplished a lot since the NDRC launched in 2017 with a mission to end Republican gerrymandering. We’ve helped break GOP supermajorities in state legislatures, flip some chambers outright, elect Democratic governors who fiercely oppose gerrymandered maps, and support successful fair maps ballot initiatives. Some experts have even noted that, thanks in part to our work, the next elections will take place on the fairest maps we’ve seen in a generation. That’s the difference we’ve made together. But friends, there’s still more left to do. In states like Florida, Republicans have ignored the will of the voters entirely to pass manipulated maps despite the fact that fair-map ballot initiatives passed over a decade ago. That’s why we’re getting ready to fight back in the states, in the courts, and at the ballot box this November. The NDRC and our affiliates have experts on the ground who are doing the hard work needed to end gerrymandering every single day — but that work takes resources, and we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us raise what we need to keep up the fight. Will you answer A.G. Holder’s call to action and pitch in anything you can right now to help us keep up the fight for fair maps? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Team NDRC = **= Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Is the Constitution “trash?!"
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTQwLTZjNDdiNWM0YWVlNjQ0ZDI4NjU2NGUzZTU3NTkyNjk3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGlsbHNkYWxlLmVkdS9oaWxsc2RhbGUvc3VwcG9ydC1mZWRlcmFsaXN0LXBhcGVycy8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1mZWRlcmFsaXN0cGFwZXJzJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0ZGTzA1MjAyMDIyJnNjPU1LMTIxRU05In0/T8B9u6w_E81SMOut6bO5_A)

| |
Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is **flawed** , **outdated** , and **incapable** of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: _The Federalist Papers_.
---
| | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, "The Constitution is kind of trash." That's what a guest-with an Ivy League degree-said recently on a highly-rated daytime talk show. You've likely seen how "progressives" in the media, Big Tech, and politics are amplifying attacks on our nation's principles of limited government and personal liberty with outrageous statements like "The Constitution is kind of trash." And like that television pundit I mentioned, they are pushing a narrative that our Constitution is flawed , outdated , and incapable of dealing with the challenges of our time. Thankfully, a few early champions of the Constitution-Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison-gave you and me the perfect guide to understanding its timeless principles: The Federalist Papers. | | Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described them as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." And these documents are just as relevant today as they were back then. If we're serious about solving the current issues in our country, we shouldn't run from them. We should embrace them. That's why I want to send you our entire 10-lesson course, DVD today when you make a tax-deductible donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | "The Federalist Papers" course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. Hillsdale's faculty teach the course, and it will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. These DVDs also make a great gift for someone unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles-maybe even a friend or family member. But supplies are limited. So, be sure to get this special edition of "The Federalist Papers" on DVD today. More than 200,000 people have already taken this course, so this DVD box set won't last long. body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=263%2E5257348%2EFmw6-Y ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, if one thing is clear about the recent Republican
primaries, it’s that Donald Trump’s grip on the Republican Party has never
been stronger.

In Ohio, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania, GOP candidates have stumbled
over each other in contests purely focused on getting Trump’s stamp of
approval. Instead of trying to convince voters that they’re fit to lead,
they’re centering their campaigns on showcasing how they’re more
MAGA-crazed than their opponents.

This isn’t just happening in those states either. The leading GOP
candidate in my own upcoming jungle primary is a QAnon conspiracy theorist
supported by Trump’s cronies Roger Stone and Michael Flynn.

We must keep up the momentum to win the jungle primary and defend our
majorities this November. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220520_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&refcode2=263_5257348_Fmw6-Y&akid=263%2E5257348%2EFmw6-Y ]Chip in today before our critical
get-out-the-vote efforts this weekend.

donation will go through immediately:

The Republican Party is no longer a party. It's a cult of Trump’s
personality. One that poses a grave danger to our democracy — they've
attacked it before, and they will attack it again if we don’t stop them in
their tracks by holding our majorities this November.

With Trump bolstering his support with handpicked candidates, he's laying
the groundwork to ensure that his next assault on our democracy is a
successful one — with extremist pro-Trump Republican majorities in
Congress that will vote to overturn the results of the 2024 election if he
loses.

We can prevent this from happening, but only if we band together and show
up in important moments like this one. My jungle primary is just a few

body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3813%2E3611125%2E_P4SYA ][IMG]

Hey—I need to be brutally honest with you here:

We set some ambitious online fundraising goals for May—enough, in our
estimation, to fight back against the GOP’s attacks as we pivot to the
general election.

But millionaire JD Vance has unlimited resources at his disposal thanks to
Silicon Valley billionaire Peter Thiel and his $15 million super PAC
supporting Vance’s campaign.

And now we’re falling short on our ads budget and at risk of having to
pull down our ads during the worst possible time. I’ll be honest, I’m
losing a lot of sleep over this.

There’s no billionaire bailout headed our way, folks. Instead,
we’re relying on small-dollar donors like you to keep our ads running week
after week, Friday after Friday.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/12923?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3813%2E3611125%2E_P4SYA ]So, can you rush a quick $25 donation to hit our weekly ads goal? If
not, we’ll have to pull our ads off the air and risk getting drowned out
by JD Vance’s far-right nonsense.

clean_body: [ ][IMG] Hey—I need to be brutally honest with you here: We set some ambitious online fundraising goals for May—enough, in our estimation, to fight back against the GOP’s attacks as we pivot to the general election. But millionaire JD Vance has unlimited resources at his disposal thanks to Silicon Valley billionaire Peter Thiel and his $15 million super PAC supporting Vance’s campaign. And now we’re falling short on our ads budget and at risk of having to pull down our ads during the worst possible time. I’ll be honest, I’m losing a lot of sleep over this. There’s no billionaire bailout headed our way, folks. Instead, we’re relying on small-dollar donors like you to keep our ads running week after week, Friday after Friday. [ ]So, can you rush a quick $25 donation to hit our weekly ads goal? If not, we’ll have to pull our ads off the air and risk getting drowned out by JD Vance’s far-right nonsense. [ ]Donate $25 [ ]Donate $50 [ ]Donate $100 [ ]Donate $200 [ ]Donate $250 [ ]Other Amount Thanks for always keeping us going, Dave Chase Campaign Manager Tim Ryan for Ohio [ ][IMG] We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. ---

**_The good news is: we are winning!_** Right now we are in the lead and we are on a good path to winning this primary election and hitting another victory in November.

But in the meantime, we need to deal with this immediate financial pressure and we need all the support we can get to make it through this process smoothly. body:
Biden says I'm not black! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/threeyearsleft-4657413?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | [ ](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d35cb6e876&e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| | Peter, We can't afford 3 more years of Joe Biden.

He is DESTROYING America, for ALL Americans.

In case you missed it, Biden is the racist who says "You ain't black" if you vote for a Republican.

You can watch my response to that here, or by following the image below.
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=d3ef72bbff&e=af4b86f5c6)
**[It is CRITICAL that a Republican majority is gained in the U.S. House. Only five seats are needed to make this happen](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=316b4d0d5f&e=af4b86f5c6). **

I am running to unseat a far-Left Democrat in Virginia. With your support, I can defeat Biden’s puppet, Rep. Elaine Luria.

A red majority is exactly what Americans need right now. With a Conservative majority, Republicans can:
* **STOP Biden’s soaring inflation**
* **Push back against Big Tech’s tyranny**
* **Secure our border security**
* **Strengthen the American Economy by getting the Government out of the way.**

[**Will you take action against the Democrat establishment by donating to my campaign today**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=8965645fce&e=af4b86f5c6)?

My May fundraising deadline is rapidly approaching and with your help, I can prove to the Democrats and fake news media that Americans have had enough of their agenda.

Right now, there is nothing stopping Biden and Pelosi from continuing to undermine the safety and security of American families!

[Rise up and ensure your voice is heard by chipping in as much as you can to my campaign fund](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=64a21dc221&e=af4b86f5c6).

**I will _never_ stop fighting for free speech, the Second Amendment, an end to unconstitutional mandates, increased border security, and the Christian Conservative agenda**.

Let’s work together to take [**BACK**](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=73985e2b4b&e=af4b86f5c6) America from the dirty hands of the Left!
**[$15 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$25 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$50 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$75 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

$100 TO TAKE BACK AMERICA

DONATE ANYTHING TO TAKE BACK AMERICA](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=500c715c99&e=af4b86f5c6)**
Thank you for your support!

Respectfully,

**
Jarome Bell
Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress**

P.S.: With Biden having three years left in office, it is instrumental that Republicans rally together to restore a Republican majority in the House. **[Support me as I run to defeat the far-Left Elaine Luria. It is time to get this country back on track before it’s too late](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=813909b9ac&e=af4b86f5c6)**!

Western North Carolina rejected his extremist views and officially made him a one-term representative. These results were a telling sign that NC-11 is ready for change. We deserve a real leader to represent our values, and that leader is Jasmine. But these next few months won’t be easy by any means. **Cawthorn may have lost, but make no mistake – Jasmine’s new opponent, Republican Chuck Edwards, shares the same extreme political values as Cawthorn.** He is running to continue the political legacy of Mark Meadows and Madison Cawthorn, the last two Republican Congressmen representing WNC. Edwards has refused to call January 6th an insurrection, he’s anti-choice, and he won the GOP primary with dark money and dirty politics. He’s already benefitted from $1.4 million in outside spending to tip the scales in his favor. And just like Cawthorn, Edwards is vulnerable. With all that dark money, and the support of Senator Thom Tillis and the entire NC GOP establishment, Edwards only won three out of fifteen counties, and lost the Election Day vote total. Jasmine is heading into the general election with all the momentum in this race after winning every county in the district and 60% of the vote in the primary. name: Pennsylvania Democrats
subject: Mastriano: "I could decertify every machine in the state with a stroke of a pen."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Peter, here's what will happen if Doug Mastriano becomes the Governor of Pennsylvania.

If he becomes Governor, the 13 million Americans who live in Pennsylvania WILL NOT be able to exercise their right to elect the president in 2024. Why? Because Doug Mastriano gets to appoint our next Secretary of State to do whatever he wants, and Mastriano _bragged_ about how he would decertify the 2024 elections:
_“I get to appoint the Secretary of State, who [controls] the voting logs & everything. I could decertify every machine in the state with a stroke of a pen.”
-Doug Mastriano_
Mastriano has proven time and time again that he is a threat to our democracy. If we want to protect elections for years to come, we need to make sure he does not win in Pennsylvania.

Mastriano was arms-length away from the Capitol door breached in the January 6th insurrection.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PHIL RIZZO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[http://email.mg.jerseyrising.com/c/eJxtTrtuwzAQ-xp7NM6K7mQNGgIEHeq-p3YqbElWZMgPSEqT5utr7wUIkAAJkvrbG4XZ6lN7yZ8vl_b2deU4vr6XYdG7d3vq346Phj-3d53vcWx_Pk6lUVYgN6L0igFjgAxqYqLGCrAhBp3VwgLBYAoOk6tGG5P9jT752VV6mcqzqrlG1LIRAzsQYi-HGmgwnBMwlD2WQZ1zXlNxOBbsYUPKS-ycrdyyuGC71ae9aTOm5NJs4qb--7oHrPHdxsSILAcjCXQDUhKTvDfNUK2zK6My69WH4BOJ7bSbOh_2gT86hlqk] RIZZO QUESTIONS WHICH VERSION OF
TOM KEAN IS RUNNING AMID DEBATE SILENCE
May 20, 2022

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Contact: joanna@theresolute.group [joanna@theresolute.group]

CHESTER, N.J. - It has been two weeks since Phil Rizzo invited Tom Kean to a debate in the NJ-07 Congressional race, offering to
pay the cost of the debate and allow Kean to select the moderator. There has been no response from Kean. The offer was made on
Friday, May 6th via email to Harrison Neely from George Khalaf of the Resolute Group.

“New Jerseyans are facing record inflation, rising costs, high property taxes, education indoctrination, and rising crime rates,”
said Rizzo. “NJ-07’s next congressman will be called on to address those issues and stand up to an increasingly inept and hostile
administration.”

Tom Kean has been in office since 2001 and is the son of former New Jersey Governor Tom Kean Sr.

“Tom Kean has a long and spotty record of leftist positions (RealTomKean.com) giving way to quick conservative pivots - usually
ahead of primary elections,” Rizzo explained. “New Jerseyans deserve to know which version of Tom Kean wants to be their
congressman. And how will they know that if he refuses to step on a debate stage? I believe elected officials are to be held
accountable for their record, not hide from it.”

“We have made the arrangement as comfortable as possible for Tom. Now all that remains is for him to gather the guts to face me
and the voters to tell us who he is. If he can’t do that, how do we expect him to stand up to Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden if he
goes to Washington? If all Tom can do is recite speeches written for him, how could he possibly be qualified to fight for New
Jersey families?”

The New Jersey Primary election is June 7.

###

body:
We have some breaking news...
#

We have some breaking news. The News & Observer just reported that Donald Trump is coming back to North Carolina to rally his MAGA Republican base soon:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220520-1-ma&refcode2=915.357359.0bY8TH&t=1&akid=915%2E357359%2E0bY8TH)
It’s hardly been a month since his last rally in North Carolina with our opponent Ted Budd and Madison Cawthorn, but he’s already coming back.
And we know the truth: Donald Trump keeps coming to this state because he knows it’s one of the biggest and most competitive battlegrounds in the country. The Senate majority hinges on what happens here.
[**If you want to stop Trump’s candidate and expand the majority, then Cheri Beasley needs you today. subject: Come knock doors with Team King on Saturday!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/9ec3be845329/come-knock-doors-with-team-king-on-saturday?e=7bbb93570f)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

We're in the home stretch! Today is the last day of early voting before the primary on Tuesday, May 24th.

**Join Kelvin, Janelle, and Team King TOMORROW, Saturday, May 21st, to knock on doors in the Gainesville area.** We will meet at Curt's Restaurant ([3440 Branch Rd, Flowery Branch, GA 30542](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=935ff8df3f&e=7bbb93570f)) at 9:00am for breakfast with the Kings and some training before we head out.

Sign up for door-knocking [HERE](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=b77018794e&e=7bbb93570f)!

If you have any questions, please let me know. We hope you can join us!

**Sarah Pritchard**
Director of Operations
Kelvin King for US Senate
(404) 401-5500 (cell)
[www.KelvinKing.com](https://gop.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435843e25393f24c78349b03f&id=48eabe030c&e=7bbb93570f)
#WinForAmerica
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friend, We're in the home stretch! Today is the last day of early voting before the primary on Tuesday, May 24th. Join Kelvin, Janelle, and Team King TOMORROW, Saturday, May 21st, to knock on doors in the Gainesville area. We will meet at Curt's Restaurant () at 9:00am for breakfast with the Kings and some training before we head out. Sign up for door-knocking ! If you have any questions, please let me know. We hope you can join us! Sarah Pritchard Director of Operations Kelvin King for US Senate (404) 401-5500 (cell) #WinForAmerica | "Sign Up to Door Knock" | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:kelvin@kelvinking.com | | Our mailing address is: Kelvin King for Georgia, Inc. 2900 Delk Rd, Ste 700, PMB 268 Marietta, GA 30067 Want to change how you receive these emails? Republicans are doubling down on their LGBTQ+ attacks.

More than 300 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across our country.
[ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx082Yzy2VLCdKDLlDWJFArkb5b1ISYoEdXFvWLGmsP0ZNHAa6VcGlfY2QABMO7FMSLmXPW7LriZkrTx7aBCI639tAizX2npHk-me0wvfH0jpg-GhENIaBaShwn-zUQv8qtUVji0iZ5aQm5eoRSrFS7t11HlBfqT2fm_CQAuAVuMPyun5doIm_010c5WRa9FDHULPLTtl_nXywPwkta6d2odZoAALqWmVMU0rfyOWX3M-kYWJLyxYwJ_y-BzX234_gzPhd53_p2wC0ou1yWYDsxY0H2SErSVURbAy-zDEEAKz2-kEKVZqo6r_609-5fAezPlNcUppq1rdv_sPgeMabkZXkMiaBFwdBfVZPTsb1vVfyPda1xNoUVoJakt7ujh-NJXq685EorJH-50PehIggBO4DS9mFgNLuW4loWdNkBqWjleGZNzfBFuGatPLYhlxXLAdclWShjprUHvA6di6SJ01A/3m7/oHqMLMBwQ0aeU_7acRrAlA/h5/aVvp4Z54I-HJqxkHqlXELLI3UZuZv61dGfGKzSUIVqg)

These statistics are heartbreaking and paint a devastating reality: LGBTQ+ rights are at stake and we must do all we can to protect them.

**The best measure we can take to protect LGBTQ+ rights is for the Senate to pass the Equality Act to completely __outlaw__ LGBTQ+ discrimination.**

[So please, will you join 19,999 other pro-LGBTQ+ allies and sign my petition to tell the Senate to pass the Equality Act?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx082Yzy2VLCdKDLlDWJFArkb5b1ISYoEdXFvWLGmsP0ZNHAa6VcGlfY2QABMO7FMSLmXPW7LriZkrTx7aBCI639tAizX2npHk-me0wvfH0jpg-GhENIaBaShwn-zUQv8qtUVji0iZ5aQm5eoRSrFS7t11HlBfqT2fm_CQAuAVuMPyun5doIm_010c5WRa9FDHULPLTtl_nXywPwkta6d2odZoAALqWmVMU0rfyOWX3M-kYUhgjkpqOOd9cbxBk8qxEdPD9Pka0x3u9fNS7kiYyLcQJPU7ij0rZLrApJvK1Xg0SRDkHNgZO7J5haj9EslmKI7s0i61ACqz3LKrYaLD3WKATXmaJzTYoeeDbTf7YUFhYOy7liMC9zu8kTE19mPmjE1l7oHJa3N3KYgbv-tqL5B8-DwvscVEnzDnMvv4MjHjknyrNIcwbM9umSV4k6r47v8ycWWVt_vdTG72a_4UwkepSEBNoSyc4qrSGOWnixPRfFVR2bpGAkPWomGE3r-4iQxW2wRtgdh-7nVtzYz7lpB2f4_03ABPJ3Obu6mhYC9VD/3m7/oHqMLMBwQ0aeU_7acRrAlA/h6/-FZVRca_x-HDWQBUwkRA1QvAViuO4ZLuH1Kw9jnb-ho)
[SIGN MY NAME: PASS THE EQUALITY ACT ➞](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx082Yzy2VLCdKDLlDWJFArkb5b1ISYoEdXFvWLGmsP0ZNHAa6VcGlfY2QABMO7FMSLmXPW7LriZkrTx7aBCI639tAizX2npHk-me0wvfH0jpg-GhENIaBaShwn-zUQv8qtUVji0iZ5aQm5eoRSrFS7t11HlBfqT2fm_CQAuAVuMPyun5doIm_010c5WRa9FDHULPLTtl_nXywPwkta6d2odZoAALqWmVMU0rfyOWX3M-kYUhgjkpqOOd9cbxBk8qxEdPD9Pka0x3u9fNS7kiYyLcQJPU7ij0rZLrApJvK1Xg0SRDkHNgZO7J5haj9EslmKI7s0i61ACqz3LKrYaLD3WKDrDSP00FCAQb1sj6Djn_FYTUHG626E0vIdAwj4EgVTCOB5wDW0BO0aJ_G0ZVFN4aLI-O1sz4WCHdQUIMP609PrlIsWP4MsG_X-ou74s0DVk49-ce5gXYl1838rgk2Y6ML4jq_TxxlbYE7i6cyYjviRS5IpCS9Qp58d2UmdWiSDKQ-aDAmESfrtZUFI_sn9L35D9tSSrb8XLYt9yzXM8ZZA/3m7/oHqMLMBwQ0aeU_7acRrAlA/h7/eE9GfXqvI8GCh6YnKD_2m5ElgcU7XUdrooZ1YrlFSf0)

Since I came to Congress, I’ve fought to protect and expand the rights of the LGBTQ+ community and all Americans.

In a nation built on the values of freedom and liberty for all, no American should be denied equality because of who they love or who they are.

But Republicans are working overtime to erase LGBTQ+ history in the classroom, limit trans patients' rights, and silence the voices of LGBTQ+ Americans across our country. **We must do all we can to stop them.**

[I’m committing right now to doing everything in my power to END discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans and I need you with me. Sign your name to tell the Senate to PASS the Equality Act.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mNlj88T6MQVynMdSsqAx082Yzy2VLCdKDLlDWJFArkb5b1ISYoEdXFvWLGmsP0ZNHAa6VcGlfY2QABMO7FMSLmXPW7LriZkrTx7aBCI639tAizX2npHk-me0wvfH0jpg-GhENIaBaShwn-zUQv8qtUVji0iZ5aQm5eoRSrFS7t11HlBfqT2fm_CQAuAVuMPyun5doIm_010c5WRa9FDHULPLTtl_nXywPwkta6d2odZoAALqWmVMU0rfyOWX3M-kYUhgjkpqOOd9cbxBk8qxEdPD9Pka0x3u9fNS7kiYyLcQJPU7ij0rZLrApJvK1Xg0SRDkHNgZO7J5haj9EslmKI7s0i61ACqz3LKrYaLD3WKCEnwGQANx16q8UOmwbDIcD1SBbBQnkiF4va2otxe8DX92B2KbSfyv_Vmph6Pfyhk42VKGiabbo_pkkL2L-HLieM0j-WyzoIxB4DJOu8zQ-j64yBddonPFQtZ2hdjCX06rAQy61lGmc64WBoAEcQlakroCCBpwVx91FJ7ohW37KJjmAmEWCuYULbqYTNYeCbWyyR8mUgAlES0CZVyqi40W-/3m7/oHqMLMBwQ0aeU_7acRrAlA/h8/vfm9vpoKRwj07simYmRHF9f1bMVkbnA_f59pxWuvvdA)

**_Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz:_**

I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |

Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right.

**As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities.**

**_But I need you in this fight with me:_**
