clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | Republicans are doubling down on their LGBTQ+ attacks. More than 300 anti-LGBTQ+ bills have been introduced across our country. These statistics are heartbreaking and paint a devastating reality: LGBTQ+ rights are at stake and we must do all we can to protect them. The best measure we can take to protect LGBTQ+ rights is for the Senate to pass the Equality Act to completely outlaw LGBTQ+ discrimination. Since I came to Congress, I’ve fought to protect and expand the rights of the LGBTQ+ community and all Americans. In a nation built on the values of freedom and liberty for all, no American should be denied equality because of who they love or who they are. But Republicans are working overtime to erase LGBTQ+ history in the classroom, limit trans patients' rights, and silence the voices of LGBTQ+ Americans across our country. We must do all we can to stop them. In solidarity, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? subject: Let’s keep this momentum up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

It’s been a big week for us,
Peter.

FIRST: Charles won his primary and was elected as the official Democratic
Senate nominee. He became the first Black person in the history of
Kentucky to represent a major party for Senate.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18050?refcode=em20220520-1950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV ][IMG]

THEN: Progressive leaders like Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren
celebrated this victory. They know if we want to deliver meaningful change
to working families across the country – Charles is the leader we need in
the Senate.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18050?refcode=em20220520-1950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV ][IMG]

SO NOW: We’re working to make sure this momentum continues to grow every
day until Election day. If this energy keeps going, we have the grassroots
power to send Charles to the Senate. 🔥

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18050?refcode=em20220520-1950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV ]Will you chip in $5 right now and we’ll put your name
down as a #FoundingDonor of our people-powered campaign? We’re relying on
grassroots donations to make sure we have the power this election to
replace Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18050?refcode=em20220520-1950&amp%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18050?refcode=em20220520-1950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV ]Chip in $5 →

The truth is a lot of people don’t think that change in Kentucky is
possible.

But this week has been proof that the naysayers are wrong: Kentuckians are
hungry for change. The people chose Charles as the Democratic nominee and
folks are rising up to make sure we end this failed chapter of leadership
under Rand Paul.

We’ve begun the hard work of building a campaign that will take back the
people’s seat back from Rand Paul. We’re building coalitions in every
corner of our commonwealth. We’re talking with and listening to our
neighbors. And we’re powering this work from everyday folks like
you, Peter.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18050?refcode=em20220520-1950&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV ]It’s not too late to become a Founding Donor of our campaign. Please
chip in any amount you can afford, and you’ll be counted as one of the
earliest supporters of our movement.

Let’s get to work,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220520-1950-footer&t=1025&refcode2=1950_346206_fuXwcV&akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1950%2E346206%2EfuXwcV

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

I'll be in touch soon,

Will Rollins

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Max?=
subject: Son of Educators
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f238a4d5850f/son-of-educators?e=1669180a05)
---
| |
---
| |
# SON OF EDUCATORS
---
| **I am the child of educators.** My mom taught in the DC Public Schools and in the Fairfax County Public Schools and my father was a staff member of the Education Committee in the U.S. Congress. Having seen the plight of low-income students in DC's public schools, my parents founded a private Christian school in Southeast, DC twenty-two years ago to provide a rigorous, faith-based education for those in greatest need. They served full-time in that school for the last seven years -- my father as Principal and my mother as Director of Education. My mom homeschooled me and my three sisters all the way through high school. I have seen, firsthand, the importance of education, the crisis in our public schools, and the difference a good school and a good homeschool mom can make in the lives of students.

Because the school my parents founded was a part of the federal school choice voucher program, I have seen the difference giving parents power over their children's education funding can make! **All parents should have control over their portion of federal education dollars.**

clean_body: | | | | | | | SON OF EDUCATORS | I am the child of educators. My mom taught in the DC Public Schools and in the Fairfax County Public Schools and my father was a staff member of the Education Committee in the U.S. Congress. Having seen the plight of low-income students in DC's public schools, my parents founded a private Christian school in Southeast, DC twenty-two years ago to provide a rigorous, faith-based education for those in greatest need. They served full-time in that school for the last seven years -- my father as Principal and my mother as Director of Education. My mom homeschooled me and my three sisters all the way through high school. I have seen, firsthand, the importance of education, the crisis in our public schools, and the difference a good school and a good homeschool mom can make in the lives of students. Because the school my parents founded was a part of the federal school choice voucher program, I have seen the difference giving parents power over their children's education funding can make! name: Bill de Blasio
subject: I’m running for Congress, but I cannot do it alone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by De Blasio for Congress
body:
I am writing to let you know that I have decided to run for Congress in the newly-created New York 10th Congressional District.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45563865/346484765/1246564788?refcode=em-logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzMyMzY0OS03ZmQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmztWr17fLzFteqzX6AtUYfeeCacEBzPP4E1AcFC_yA=)
Team -
I am writing to let you know that I have decided to run for Congress in the newly-created New York 10th Congressional District.
And today, I am asking you to join me in what will be a grassroots campaign powered by people who believe we need a Congress that prioritizes reducing inequality, expanding access to education for our children, fighting climate change, and protecting our democracy.
Now, no one person can run for Congress and win by themselves. It takes a team, and I need you on it. So I am asking:
[**Will you please become a day one donor to my campaign to serve as the representative for New York’s new 10th Congressional District?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45563866/346484766/-2012515610?refcode=em-220520-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzMyMzY0OS03ZmQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmztWr17fLzFteqzX6AtUYfeeCacEBzPP4E1AcFC_yA=)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45563867/346484767/-2012515610?refcode=em-220520-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzMyMzY0OS03ZmQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmztWr17fLzFteqzX6AtUYfeeCacEBzPP4E1AcFC_yA=)**
Everywhere I go, people ask me if things can get better. They are hurting, need help fast, and don’t believe we can elect a Congress that can get the job done for working people.
I’ve heard that before.
When I was elected Mayor of New York City, people said it’d be impossible to pass Pre-K for All.
Today, nearly 70,000 children enjoy Pre-K as a universal right, and 40,000 more take part in 3-K across all 32 community school districts, putting money back into the pockets of parents who need it.
They said it would be impossible to dramatically reduce the use of stop-and-frisk, make the most ambitious investments in affordable housing in the history of New York City, and reduce crime to record low levels.
And maybe most exceptionally, they said defying national trends and reducing inequality in New York City of all places would be impossible.
But we did it. All of it. Together.
I am very proud of that record, and you should be too. Now it’s time to take our case to Congress.
This new district includes almost all of my old City Council district and areas we did very well in during both of my mayoral campaigns.
It includes a number of working and middle class communities that have been hit hard by COVID and need help now.
I am ready to serve the people of my community. The place I love.
But I cannot do it alone. No one person can. So I am asking:
[**Can you please make a donation — of any amount you can afford — to my campaign to serve as the representative for New York’s new 10th Congressional District? Become a day one donor today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45563868/346484768/-2012515610?refcode=em-220520-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzMyMzY0OS03ZmQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmztWr17fLzFteqzX6AtUYfeeCacEBzPP4E1AcFC_yA=)
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45563869/346484769/-2012515610?refcode=em-220520-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS83NTExNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzMyMzY0OS03ZmQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mmztWr17fLzFteqzX6AtUYfeeCacEBzPP4E1AcFC_yA=)**
Thank you in advance for chipping in. Especially on day one.
In solidarity,
Bill de Blasio

**** ****

Paid for by De Blasio for Congress

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/cWyFI6VmGkelGffS8wK0-w2?unsubscribedata=%2FeG5SjYfJiTTRDmka7cHd0nJBcO627RpU6NQcujvwUvObS6sq%2BtRTDcHE7IavJ5q15URd65gTCO4eh8uRvjhoVPbVeEspgZIMr9R3OnsO9ECSG6M0kFkl0%2F7DxXCnLD5c%2BV1dQ9ckjDckfWk7OCH1OMsydTGYWrb3F5g1tKLlCVZbH97ry%2B5Vi6zpeGsEEIIOjBiOsuSap4w52Z%2FAgHUXmvILdNQu5EV7UHdMhsMSeHVKttjXhHRqat%2BQn9IVALKxfV5IYaEUyP73yjHa64xfn%2B%2FpIoBy3Ick1zWyMUiQloDi4ebehzigGLKISQtyvy7ConFFEznA0yZHSHflW6fIlvgJSA3SrKil6NUpWcGPVdtndbURaCWy22ym4GGzNv9ZKzyGzosJEcaMg3MZIZFW2jj59Eulwecek07t8Xg4%2FKIs36V3PMwf%2F6hBTqLhI9p), but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

clean_body: Peter, none of these candidates are fit to represent us » | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. = Peter — With voting already underway in California, we wanted to take a moment to expose what our campaign is up against. First, a quick reminder: Phil Arballo is the only working family Democrat in this race who will fight for what’s best for CA-13.= | = Peter, this is who we’re battling in this closely-watched race: Opponent #1: This “Democrat” is the Joe Manchin of California — really. He just released an ad bragging about how he’ll REFUSE to stand with Speaker Pelosi in the House! Opponent #2: A proud America-First MAGA Republican. Our communities have suffered for decades under Devin Nunes’s rule — we don’t need another Trump crony representing us! Opponent #3: Yet another Nunes clone conservative. Need we say more? We hope it’s crystal clear now, Peter: None of our opponents are fit to represent CA-13! But this race is heating up, and we need all hands on deck to get Phil’s grassroots message out there — from yard signs to TV ads and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Let's do this together, — Team Arballo | Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign! Message & data rates may apply. | Paid for by Arballo For Congress P.O. Box 3406, Fresno, CA 93650 www.philarballo.com Phil Arballo is a Latino, a Central Valley native, a father, and a husband. And he's running for Congress in California. Phil is a champion for real working families and will fight to protect health care access, keep guns out of the wrong hands, and stand up to traitorous Republicans who are working to ruin our Democracy. One more thing: MAGA Republicans are desperate to win this race. Make no mistake: redistricting has made this district the most competitive it's been in decades, but we need every good Democrat to step up and do their part to beat them. name: Georgette =?iso-8859-1?b?R/NtZXo=?=
subject: Our big secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
I spent 12 years as an community organizer taking on the corporations polluting our neighborhoods — and I learned a really important lesson in that time.
Corporations and special interests have a lot of money and a lot of influence. But nothing is more powerful than a group of people coming together to work toward a shared goal.
Corporate interests don't want to protect their workers. Big Oil doesn't want clean energy solutions or expanded public transportation. The GOP doesn't want to support the working families who are most impacted by their regressive policies.
That's why those groups are funding my opponent -- not me.
I'll always fight for what the PEOPLE want — not special interests.
Even a little bit can make a big difference before my final fundraising deadline tomorrow. Will you help us show the strength of our grassroots movement in our finance reports by donating? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052022_OneDay]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052022_OneDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052022_OneDay]
Thank you!
-- Georgette
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052022_OneDay [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052022_OneDay]
http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly [http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly] http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80 [http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80] https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us.
Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race.
Can you give now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_Footer]
Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884

5445 Madison Avenue
Sacramento, CA 95841
United States

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Arizona, Florida, Ohio, Pennsylvania, North Carolina…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
With the control of the Senate on the line, here’s something you need to know:
#
Derek —
With the control of the Senate on the line, here’s something you need to know:
In the last non-presidential election year, VoteVets was one of the leading outside spending organizations. We were right there with groups like the Chamber of Commerce and Americans for Prosperity.
Now what you might not know is that the overwhelming majority of our donations come from people giving individual donations.
Now think about these states: Arizona, Florida, Ohio, Pennsylvania, North Carolina...
All states where we can run ads most progressive groups can’t.
And we will. But we can’t do it alone. So we have to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today to help us ensure Mitch McConnell never becomes Majority Leader again?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-senate?refcode=em220520-1-15&t=1&refcode2=5856_3013755_YGLIOB&akid=5856%2E3013755%2EYGLIOB)
| [CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vv-pac-senate?refcode=em220520-1-15&t=2&refcode2=5856_3013755_YGLIOB&akid=5856%2E3013755%2EYGLIOB)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

THE BIG DAY
FIREHOUSE PRIMARY
SATURDAY, MAY 21
9 AM TO 4 PM
VOTE FOR CALEB MAX

The 10th CD Republican Committee has selected a party run process for selecting our Republican Congressional Candidate to challenge Nancy Pelosi's friend, Democrat Jennifer Wexton. The party canvass, often called a "firehouse or mini- primary" is an extremely simple process. Here is a link on my website about how to vote: [https://www.maxforvirginia.com/how-to-vote](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8knhuqmo8Pc-PHNyoLlDzfhDtsuHzfEw6TPeB6Ez9-kxv9CMMp8Msk8IGadSeHSgKOASx7q1D7bRyf10AQWa5QIfrEqLzUOFgVOQoc9MeyRIak_0wHmrIrmE=&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==)

* Please show up at the designated voting location in your county (this probably will not be where you normally vote) on May 21st between 9 and 4. You will find the 11 voting locations below and not in Loudoun and Prince William, that certain Magisterial Districts have designated voting locations (see [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8kryRv8lIkbyWZCmLmyp3zVDFElixmQHg0V6oFjKawfYA1f5A_CeiDVE_jZsA_LFUtRQ0URcSIoHtCWn4xivnPPiQFIGaowjrXnEjg8M1UQ87RhR_1g7cWDo=&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==) for exact precincts in Loudoun, Prince William and Fairfax counties):

| SOME HELPFUL TIPS ON THE VOTING PROCESS IN THE 10TH
---
| | |
---|---
|
What is "ranked choice voting"?

Simply put, you the voter, will rank your candidate(s) in order of personal preference, from first to last. The winning candidate must garner 50% plus 1 of the vote in order to secure the nomination. If no candidate receives 50% plus 1 after the first round, the candidate with the least votes is eliminated, and voters' second choice selections are distributed among the remaining candidates, and so on each round, until a winner with 50% plus 1 or more votes is declared and becomes the 10th CD's Republican Nominee to challenge and WIN against the left wing progressive Jennifer Wexton.

Strategies to help your favorite candidate(s):

Do's

1) Do limit your vote to one candidate if that's the only one you support. (Voting for down ballot candidates will only dilute your support for your first choice).

2) Do vote for each and every candidate you like (if more than one) as second, third, fourth, etc candidates' votes are counted in each subsequent round(s).

3) Do vote Caleb Max as your 1st Choice and clearly circle your choice.

4) Do bring a PHOTO ID with you.

Do Not

1) Don't rank any one candidate multiple times as this will result in your ballot being discarded.

2) Don't list a candidate(s) on your ballot that you do not support because down ballot rankings grow in significance as candidates are eliminated and subsequent voting round(s) occur.

3) Don't forget to vote.

4) AND please tell us if you have voted. This helps us organize and contact only supporters that may have forgotten that Saturday was the day to vote.

Thank you!
|

| As we come out the coronavirus outbreak that was originated in China (and the Chinese Communist Party have still failed to come clean), I am surprised how some of our first responders and healthcare providers have been treated by our government.
Watch as I speak with three local heroes, nurses, telling their stories of layoffs because of Biden policies and an assault on their religious beliefs. One nurse is two times the Nurse of Year. This unconstitutional attack on religious freedom must be stopped.
---
| THE MAX FAMILY EDUCATION IS A BIG PART OF MY LIFE
---
|
---
|
---
| I am the child of educators. My mom taught in the DC Public Schools and in the Fairfax County Public Schools and my father was a staff member of the Education Committee in the U.S. Congress. Having seen the plight of low-income students in DC's public schools, my parents founded a private Christian school in Southeast, DC twenty-two years ago to provide a rigorous, faith-based education for those in greatest need. They served full-time in that school for the last seven years -- my father as Principal and my mother as Director of Education. My mom homeschooled me and my three sisters all the way through high school.
I have seen, firsthand, the importance of education, the crisis in our public schools, and the difference a good school and a good homeschool parent can make in the lives of students.
Because the school my parents founded was a part of the federal school choice voucher program, I have seen the difference giving parents power over their children's education funding can make! All parents should have control over their portion of federal education dollars.
---
|

| Country. Community. Common Sense.
---
| | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8kgTEKRfGJAv0aYBk5bK0Mgx8RG5ZepCDGxk4B5ymylB7_6ka3fqfRaF24fHsQlPi7XOOmOrj-tqWBbTn-kE7w86FXBwlJsnF_wzxi6tV0T5L&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==) |
---|---
|
My campaign is focused on Country, Community and Common Sense.

Country means ensuring that the United States remains an economic and military leader that stands as a beacon of hope for freedom seeking people around the world. Community is supporting the growth of the 10th District's dynamic economy and many small businesses and local organizations, which are the foundation of our society. And Common Sense is an understanding that we cannot continue with the fiscal irresponsibility of the past and must make the hardworking families of this district our main priority. Right now, working Americans suffer from the highest inflation rate in decades.

I look forward to standing up to the Biden Administration and Jennifer Wexton's failed policies which hurt every working family in the 10th Congressional District. As the Republican candidate, we will win in November, flip the House of Representatives from blue to red, and put government back to work for the hardworking families and business owners who call the 10th District home.

| Lifelong Loudoun County resident and business owner, Caleb was recently recognized by the [Loudoun Times 40 under 40](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8kvMjOph1b7Ui-rctQMkPIgeaM9C-X4epiR1J6zEx5fgmNPapI9Sdc9hMRCUNvWsO3mdplbjvge3mJUSonNDvWJ4wwtK5f-fN9G7p6SjzrrOWylEZpZUB5ZSN68ncRkV3XZl3tokfkV2_GuuQ01wQiD5ZQCuiM5Ya1GuBIJwFFu88zYedg9g7Vy3iAMj4nFKUiSmwO_JG60CgendjjfIlTNdztZu2LIHusg==&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==) as a business and community leader. He founded one of Western Loudoun's largest landscaping companies and is the grandson of former US [Representative Frank Wolf](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8kgTEKRfGJAv0hI-PTBC_tqi__uv1HGXkNJF4Rv_hQQhC0Xj3UhUAp_i0npuL2b-ORIFUIN6m2aHkoUprvZyQwtvMErZcvCxiEHSnTMxKtXNAWDDDua8G669tw0hIu28I8-1SZlSRLFJv&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==) who served the 10th Congressional District for 34 years, having been first elected in 1980.
Caleb continued his entrepreneurial activities with the purchase of the Pica Deli in Reston and the establishment of his home, a 40 head cattle beef farm, in Round Hill. He grew up as an active member of 4H in Loudoun County and is a member of the Virginia Farm Bureau and Blue Ridge Cattlemen's Association.
Like his grandfather, Caleb is passionate about the international human rights movement. He founded a national, bipartisan non-profit organization called the [Athenai Institute](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8kvMjOph1b7Ui8wYNJew9IK4TBvG7AdeEMJjFZ5dDc_2kVjU3jbc0dGnp4R7U2hgW5uC6g3Mx1CKB5Ud_77AVZ7M=&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==) and joined in starting Stand Against Chinese Communism (SACC). Both organizations are working to eliminate Chinese Communist Party influence on our college campuses. Caleb has taken a specific interest in fighting the genocide of the Uyghur Muslims and recently was recognized by the Virginia Muslim Association for his assistance to the Afghan refugee and Muslim community after President Biden's botched and deadly withdrawal from Afghanistan.
Caleb is ready to fight for you and all the citizens of the 10th Congressional District!! Go to the Max for Virginia [website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001623nxUAUS4TfwidNv4DnLfju-K35pfG4a5QBEdLw8zJaQxd7Ftj8kgTEKRfGJAv0aYBk5bK0Mgx8RG5ZepCDGxk4B5ymylB7_6ka3fqfRaF24fHsQlPi7XOOmOrj-tqWBbTn-kE7w86FXBwlJsnF_wzxi6tV0T5L&c=T9jmS2cPN7qZeUt9RukhdiKGED9hjRO2rWkkrHT3PZt-4ryxt3k6qQ==&ch=3456htByA83Mdjf6H-8kwwWQ8-WNljE93ckFZjsY341i_UVDp6fVSA==) and sign up to join the Max Impact Team!!

VOTE, VOLUNTEER AND CALL 5 FRIENDS! | | | THE BIG DAY FOR THE MAX IMPACT TEAM VOLUNTEER: If you have time to help on Saturday for the Firehouse Primary, please sign up below or email mailto:Scheduler@MaxforVirginia.com One of the Max Impact Team Leaders will contact you with details. VOTE: All the hard work for Caleb comes down to tomorrow! Please follow the link below on how and where to vote. Thank you! | | | == | | THANK YOU !! FROM MEET & GREETS, TO GOP EVENTS, TO ENDORSEMENTS, THANK YOU FOR ALL YOUR SUPPORT. | | | | | ---|--- | WE ARE BLESSED WITH MANY OUTSTANDING REPUBLICAN CANDIDATES IN THE 10TH CD. NO MATTER THE OUTCOME, I KNOW WE WILL ALL STAND TOGETHER TO BRING OUR COUNTRY BACK TO NORMALCY. THANK YOU AND MAY GOD BLESS YOU AND YOUR FAMILY. | | | | | == | ---|--- | HOW AND WHERE TO VOTE SATURDAY Scan the Code or == THE BIG DAY FIREHOUSE PRIMARY SATURDAY, MAY 21 9 AM TO 4 PM VOTE FOR CALEB MAX The 10th CD Republican Committee has selected a party run process for selecting our Republican Congressional Candidate to challenge Nancy Pelosi's friend, Democrat Jennifer Wexton. The party canvass, often called a "firehouse or mini- primary" is an extremely simple process. Here is a link on my website about how to vote: == Please show up at the designated voting location in your county (this probably will not be where you normally vote) on May 21st between 9 and 4. You will find the 11 voting locations below and not in Loudoun and Prince William, that certain Magisterial Districts have designated voting locations (see == for exact precincts in Loudoun, Prince William and Fairfax counties): FAIRFAX COUNTY Clifton Town Hall, 12641 Chapel Road, Clifton, VA 20124 FAUQUIER COUNTY Fauquier High School, 705 Waterloo Road, Warrenton, VA 20186 LOUDOUN COUNTY Loudoun Valley High School, 340 N Maple Ave, Purcellville, VA 20132 (Leesburg and Catoctin Districts and selected Blue Ridge precincts) Broad Run High School, 21670 Ashburn Rd, Ashburn, VA 20147 (Algonkian, Ashburn and Broad Run Districts) Mercer Middle School, 42149 Greenstone Dr, Aldie, VA 20105 (Dulles and Sterling Districts and selected Blue Ridge precincts) CITY OF MANASSAS Grace E. Metz Middle School, 9950 Wellington Rd, Manassas, VA 20110 MANASSAS PARK Manassas Park Community Center, 99 Adams St, Manassas Park, VA 20111 PRINCE WILLIAM COUNTY Bull Run Middle School, 6308 Catharpin Road, Gainesville, VA, 20155 (Gainesville District) Gainesville Middle School, 8001 Limestone Dr, Gainesville, VA 20155 (Brentsville District) Lake Jackson Vol. Fire Department, 11310 Coles Dr, Manassas, VA 20112 (Coles and Occoquan Districts) RAPPAHANNOCK COUNTY Rappahannock Co. Elem. School, 34 Schoolhouse Rd, Washington, VA 22747 Present your ID to verify you are a registered voter. The ballot will have you rank your choices, mark CALEB MAX as your first choice. Submit your ballot and you may leave...simple. Bring your friends and family and have them vote for Caleb Max! . | SOME HELPFUL TIPS ON THE VOTING PROCESS IN THE 10TH | | | ---|--- | What is "ranked choice voting"? Simply put, you the voter, will rank your candidate(s) in order of personal preference, from first to last. The winning candidate must garner 50% plus 1 of the vote in order to secure the nomination. If no candidate receives 50% plus 1 after the first round, the candidate with the least votes is eliminated, and voters' second choice selections are distributed among the remaining candidates, and so on each round, until a winner with 50% plus 1 or more votes is declared and becomes the 10th CD's Republican Nominee to challenge and WIN against the left wing progressive Jennifer Wexton. Strategies to help your favorite candidate(s): Do's 1) Do limit your vote to one candidate if that's the only one you support. (Voting for down ballot candidates will only dilute your support for your first choice). 2) Do vote for each and every candidate you like (if more than one) as second, third, fourth, etc candidates' votes are counted in each subsequent round(s). 3) Do vote Caleb Max as your 1st Choice and clearly circle your choice. 4) Do bring a PHOTO ID with you. Do Not 1) Don't rank any one candidate multiple times as this will result in your ballot being discarded. 2) Don't list a candidate(s) on your ballot that you do not support because down ballot rankings grow in significance as candidates are eliminated and subsequent voting round(s) occur. 3) Don't forget to vote. 4) AND please tell us if you have voted. This helps us organize and contact only supporters that may have forgotten that Saturday was the day to vote. Thank you! | | Protect Our Nurses! | == | As we come out the coronavirus outbreak that was originated in China (and the Chinese Communist Party have still failed to come clean), I am surprised how some of our first responders and healthcare providers have been treated by our government. Watch as I speak with three local heroes, nurses, telling their stories of layoffs because of Biden policies and an assault on their religious beliefs. One nurse is two times the Nurse of Year. This unconstitutional attack on religious freedom must be stopped. | THE MAX FAMILY EDUCATION IS A BIG PART OF MY LIFE | | | I am the child of educators. My mom taught in the DC Public Schools and in the Fairfax County Public Schools and my father was a staff member of the Education Committee in the U.S. Congress. Having seen the plight of low-income students in DC's public schools, my parents founded a private Christian school in Southeast, DC twenty-two years ago to provide a rigorous, faith-based education for those in greatest need. They served full-time in that school for the last seven years -- my father as Principal and my mother as Director of Education. My mom homeschooled me and my three sisters all the way through high school. I have seen, firsthand, the importance of education, the crisis in our public schools, and the difference a good school and a good homeschool parent can make in the lives of students. Because the school my parents founded was a part of the federal school choice voucher program, I have seen the difference giving parents power over their children's education funding can make! All parents should have control over their portion of federal education dollars. | | Country. Community. Common Sense. | | == | ---|--- | My campaign is focused on Country, Community and Common Sense. Country means ensuring that the United States remains an economic and military leader that stands as a beacon of hope for freedom seeking people around the world. Community is supporting the growth of the 10th District's dynamic economy and many small businesses and local organizations, which are the foundation of our society. And Common Sense is an understanding that we cannot continue with the fiscal irresponsibility of the past and must make the hardworking families of this district our main priority. Right now, working Americans suffer from the highest inflation rate in decades. I look forward to standing up to the Biden Administration and Jennifer Wexton's failed policies which hurt every working family in the 10th Congressional District. As the Republican candidate, we will win in November, flip the House of Representatives from blue to red, and put government back to work for the hardworking families and business owners who call the 10th District home. | | | == | | Learn More About Caleb | | Lifelong Loudoun County resident and business owner, Caleb was recently recognized by the == as a business and community leader. subject: I am sick and tired of Marco Rubio telling women what to do – which is why we must fight.

body:
I'm angry, friend
| | |
---
When I decided to start a family, I didn't ask my governor's permission.

I didn't ask my congressman's permission.

I dang on sure DID NOT ask my _senator's_ permission to start a family.

That intimate, personal decision was made between my husband, Jerry, and _me._
And yet here we are, with men like Marco Rubio trying to tell women what to do – trying to tell women how they should handle their own personal health care choices or when they should start a family.**Let me tell you something, friend: **
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45564670/346487901/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDE3M2Q4NS04MGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNR4sOWhzZqpoQFCJqmrtAYiHZrcnVnDceE5YqZejtQ=)
I'm angry, friend. Angry that extremist conservatives like Rubio have conspired for nearly 50 years to pack the Supreme Court with conservative justices who are about to take away our right to choose. Angry that Rubio and every last Republican senator blocked Democratic efforts to codify _Roe v. Wade _into law.
If you're angry too, here's what we've got to do: **Turn our anger into action. **Let our anger fuel our efforts to make the change we need to protect our right to choose – starting with kicking anti-choice extremists like Rubio out of the Senate and expanding our pro-choice majority.

**When I'm in the Senate, I won't let anything stand in the way of protecting reproductive rights. Not the filibuster, not out-of-touch ideologues on the court, nothing!**
**[I need your help to get there. Marco Rubio and the GOP are viciously attacking me as polling shows us statistically tied. Please, will you make a donation of $5 – or whatever you can spare today – to elect me as Florida's next U.S. Senator and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45564671/346487902/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDE3M2Q4NS04MGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNR4sOWhzZqpoQFCJqmrtAYiHZrcnVnDceE5YqZejtQ=)**
| | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45564672/346487903/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDE3M2Q4NS04MGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WNR4sOWhzZqpoQFCJqmrtAYiHZrcnVnDceE5YqZejtQ=)
---
In moments like this when things are so dire, **we MUST summon the courage to fight with EVERYTHING we have**. That's what I intend to do. And with your support, we will win.

Thank you,

Val Demings

clean_body: I'm angry, friend | | | When I decided to start a family, I didn't ask my governor's permission. I didn't ask my congressman's permission. I dang on sure DID NOT ask my senator's permission to start a family. That intimate, personal decision was made between my husband, Jerry, and me. And yet here we are, with men like Marco Rubio trying to tell women what to do – trying to tell women how they should handle their own personal health care choices or when they should start a family.Let me tell you something, friend: = I'm angry, friend. Angry that extremist conservatives like Rubio have conspired for nearly 50 years to pack the Supreme Court with conservative justices who are about to take away our right to choose. Angry that Rubio and every last Republican senator blocked Democratic efforts to codify Roe v. Wade into law. If you're angry too, here's what we've got to do: Turn our anger into action. Let our anger fuel our efforts to make the change we need to protect our right to choose – starting with kicking anti-choice extremists like Rubio out of the Senate and expanding our pro-choice majority. When I'm in the Senate, I won't let anything stand in the way of protecting reproductive rights. Not the filibuster, not out-of-touch ideologues on the court, nothing! = | | = In moments like this when things are so dire, we MUST summon the courage to fight with EVERYTHING we have. That's what I intend to do. And with your support, we will win. Thank you, Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. | Peter, it’s Josh Shapiro here — Democratic nominee for Pennsylvania Governor.

I asked to reach out to you because Doug Mastriano — the most extreme candidate running for Governor in the country — just became the GOP nominee running against me in Pennsylvania.

Mastriano would ban abortion with no exceptions. He’d end no-excuse vote by mail, and rip away our freedoms. He participated in the insurrection at our nation’s Capitol. When police told him to stop, he defied them. He crossed their barricades.

But despite all that, this race is going to be close. Elections analysts have declared the Pennsylvania Governor’s race a Toss Up — which means that having the resources to persuade and turn out every voter we can will make the difference in winning or losing.

Thank you for being on this journey with me, Josh Shapiro Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. If you would like to receive fewer emails, | | ---|--- Susan Wild represents Pennsylvania's 7th District in Congress. She believes we can grow overall economic prosperity while still caring for the vulnerable members of our community. And she knows, now more than ever, it's working-class families that deserve a break in this economy — not big city billionaires and wealthy corporations. Susan's campaign runs on grassroots donations. =** = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

Peter, If you have not done so, please take a moment to listen to my [recent interview with Lynn Ketelsen](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VVp_SL4wgpvkW8PG2yF3L9XnQW31NlPp4Kjy4rN8yKgBQ5nKv5V3Zsc37CgPl2Vh26QJ94t6kpW4W_qbs1qGxRmW2jHCt_5s3KDDW1_C-CZ8ZwgH3N26w3WC97bVBVPT9Vx5CznqJW1YmH5w8bwmCbW1lb6bY6wRwfQW1GGVn517T3cPW8Kt4j_6ZFN6_W1j49Bq7kF-L6W2DYy2G8_ZhLHW85TvTW89cJ9zW56qj5m1SVQtNW7KXsfT4lZV8SW21S1L898qYVmW7RxHvC31DF9qW8qrhhQ2cRwGDW5wJkq734ztx8W4C5-h31znF8TW5hfBjW7-QHZKW4hnghx2QlSCNW68FPm19lMz2FW7RNwB68zp-jdVstYZd1MXXDTW3fVTMh8qfXKJW333HwB9fVLgjW6BFjZc9b0dlkW1407976l6LNhW3HFgHp62gdWdW3XVRPJ2XbQ7TW34NnlH7tBKM63bZT1) of the Linder Farm Network in which I discuss real issues we face as a Country. While my opponents and their supporters are hurling accusations and attacking each other, I believe you want your member of Congress to be open, accessible, meet with voters face-to-face and propose actual solutions to our country's challenges. In contrast, my opponent, Jeremy Munson, has made it clear he will join the House Freedom Caucus, a small group of hardline members who have advocated uncompromising positions that will hurt our district. One example is Freedom Caucus members voting against the farm bill in 2018. In contrast, I will be a conservative who sticks to my principles, but not to the blatant detriment of the interests of the district. That’s just common-sense legislating. The priorities of our next member of Congress should align with our own. I am the candidate with actual experience in DC working on farm bill issues, experience I have used for 25 years in our communities. I will use those lessons learned to help our families, farmers, small businesses, and communities thrive. This election presents First District voters the opportunity to fill Jim Hagedorn’s seat with a conservative problem solver. I respectfully ask for your vote as a candidate with the experience and work ethic needed to proudly defend the views and values of southern Minnesotans. In the Linder Farm Network interview, I talk about the unique opportunity this election presents to fill Jim Hagedorn’s seat with a pragmatic problem solver. I hope you agree with me that I am the only one in this race with the experience needed to find real solutions to put our economy back on track. Please vote on May 24th for the only candidate with the experience and demeanor needed to find real solutions for southern Minnesota. Matt
---

---|---|---

name: Brian Mast
subject: Hung Cao is the fighter we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress
body:
I’m proud to endorse Hung Cao for Virginia’s 10th District. But if we’re going to get this American hero over the finish line, I need your help.*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | |
---
| Peter,
I lost two legs serving in Afghanistan when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me. I don’t regret a minute of my service because it was always in pursuit of protecting the American Dream. Hung Cao's life story is exactly the American Dream I fought to protect. Hung’s family was set to be executed in Communist Vietnam when they came to America. He never took his freedom for granted, so he dedicated his life to service from the Naval Academy to Special Ops in the most dangerous corners of the world. America needs leaders who understand the dangers of the far Left’s socialism, and Hung knows better than most how ugly it can be. He knows that Democracy is ALWAYS worth the fight - because he’s seen how dangerous the world is without it. **This weekend, Hung is facing an 11-way tooth-and-nail primary in one of the most competitive districts in America. ****[I’m reaching out to you personally because we need more veterans in Congress that know what it means to serve.](http://links.hungforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=a2271ca9a3004a03829f2b7b415223cc&_e=xsV1k6slsKi_eLRrYr4lGvE2cufaZHVLLQx-YoN-CUM8dAOygBIaHwTwZtxDtoG0KCw3X5jJxgLFedRpig37-YUvQGPFWWWb0UuMrL2101CtHDfAS_gQ4L7TclkSyA0sEDomuMz2-qJmFkRXEI5FcI5m541bPP4cycz7LW2HGSw_acO0ufwnrHiaoYdJiaQfH9SKkIrwz-tqQhQeLUUShaJQ28c_7POSWZrYLj-6_kZpAOcYmDVhBSqzRPm5gb5GW5ugpbKdqRI5J_KfIsPQjfM7o27YWRtx4EFJC4KEqjOoxkG3eCWf2p5GjRc14-wC)**

clean_body: I’m proud to endorse Hung Cao for Virginia’s 10th District. But if we’re going to get this American hero over the finish line, I need your help.|MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | Peter, I lost two legs serving in Afghanistan when a Taliban bomb blew up beneath me. I don’t regret a minute of my service because it was always in pursuit of protecting the American Dream. Hung Cao's life story is exactly the American Dream I fought to protect. Hung’s family was set to be executed in Communist Vietnam when they came to America. He never took his freedom for granted, so he dedicated his life to service from the Naval Academy to Special Ops in the most dangerous corners of the world. America needs leaders who understand the dangers of the far Left’s socialism, and Hung knows better than most how ugly it can be. He knows that Democracy is ALWAYS worth the fight - because he’s seen how dangerous the world is without it. This weekend, Hung is facing an 11-way tooth-and-nail primary in one of the most competitive districts in America. | "JOIN THE FIGHT" | I’m proud to endorse Hung Cao for Virginia’s 10th Congressional District. But if we’re going to get this American hero over the finish line, I need your help. | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $100" | "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT" | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Congress | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Oklahoma Legislature Passes the
Nation’s Strictest Law
Hi Friend,
The Oklahoma Legislature has passed the strictest abortion law in the country.
Here are the facts, this bill will:
*
Ban
abortions
starting
at
fertilization
unless
a
public
report
is
filed
for
rape
or
incest
*
Enable
civilians
to
sue
anyone
who
gets
an
abortion
for
a
minimum
of
$10,000
*
Allows
lawsuits
against
people
across
the
country
who
have
donated
to
organizations
that
help
women
in
restrictive
states

I am disgusted that this bill has passed. It is regressive, shameful, a violation of privacy, and will set reproductive rights in our state back decades. In Oklahoma, the rate of rape among females is almost 45% higher than the U.S. average and ranks 51st - LAST in "women in poverty.
With these statistics, tell me how women aren't treated as
second-class citizens in Oklahoma!
I know there are many Oklahomans who agree with me. But, now is the time for us to take action and stand up for equality. If elected, I will fight to protect reproductive health and put safeguards in place for marginalized groups.
Will you join in the fight today by donating $10, $20, $50, or even $200 TOD AY?

Madison Horn

name: Alexandra Rojas
subject: What I said on MSNBC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Earlier this week I was on MSNBC to talk about Summer Lee’s historic win
and how Justice Democrats are responding to the massive wave of outside
spending by right-wing and corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/107598?refcode=em20220520-23466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF ]Alex Rojas and Mehdi Hassan on MSNBC

Several billionaire-backed corporate Super PACs have formed since the
creation of Justice Democrats because the political establishment would
rather spend endless amounts of money than invest in candidates that
reflect the true base of the party.

It has never been more apparent how important it is to elect progressives
who will bring their working-class backgrounds to Congress and fight for
the people — not the interests of the ultra-wealthy or special interest
donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/107598?refcode=em20220520-23466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF ]Will you make a contribution to Justice Democrats so we can continue
our fight to elect progressive working-class women of color to Congress?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/107598?refcode=em20220520-23466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF ]Contribute

Next week, Jessica Cisneros will face anti-abortion Democrat Henry
Cuellar, and in June, Kina Collins faces a tough primary against a 26-year
corporate incumbent.

But going up against the establishment and right-wing special interests
takes major resources, and we need to be able to compete against corporate
Super PACs spending millions on behalf of corporate Democrats.

When you make a contribution to Justice Democrats, you’re not only showing
that you support the next generation of working-class progressive
leadership. You’re also standing up against a network of corporate Super
PACs who have spent millions of dollars to try to defeat progressive women
of color.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/107598?refcode=em20220520-23466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF ]If you can afford it, will you rush a contribution to Justice
Democrats right now to fund our work to transform the Democratic Party
from the inside out and elect more leaders like Summer Lee, AOC, Cori
Bush, and Jamaal Bowman?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/107598?refcode=em20220520-23466&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF ]Contribute

Thank you for your dedication to taking on the entrenched political
establishment. Together we’re building a party that truly represents the
people.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director, Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220520-23466-footer&t=1025&refcode2=23466_1203867_nC3wZF&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1026&akid=23466%2E1203867%2EnC3wZF

Knoxville, TN 37932

---
| | |
# Weekly Update 5.20.2022
---
|
---
| | | |
---
**Friends: **
Georgia's Midterm Primary Elections are this Tuesday, May 24th - please don't forget to vote! As we approach this important moment, spiraling inflation and energy costs are beginning to cause to food insecurity - that's something Georgians haven't experienced in a long time. In this week's newsletter, we discuss why fertilizer prices are rising and how these increased costs will affect Georgia's farmers and consumers.
---
|
# **In this issue:**
* Recent Events
* Upcoming Events
* Important Developments
* Alan on the Issues

---
| **Recent Events:** **Wednesday, May 18th - **Alan voted in Barrow County
---
|
---
| Advance Voting in Barrow County is Fast and Efficient. Advance Voting runs from **May 2nd - May 20th**. **Primary Election Day is May 24th**
---
|
**Monday, May 16th - 7:30 PM **\- Alan spoke at the **Barrow County GOP**
---
|
---
| Alan speaking about Energy Independence
---
|
---
---
|
---
| The Barrow County GOP is an awesome group of Concerned Citizens!
---
| **Wednesday, May 18th** \- Alan at a Meet & Greet in Putnam County

| **U****pcoming Events:**
**Monday, May 23****rd****-****6:30 – 8:30 PM –** Alan will speak at the** Oconee County Republican Party**’**s****Election Eve Stump Speech****&****Hotdog Cookout**

The venue will be **The Hardigree Wildlife Sanctuary** located at **1110 Old Greensboro Rd in Watkinsville, GA.** We will meet under the rustic pavilion overlooking a serene pond at **6:30pm** to enjoy fellowship, food, and politics.

---
|
---
| **VOTE FOR ALAN MAY 24th in the Republican Primary! Early Voting began May 2nd and ends today - May 20th.**

---
| **Important Developments:** **Why are fertilizer prices dramatically increasing and how does this impact Georgia’s agriculture, farmers, and citizens?**

Rising energy costs and the war in Ukraine have affected both supply-side and demand-side factors and are causing an explosion of fertilizer costs.

On the supply side, U.S. natural gas prices doubled between the summer of 2020 and the end of 2021, drastically raising the cost of nitrogen production.

Rising energy costs have also significantly increased the costs of phosphate and potash mining. In Vancouver, potash traded at $210 per metric ton at the beginning of 2021, and it’s now valued at $565. Urea traded at $268 per metric ton on the Chicago Board of Trade in early 2021 and is now valued at $887.50.

The war in Ukraine has left the world short of both grains a fertilizers - both of these supply restrictions could tighten food supplies. Russia and Ukraine have historically exported about 30% of the global wheat trade and 20% of global corn trade. Much of that produce is not getting to market because the Black Sea is closed.

Also on the supply side, shipping costs have increased dramatically, due to increased energy costs.

On the demand side, the price of agricultural commodities has been soaring amid fears of shortages. Corn, soybean, and wheat prices increased by 60% from the summer of 2020 through the end of 2021.

High crop prices incentivize farmers to apply more fertilizer per acre, which places additional pressure on fertilizer prices and further contributes to the fertilizer shortage. The dramatic increase in fertilizer prices feeds a vicious cycle, boosting inflation higher.

These dynamics translate to rising food costs: In 2021, corn rose 57%, live cattle prices rose 19% and wheat was up 27%. All of these commodities have continued to soar even higher in 2022.

Increased geopolitical risk and higher input costs are translating to food shortages. We’re likely to experience an erosion of food security on a level we haven’t seen in a long time - Georgians with lower incomes will likely suffer most.

As former Director of Energy Policy for the Air Force, I can tell you that much of this pain could have been avoided if we’d maintained our Energy Independence. In Congress, you can count on me lead our nation toward being a net energy exporter once again.
---
|

Rising energy costs and the war in Ukraine have affected both supply-side and demand-side factors and are causing an explosion of fertilizer costs. On the supply side, U.S. natural gas prices doubled between the summer of 2020 and the end of 2021, drastically raising the cost of nitrogen production. Rising energy costs have also significantly increased the costs of phosphate and potash mining. In Vancouver, potash traded at $210 per metric ton at the beginning of 2021, and it’s now valued at $565. Urea traded at $268 per metric ton on the Chicago Board of Trade in early 2021 and is now valued at $887.50. The war in Ukraine has left the world short of both grains a fertilizers - both of these supply restrictions could tighten food supplies. Russia and Ukraine have historically exported about 30% of the global wheat trade and 20% of global corn trade. Much of that produce is not getting to market because the Black Sea is closed. Also on the supply side, shipping costs have increased dramatically, due to increased energy costs. On the demand side, the price of agricultural commodities has been soaring amid fears of shortages. Corn, soybean, and wheat prices increased by 60% from the summer of 2020 through the end of 2021. High crop prices incentivize farmers to apply more fertilizer per acre, which places additional pressure on fertilizer prices and further contributes to the fertilizer shortage. The dramatic increase in fertilizer prices feeds a vicious cycle, boosting inflation higher. These dynamics translate to rising food costs: In 2021, corn rose 57%, live cattle prices rose 19% and wheat was up 27%. All of these commodities have continued to soar even higher in 2022. Increased geopolitical risk and higher input costs are translating to food shortages. We’re likely to experience an erosion of food security on a level we haven’t seen in a long time - Georgians with lower incomes will likely suffer most. As former Director of Energy Policy for the Air Force, I can tell you that much of this pain could have been avoided if we’d maintained our Energy Independence. Friend, it's Marco, and I need to ask a favor.
Thousands of members of this movement have chipped in to fuel our campaign ahead of our can't-miss midnight deadline – and it means the world. I know you're part of this push to flip Arizona blue and finally defeat GOP extremism, so I was sure you'd be among those supporters. **But we're still coming up short, so my team showed me your record, and I was really surprised to see this: **
**BLUE ARIZONA SUPPORTER RECORD**
MEMBER: **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
STATUS: **TOP SUPPORTER**
DONATED TODAY TO FLIP ARIZONA BLUE: ** NOT YET **
MOST IMPACTFUL GIFT: **$5**
DEADLINE: **MIDNIGHT TONIGHT**

_Our records take a few days to update, so apologies if your record is not fully up to date. Thank you for your support!_
This goal isn't just about hitting some random number. Ever since Cook Political Report rated our race a toss-up, the Arizona GOP has been stockpiling MILLIONS to spend attacking us.

Then POLITICO called ours among the most competitive open-seat races of 2022, and the stakes got even HIGHER. We need the resources to compete – and that means we can't miss a single goal.
**I know we can flip this state blue, friend – but not if we can't even hit our fundraising goals. I'm counting on you as someone who believes in Arizona's future, so please:[Will you chip in $5 or more right now, before tonight's midnight deadline, to flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45565512/346491574/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk689-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2Y0ZjFiNC04NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4RQaHXZkRBwy4GGseyFw06KD8A4O8wgvcJGU5rh0s1Q=)**

name: Nan Whaley HQ
subject: tell us your thoughts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
For too long, the only voices that have mattered in Ohio politics have been those running the show in Columbus. Your government needs to work for you regardless of where you live and what you do.

Team,
From the first time Nan ran for office, she has been driven by one thing: how to make Ohio better for all, regardless of zip code, income, or education.
It’s why over the course of this campaign, she’s already visited all 88 counties in Ohio, speaking directly with voters to find out exactly how we can do better in Columbus to ensure that all families can thrive.
**[Now, we’re up against Mike DeWine in the general election – and Nan needs to hear from you: Will you take our 3 minute survey and tell us your thoughts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45565536/346491602/1940945577?ms=nw_em_220520_1_t2&refcode=nw_em_220520_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OTIzZjZiYS04NGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K_8mv2tgyV2IXLN7ruDDzNzToMp_exfBSEOdrbd9QjA=&emci=44779399-82d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=7923f6ba-84d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=24357242)**
For too long, the only voices that have mattered in Ohio politics have been those running the show in Columbus. Your government needs to work for you regardless of where you live and what you do.

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: No greater vocation than service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/sIc7O-txAYoV4VvCOKTitRaWlslawLPfU06vN7B_BsY=/umBO2n_iIsu0lJajU-ruhj3YndjR4zahZ6wB4ZqcG5k=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220520-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

When I first ran for Congress in 2018 - _**flipping this seat blue for the first time in 50 years**_ - I spoke often of a letter my parents wrote to my sisters and me to celebrate the new year 2000.

In it, they wrote out lessons for their daughters. One of which has been a driving message throughout my life -

_**" There is no greater vocation than service to your country."**_

These words have been foundational throughout my adult life and inform so much of my work in Congress. You see, at the CIA, I served our country collecting solid intelligence. And in Congress, I do it by working for my constituents, and I've prioritized results.

As one of the most bipartisan members of Congress, I know **we deliver for our community when we work together.** With that philosophy in mind, I've helped pass the bipartisan infrastructure package which will invest in clean, renewable energy and expand broadband internet access to those who need it most.

I've also led the bipartisan charge to ban stock trading by members of Congress and their spouses - removing even the perception of possible impropriety and reinforcing the standard that representatives serve their constituents, not their portfolios.

I can't wait to see what more we can accomplish together, [_**and to continue my work I need your support. We 're facing yet another close election this fall, will you contribute to our campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/sIc7O-txAYoV4VvCOKTitRaWlslawLPfU06vN7B_BsY=/umBO2n_iIsu0lJajU-ruhj3YndjR4zahZ6wB4ZqcG5k=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220520-1-EM&amount=25)

With gratitude,
Abigail Spanberger

| I'm On Wilkow! Live at 5:40 Tonight, and on WFMD 930 AM in Frederick tomorrow morning! Plus, we hit the streets door knocking tomorrow morning too!
Hello!
A few media appearances I wanted to let you know about, as I get my candidacy on the airwaves and out to more and more Marylanders!
In just a few minutes I'll be on Wilkow! live with Andrew Wilkow on The Salem News Channel --- listen and watch at the link [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tYsMVU7T5oYI0iMYjB1GRAQmgsuhVtv_DlUIPvDMcjn7hnhC5fL2eH59oN6gsKmOfpYLYAJ7CDwqeX47kJDuehLYkWlMiitr5UeEVDInYY8YPMT82FmNKLUoxgSqAUGqjo7J5oSurfyokHrGztcXzUxZJ7djTEp9gKO7PJQSro4Dx8Ks01EuqQ==&c=hFPmzJ9bh5AsJ4-KpppXuUmYEOs7fblveXQagnJoXDmFpAr9xD7bnw==&ch=CZpuFALhcd_WXRPBJG5E3YJVwXcb0XGUuEmifOnhWlQ251oEdyk8MQ==). If you miss it, check back at the same spot to see the replay! The show is on NOW and I go live at 5:40!
Tomorrow morning I'm on the "Success Happens" with Jen Charlton show on WFMD 930 AM Free Talk in Frederick, MD. If you miss it, you can check out the interview at the link [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tYsMVU7T5oYI0iMYjB1GRAQmgsuhVtv_DlUIPvDMcjn7hnhC5fL2eH59oN6gsKmOQqpLVXEpGnVOm4Xe3OkZekqCPJ7_XHjkI2Ih84dt1M2usPnzPtp35tJKTupGrN9LpOsMXmZht2mCGRQQynmPmhiN-M4AAZ2L&c=hFPmzJ9bh5AsJ4-KpppXuUmYEOs7fblveXQagnJoXDmFpAr9xD7bnw==&ch=CZpuFALhcd_WXRPBJG5E3YJVwXcb0XGUuEmifOnhWlQ251oEdyk8MQ==) afterwards!
TOMORROW MORNING we're going door knocking in Montgomery County! We have some enthusiastic volunteers but we want and NEED more! Sign up using the big red button below, or click this [LINK ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001tYsMVU7T5oYI0iMYjB1GRAQmgsuhVtv_DlUIPvDMcjn7hnhC5fL2eH59oN6gsKmOeltjitFAZ1j_Pum-KRVc19yULxydbgOCo5gGtZ9xQ-pfwdpdGRkwq-0XRYPGfmOwf0tu4iMV8ZXAkSOPY63lLHMwFTKoLwP-92DDIUkDFlP9v8aW1-OPc8_Lg2hmGPiWq9XHjY6Wsum9mjjjur9AUMcClnYAtTtkb0WavBIhteMrTfBfuj6GOSWTxosVjXmiocl8_J3pLFRyGMZzepgSGMgAS9ZFSjbyrk4AJjBfLiZv93f6s_8aObutjllCfUyiZfu0yvktftOuQhKFRi_h3o7oIL3Vs1kfXjiw2sJfMRc=&c=hFPmzJ9bh5AsJ4-KpppXuUmYEOs7fblveXQagnJoXDmFpAr9xD7bnw==&ch=CZpuFALhcd_WXRPBJG5E3YJVwXcb0XGUuEmifOnhWlQ251oEdyk8MQ==)and we'll send you details!

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Convention is finally here!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Join us for Convention Today and This Weekend!

## **RPW Convention is Finally Here!**
We are very excited to host all of you for the upcoming Republican Party of Wisconsin convention this weekend. This convention is shaping up to be the largest attendance in recent history! Please take a look at the convention events for this weekend! Online registration has officially closed, but you are still able to register in person at our credentials booth! (Just make sure to bring your photo ID!). We look forward to seeing you this weekend!
* * *
## CONVENTION SCHEDULE
### **
Friday, May 20th**
**2:30PM – 4:00PM: Training Sessions** **2:30p - 3:00p -- Best Practices for Local Races & Digital Efforts
3:00p - 3:30p -- Election Integrity Updates
3:30p - 4:00p -- Preparing for November ** 4:00PM – 8:00PM: Registration 6:00PM – 8:00PM: WFRW Faith, Family & Freedom Dinner Buffet 8:00PM – 11:00PM: Hospitality Suites

### **Saturday, May 21st**
7:00AM – 3:00PM: Registration 7:45AM – 8:15AM: Getting to Know Your Party Leaders 8:30AM – 11:30AM: Morning Convention Session 11:30AM – 12:45PM: Luncheon Honoring County Parties 1:00PM – 8:00PM: Afternoon Convention Session **_(Time may extend into Sunday)_** 8:00PM – 11:00PM: Hospitality Suites

### **Sunday, May 22nd**
8:30AM – 10:30AM: Prayer Breakfast The road to Republican majorities in the U.S. House and the U.S. Senate runs through Wisconsin – and this year, the fate of our state and country is on the line. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat Governor Tony Evers, send a Republican from the third congressional district to Washington, and elect conservatives at every level to help get Wisconsin and America back on track. We look forward to seeing you at convention! -Team WisGOP
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6myz1ydj26pS20sqllUBZd4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=finally_here_x_3&n=1) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tr24D9XbJYDft_QizpripYs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=finally_here_x_3&n=2) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y0VJVp2OCKNw8zDVmWeSo7yP6jlGmDIaYIm5b1oT1T4S&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=finally_here_x_3&n=3) [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=finally_here_x_3&n=4)

Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin.
148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

CONVENTION SCHEDULE Friday, May 20th 2:30PM – 4:00PM: Training Sessions 2:30p - 3:00p -- Best Practices for Local Races & Digital Efforts 3:00p - 3:30p -- Election Integrity Updates 3:30p - 4:00p -- Preparing for November 4:00PM – 8:00PM: Registration 6:00PM – 8:00PM: WFRW Faith, Family & Freedom Dinner Buffet 8:00PM – 11:00PM: Hospitality Suites Saturday, May 21st 7:00AM – 3:00PM: Registration 7:45AM – 8:15AM: Getting to Know Your Party Leaders 8:30AM – 11:30AM: Morning Convention Session 11:30AM – 12:45PM: Luncheon Honoring County Parties 1:00PM – 8:00PM: Afternoon Convention Session (Time may extend into Sunday) 8:00PM – 11:00PM: Hospitality Suites Sunday, May 22nd** 8:30AM – 10:30AM: Prayer Breakfast The road to Republican majorities in the U.S. House and the U.S. Senate runs through Wisconsin – and this year, the fate of our state and country is on the line. We absolutely must re-elect Senator Ron Johnson, defeat Governor Tony Evers, send a Republican from the third congressional district to Washington, and elect conservatives at every level to help get Wisconsin and America back on track. We look forward to seeing you at convention! -Team WisGOP Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. 148 E Johnson St, Madison, WI 53703 | (608) 257 - 4765

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Where things stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JB for Governor
body:
|
---
Hi friend, it's JB. Yesterday was a big day: we marked the start of early voting in some counties!

Have you made your plan to vote yet? If you haven't, **[click here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45565974/346494339/-1612268846?state=IL&utm_campaign=20220520_jb_campaign_update&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nA79Bg6fOH1sMHqkOO44uBQcLPDD3wKz7aGyq6z6F6k=&emci=afe85d7c-87d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=50699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=13891383)** to confirm you are registered and find out when and where you can cast your ballot. | [Make a Plan to Vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45565976/346494342/-1612268846?state=il&utm_campaign=20220520_jb_campaign_update&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nA79Bg6fOH1sMHqkOO44uBQcLPDD3wKz7aGyq6z6F6k=&emci=afe85d7c-87d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=50699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=13891383)
---
Now, I'd like to share a big-picture update about our campaign.

We have just about five weeks left before the primary — five weeks to hit the pavement, knock on doors, and remind our family, friends and neighbors that Illinois has an election ahead that they can't afford to miss.

In fact, roughly at this time yesterday, Juliana and I were out canvassing in Lynwood talking with voters about what we've accomplished lately, including our new budget — which includes $1.8 billion in tax relief!

These conversations make all the difference in a race that's as high-stakes as ours. In fact, roughly at this time yesterday, Juliana and I were out canvassing in Lynwood talking with voters about what we've accomplished lately, including our new budget — which includes $1.8 billion in tax relief! name: Team Ettinger
subject: 5️⃣ things to know about Jeff!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Endorse Jeff today >>>

ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566105/346494630/-1607675525?refcode=headerlogo&amount=30&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=) | **The MN-1 Special Election Primary is on Tuesday, May 24th!

[Rush a donation before Election Day here >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566107/346494634/-1607675525?amount=30&refcode=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=)**
---
Here at Team Ettinger HQ, we obviously believe that Jeff is an incredible leader who is ready to be a voice for responsible government in Congress.

**But this campaign isn’t about what _we_ believe, folks — it’s about folks like you, choosing who can best represent _your interests_ in Washington. We’re glad to have so many of you supporting Jeff already.**

In a minute, we’re going to ask you to **[endorse Jeff’s candidacy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566108/346494637/-1201943799?refcode=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=&emci=afb4bd36-c9d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5460736)** and help grow our movement. First, we’d like to share five things to know about Jeff that we hope will make you as excited to be on Team Ettinger as we are.
* * *
1. **Jeff has lived in Austin for more than 30 years.** Jeff’s wife, LeeAnn, grew up in Austin, and their four kids all went through Austin public schools. He’s deeply rooted in Southern Minnesota and the communities he’ll represent in Congress.
[_Endorse a leader who knows MN-1 inside and out >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566109/346494639/-1201943799?refcode=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=&emci=afb4bd36-c9d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5460736)

2. **As CEO at Austin-based Hormel Foods, Jeff helped create thousands of good-paying jobs that families could count on.** Hormel also expanded profit-sharing opportunities for workers, because when business is booming, everyone should benefit. In Congress, he’ll work hard to support economic growth and job creation in Minnesota and beyond.
[_Endorse a pro-worker and pro-business job-growth expert >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566110/346494640/-1201943799?refcode=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=&emci=afb4bd36-c9d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5460736)

3. **Jeff gives back to his community however he can.** After retiring as Hormel CEO, Jeff serves as Co-Chair of Governor Walz’s economic expansion council and leads the Hormel Foundation, a nonprofit that funds charitable causes in the Austin area.
[_Endorse a true public servant >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566112/346494642/-1201943799?refcode=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=&emci=afb4bd36-c9d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5460736)

4. **Jeff believes that a quality education is absolutely essential for folks to thrive in our 21st century economy.** Jeff volunteers to teach business at the University of Minnesota. Jeff and LeAnn also privately support Austin public high school graduates with four-year scholarships; many of these students are the first in their family to attend college. He’ll advocate for improvements to public education in Congress, because every American deserves the opportunity to access the educational resources they need to thrive.
[_Endorse a public-education champion >>>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566114/346494645/-1201943799?refcode=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ms=ea.5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YTY5OWQzMy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TXrmmzQKFMR2f_kpG3BOOahAIVJyepVcRwm48foC61k=&emci=afb4bd36-c9d7-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=5a699d33-88d8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=5460736)

5. **Jeff is firmly committed to protecting our democracy.** The attack on the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, 2021, inspired Jeff to run for office for the first time. When he saw the first district’s elected representative vote to overturn the presidential election even after the riots, Jeff knew that he couldn’t sit on the sidelines. The people of this district deserve a leader who will abide by his oath to defend our democracy — and who will always respect the results of free and fair elections.
