clean_body: Endorse Jeff today >>> ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS | = | The MN-1 Special Election Primary is on Tuesday, May 24th! = Here at Team Ettinger HQ, we obviously believe that Jeff is an incredible leader who is ready to be a voice for responsible government in Congress. But this campaign isn’t about what we believe, folks — it’s about folks like you, choosing who can best represent your interests in Washington. We’re glad to have so many of you supporting Jeff already. In a minute, we’re going to ask you to and help grow our movement. First, we’d like to share five things to know about Jeff that we hope will make you as excited to be on Team Ettinger as we are. 1. Jeff has lived in Austin for more than 30 years. Jeff’s wife, LeeAnn, grew up in Austin, and their four kids all went through Austin public schools. He’s deeply rooted in Southern Minnesota and the communities he’ll represent in Congress. 2. As CEO at Austin-based Hormel Foods, Jeff helped create thousands of good-paying jobs that families could count on. Hormel also expanded profit-sharing opportunities for workers, because when business is booming, everyone should benefit. In Congress, he’ll work hard to support economic growth and job creation in Minnesota and beyond. 3. Jeff gives back to his community however he can. After retiring as Hormel CEO, Jeff serves as Co-Chair of Governor Walz’s economic expansion council and leads the Hormel Foundation, a nonprofit that funds charitable causes in the Austin area. 4. Jeff believes that a quality education is absolutely essential for folks to thrive in our 21st century economy. Jeff volunteers to teach business at the University of Minnesota. Jeff and LeAnn also privately support Austin public high school graduates with four-year scholarships; many of these students are the first in their family to attend college. He’ll advocate for improvements to public education in Congress, because every American deserves the opportunity to access the educational resources they need to thrive. 5. Jeff is firmly committed to protecting our democracy. The attack on the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, 2021, inspired Jeff to run for office for the first time. When he saw the first district’s elected representative vote to overturn the presidential election even after the riots, Jeff knew that he couldn’t sit on the sidelines. The people of this district deserve a leader who will abide by his oath to defend our democracy — and who will always respect the results of free and fair elections. Folks, Jeff has the experience to lead, and he’s ready to get to work serving this district. It’s important to him to build a grassroots movement of support where all of us can feel included — after all, Jeff is going to represent OUR interests in Congress. ** We appreciate it! Team Ettinger **=** **=** Learn more at: Follow along: | | ** ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS ETTINGER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 741 AUSTIN, MN 55912 If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Attacked again for being a Black conservative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. |
---
Peter - It's happening again.

The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show.

FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy _**"white insult to Black people." **_

THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: _**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_

NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me _**"a token for white people." **_

Take a look at the clip:

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b23f67ed9d214d0399a0a5c74800c763&_e=X3vsfWCnyv9-L8SrxvOKUxJk0lhC9p5Rs81vV35KU1ItLa6OOlxbUXkmPHjR_P0WA6RBwplRfP2_ji6i-NAb6dQHPFSDDsOLnRoyPsdGRgkKmtXSgrqm0gd5CNOUC9VzG4iePn1cElmiZZv91UBDoqhMPpBG2qWNoMZrfAEi9Oos7AwRg61WF00QJfBtLime3nwWgb8BPQfSM7RWQ2uFsjO_dYOqLH9TZfskGetEawr3X8aK4morOVFMCxe7W8mSrK3ba-KtJP_VqBHHSbEdvpw5AqWaVYe_ZV4VADGW4MasZ1TWRv3GlO_jG7lPzGyuo3NpO-j1zCWW_rMchDBMAn68_xhNBYaHRF1nChenmHDVMXROQuQ1xuEYFqRoopLIUhIdQl6iMJf4qPMT8Gw-l8l3biTn-zHRV9LQLgFtQZNF5YOKPJdk2Hn_gBvlOZZCv_GDDmCsAZrRYlQrxB2G1WaBkd5V-kEGnU-tD_Ld144kaFxAFsJdIisxoTZA27xa)
I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character, the way I communicate, and my skin color have gone too far.

I invited my critic to dinner so we could come together and find common ground, but he belittled my invitation. He doesn't understand how I can be a Black conservative.

**[Will you help me send a clear message to people who think this way?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b23f67ed9d214d0399a0a5c74800c763&_e=X3vsfWCnyv9-L8SrxvOKUxJk0lhC9p5Rs81vV35KU1ItLa6OOlxbUXkmPHjR_P0WA6RBwplRfP2_ji6i-NAb6dQHPFSDDsOLnRoyPsdGRgkKmtXSgrqm0gd5CNOUC9VzG4iePn1cElmiZZv91UBDoqhMPpBG2qWNoMZrfAEi9Oos7AwRg61WF00QJfBtLime3nwWgb8BPQfSM7RWQ2uFsjO_dYOqLH9TZfskGetEawr3X8aK4morOVFMCxe7W8mSrK3ba-KtJP_VqBHHSbEdvpw5AqWaVYe_ZV4VADGW4MZfG_BJydXgkmzPDFoq4GsBVyILJNeG55Ymo5jWitMJ_XUDW1HejH6-FwsCcpV083jl4UdU7tRLfEOmGgGDy4ZV3moWEkm_BjreiFJb1l-ThW8dbk-bD39d9eMfKAZMY5XbQd9GwrRGvLIOObD-f7JaB0oSaEt9Wt7td53EuvDIsk1CwX1WPECRTSsAk2p5v4Q2_BIB76Jn397Epsy7_uNZ)**

**I won't be quiet about this.** People who say horrible things about their fellow human beings based on the color of their skin are simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=b23f67ed9d214d0399a0a5c74800c763&_e=X3vsfWCnyv9-L8SrxvOKUxJk0lhC9p5Rs81vV35KU1ItLa6OOlxbUXkmPHjR_P0WA6RBwplRfP2_ji6i-NAb6dQHPFSDDsOLnRoyPsdGRgkKmtXSgrqm0gd5CNOUC9VzG4iePn1cElmiZZv91UBDoqhMPpBG2qWNoMZrfAEi9Oos7AwRg61WF00QJfBtLime3nwWgb8BPQfSM7RWQ2uFsjO_dYOqLH9TZfskGetEawr3X8aK4morOVFMCxe7W8mSrK3ba-KtJP_VqBHHSbEdvpw5AqWaVYe_ZV4VADGW4MaDDiS_8BM7c-ZmUQyjJXjKARlv5Par9EYj6uIfdWwKsm-SY8C1U9s_4yLBN36I8RNWcm6DkchGKtqbpVDMYY2mkOb6TR_DybfPm82_UD_xYLeDHwiR2CsGGKiGznP4N6p13GHyJdhsWH0j3gehAeJEviug4kABBK2h9qHD2BBL68QofZcjJ4LF8PtCC2QRVIzooYJ5zR6dnjbcNJHECBYu)**

Peter, please stand with me today.

Sincerely,

Friend,

Missing our fundraising goals at this point in the cycle can put all of the progress we’ve worked so hard for -- not to mention the Republican campaign ecosystem -- at risk.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: the stakes of this race have never been higher
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
With the Senate split 50-50 and access to abortion on the ballot, we absolutely cannot lose this seat.
| | |
---
When my mother, who was born in 1931, married my dad, she lacked some of the most basic rights we take for granted today. States across the country had enormous restrictions on birth control – and often required a husband’s permission. When credit cards first came out, my mother couldn't get one in her own name. And she certainly wouldn’t have been guaranteed the freedom to end an unplanned pregnancy.

But that changed. Over the course of her lifetime – and mine – women have achieved their rights as full and equal citizens in our democracy.
We have sent women astronauts into space, watched them become chief executives – of businesses and cities and states – and seen them lead. We saw women blaze trails as nominees for Vice President and President, and today, finally, we have our first woman Vice President.

This progress has made a difference — not just for women but for our communities, our businesses, and our country. **Inclusion brings out the best in everyone, and the inclusion of women has helped our country become the strongest, best democracy and economy in the world.**
But this progress is now under attack. The 50-year precedent set by Roe v. Wade is on the verge of being overturned by the Supreme Court, calling into question the degree to which a woman’s freedom and citizenship will continue to be protected.

**At stake is nothing less than a woman’s fundamental right to live as a free and equal citizen in our country.**
I am the third in a line of four women named Margaret. My grandmother, Margaret Cooke Byers, was born in 1898 and turned 21 on the day that Congress passed the 19th Amendment, allowing women to vote. My mother, Peggy Byers Wood, saw women achieve the right to control their own bodies, finances, and futures with the Roe decision. I am the third Margaret, becoming the second woman in the history of America to be elected both Governor and Senator.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566605/346496193/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1065-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhjNjFlYy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYQ6ptHNBGDmV35I5vm8JGlt99z16_x2Br53dBrAnvs=)
**The question is, what kind of future will the fourth Margaret, my daughter Meg Hassan, have?**

I'm sending you this email because if McConnell's vision for America goes forward, my daughter will have fewer rights than I did. That's unacceptable.

I need your support now more than ever. If we lose this seat, we will lose our Democratic Senate majority and any chance we have at protecting access to abortion. **[Please rush $3 or any amount you can to continue the progress we've been working on for hundreds of years.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566607/346496194/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1065-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhjNjFlYy04OGQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xYQ6ptHNBGDmV35I5vm8JGlt99z16_x2Br53dBrAnvs=)**

| | Hi team,

I just wanted to check in with you one last time before tonight.

In 2018 and 2020, I was astounded by the level of support I received from my fellow New Jerseyans and from folks across the country. It is because of incredible people like you that I flipped this seat and then won it a second time. But with a new district map, plenty of new voters to meet, and millions of GOP dollars pouring in to push me out, I am going to need your help again.

[Can you donate any amount you can spare to get across the finish line in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45566661/346496478/-1267168968?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_3MO_20220520_2_5&refcode2=fca2882c-8ad8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2EyODgyYy04YWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5oXgQE-1o3WYDJYWQgJOS5-4oJkz6x9fXKDnDoiPxTE=)

clean_body: | | | Peter, Did you see Val's message below? We are thrilled at this week's election results. We're looking forward to the opportunity to draw sharp contrasts with our Republican opponent, Alek Skarlatos. = See you on the campaign trail! Team Hoyle Forwarded Message Peter, Last night, voters across Oregon's 4th Congressional District spoke loud and clear, and it's a tremendous honor to be your Democratic nominee. We knew that we had built the kind of people-powered campaign that could win this primary and be ready to take on Alek Skarlatos in November, and I can't tell you how much all of your support means to me or how amazing it felt to see last night's results and the decisive victory that we all earned - together. And now, it's on to the real fight: a head-to-head matchup between Skarlatos and me. We've got our work cut out for us. Alek Skarlatos has already raised almost $2 million for his campaign and has been named to the NRCC's "Young Guns" list. Kevin McCarthy and the Republicans are targeting this seat as part of their attempt to take the House majority. They know they need to win OR-04 to make that happen. Let's make one thing crystal clear: Alek Skarlatos, Kevin McCarthy, and their brand of dangerous, divisive politics are not welcome in Oregon, and we're going to send them packing this November. = Thank you for all that you do, and for being a part of this team. Hi team -- I want you to know that I reviewed this community's past survey responses and was extremely impressed.

**That's why, after careful consideration and multiple conversations with our Senior Leadership Team, I'm inviting you to join the DSCC's exclusive Majority Strategy Group.**

The handful of folks in this group provide critical input to our Senior Leadership Team and are helping us finalize the Democratic Party's official strategy to defend and expand our Senate majority.

We were _only_ able to flip the Senate because of the strategic decisions you helped us make leading up to the 2020 elections. And I'm 100% confident your input will help us win again.

**[So please, click this link to accept my personal invitation right away.](https://go.dscc.org/go/5995?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220520-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220520-Christie-StrategyGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=4364%2E9716520%2EIfoUZx)**

Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,900 for the primary election and $2,900 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Fetterman for PA
subject: We need your endorsement!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Become one of John’s official endorsers.
#
Hey Derek,
**It's official: John is your Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate!**
Now that we’ve won the primary, it’s critical we build our momentum and hit the ground running towards November. The support our campaign receives leading up to the General Election will determine if we’re able to overcome the Republicans and the millions they’ll spend to keep Pennsylvania red.
**That’s why we’re putting together a list of dedicated supporters who are all-in for John.**
[**Will you add your name to our list of supporters who endorse John for U.S. Senate? Let’s show how strong Team Fetterman already is — with official endorsers from Cresco and across the country.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220520-2&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)
**[Endorse John »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220520-2&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)**
**Derek, this is the most important Senate race of 2022.** Not only did CNN name it the most flippable seat, but it was also named the most expensive Senate race in the country — _and that was even before our primary._
Having a long list of dedicated official endorsers will show the Republicans the strength of the grassroots campaign to elect John.
**[We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, Derek. Will you add your name to officially endorse John for U.S. Senate right now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220520-2&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)**
**[Endorse John »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220520-2&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)**
Together,
Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220520-5915-footer&t=1&refcode2=5915_434096_eeVGlZ&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5915%2E434096%2EeeVGlZ)

| **SEN. STEVEN ROBERTS' LEGISLATIVE HIGHLIGHTS FOR 2022** Millions of dollars secured for crucial projects in the City of St. Louis, including:
* $900,000 for St. Patrick Center Transitional Housing
* $5,000,000 for refugee resettlement efforts
* $250,000 for Riverview West Florissant Dev. Co. beautification and development efforts in North St. Louis
* $800,000 to protect St. Louis Public Schools children from harmful lead fencing
* $1,000,000 for Harris-Stowe State University

St. Louis Vacancy Initiative
* Clears titles for vacant properties, enabling reinvestment in disenfranchised areas. Helps ensure safer neighborhoods, historic preservations, and increases funding for public schools and city services.

Show-Me Heroes Expansion
* Enhances career training and apprenticeship programs for veterans and active duty military. Enables job growth and recruitment for apprenticeships and skilled trades. Allows nonprofit organizations that facilitate the participation of veterans and active duty military transitioning into civilian employment in apprenticeship programs to qualify for the grants.

Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge
* Honoring a fallen police officer at Interstate 44 crossing over Hampton Avenue.

---
|
---
| **2022 SENATE BILLS**
[**SB 714**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8550c228ca&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility

[**SB 715**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=839b6f89d4&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens

[**SB 716**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e5e1d951fd&e=a088917f89) \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions

[_**SB 965**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=17ad1017f2&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines

[_**SB 1013**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=890e7192c8&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs

[_**SB 1016**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=39645f2581&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons

[_**SB 1079**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=e476971862&e=a088917f89) \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts

[_**SB 1087**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=d1daeab764&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses

[_**SB 1116**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=808cb806d8&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance

[_**SB 1131**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5196a8fe9d&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons

[_**SB 1132**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=309e3ee4c9&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions

[_**SB 1136**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=91497741cb&e=a088917f89)\- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees

[_**SB 1137**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=702b13b71c&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges

[_**SB 1148**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=8370214f95&e=a088917f89) \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes

[_**SB 1151**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b0858c4ce8&e=a088917f89) \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures

[_**SB 1165**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b2111468fb&e=a088917f89)\- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge"

[_**SB 1190**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=5ee2650a95&e=a088917f89) \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law

[_**SB 1233**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=fe329584b8&e=a088917f89) - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers

[_**SB 1234**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=65657a73fe&e=a088917f89) - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers

[_**SCR 24**_](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=30f2694646&e=a088917f89) \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day

[**SJR 41**](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=96d16da3f8&e=a088917f89) \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens

| **HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS **
The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19).

SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing.

Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and [download applications](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=80bcf9b8a5&e=a088917f89). Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email [disastercustomerservice@sba.gov](mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov) for more information on SBA disaster assistance.
---
|
---
| **SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES** Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit [Safe Connections](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=7539ee36b7&e=a088917f89) or call _314-531-2003_.

You can also contact [ALIVE](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=848cc25aad&e=a088917f89) at _314-993-2777_.

If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call _866-211-9966_. [Beyond Housing](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=ac3cd70622&e=a088917f89):

| **RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY **
Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit:

As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy.

Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that **anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program.**

Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free.

---
|
---
| **LOW-COST INSULIN** Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. More information can be found at the [Eli Lilly and Co. Website](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=64d8e25940&e=a088917f89).

Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge Honoring a fallen police officer at Interstate 44 crossing over Hampton Avenue. | | 2022 SENATE BILLS \- Modifies provisions relating to parole eligibility \- Authorizes a property tax credit for certain senior citizens \- Creates new provisions relating to financial institutions \- Modifies the practice of dentistry to include the prescription and administration of vaccines \- Modifies the Show-Me Heroes Program to provide for grants for veteran apprenticeship training programs \- Modifies provisions relating to the offense of unlawful use of weapons \- Relating to the legal minimum standard for valuation of insurance policies and contracts \- Creates provisions relating to certificates of moral character for persons convicted of certain offenses \- Modifies provisions relating to travel insurance \- Modifies provisions relating to arrests by private persons \- Modifies provisions relating to wrongful convictions \- Authorizes a tax credit for employers providing educational assistance to employees \- Establishes provisions relating to inquiries of wage ranges \- Establishes provisions relating to alternative dispute resolution processes \- Creates provisions relating to grants to not-for-profit organizations for physical security measures \- Designates "Police Officer Tamarris Bohannon Memorial Bridge" \- Modifies provisions relating to the Municipal Land Reutilization Law - Authorizes a tax credit for contributions made to refugee resource centers - Modifies provisions relating to warrants executed by law enforcement officers \- Designates every November 7th as Victims of Communism Memorial Day \- Authorizes a freeze on property tax assessments for senior citizens | | 2022 CO-SPONSORED BILLS \- Establishes the "Truth in Medicine Act" (Schupp) | | "Signed By Governor" | "Truly Agreed Bills" | | | | | HELP FOR SMALL BUSINESS AND NON- PROFITS The U.S. Small Business Administration approved Missouri’s request for assistance through the federal agency’s disaster loan program. This move makes low-interest disaster loans available to small businesses and private non-profits severely impacted by the Coronavirus (COVID-19). SBA’s Economic Injury Disaster Loans offer up to $2 million in assistance for each affected small business or non-profit. These loans can provide vital economic support to small businesses to help overcome the temporary loss of revenue they are experiencing. Applicants will be able to apply online, receive additional disaster assistance information and . Applicants may also call SBA’s Customer Service Center at (800) 659-2955 or email mailto:disastercustomerservice@sba.gov for more information on SBA disaster assistance. | | SAFE SHELTERING RESOURCES Sheltering in place can be difficult for anyone, and some of our neighbors might not be safe due to violence at home. If you or someone you know needs help, please visit or call 314-531-2003. You can also contact at 314-993-2777. | | COMMUNITY RESOURCE LIST The has a COVID-19 Community Economic Relief Fund. If you need help paying bills, rent, or food call 866-211-9966. : : | | | | | | MEDICAL RESOURCES The Department of Health COVID-19 hotline is open from 8 a.m. - 10 p.m. Call 314-657-1499 with questions or concerns. The Missouri Department of Health and Senior Services hotline can be reached at tel:%20\(877\%20435-8411). | | | | | | RX OUTREACH EXPANDS ELIGIBILITY Below is a memo from a trusted non-profit: As a non-profit, mail-order pharmacy, Rx Outreach is uniquely positioned to help stop the spread of COVID-19 for people who are quarantined and those who may be afraid to travel outside of their homes to the clinic or pharmacy. Rx Outreach lifted its income guidelines during this crisis so that anyone, regardless of income, can participate in their program. Rx Outreach medication prices are generally 70-80% below retail and are transparent. Shipping is free. | | LOW-COST INSULIN Before COVID-19 insulin users were having a difficult time affording medication due to the tripling of the cost over the last decade. In the wake of COVID-19, it has become even more difficult for those who rely on insulin to afford the inflated cost. Eli Lilly and Company has introduced a program to purchase Basaglar insulin at significant cost savings. Please call Lilly Diabetes Solution Center at 833-808-1234 between 9 am and 9 pm, M-F to see if you qualify for these savings. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Vaccine Bills Advance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Floor Fights](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorMi-xDm9WJd5zxA1YDXjYX&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may20_final&n=1) Some of the most radical COVID bills anywhere in the country face a vote next week. These will be major fights on the Assembly and Senate Floor. Here’s where things stand with the “Vaccine Work Group” bill package:
* We’ve killed the three worst bills: the student vaccine mandate, the employer vaccine mandate, and the bill to defund police for not enforcing mask mandates.

* One bill, the dreadful measure removing parental consent, passed the Senate by a single vote. I’m confident we’ll kill it in the Assembly; in any case, a court has already deemed it unconstitutional.

* The remaining four bills – testing, vaccine registry, social media censorship, and medical censorship – now face a vote of the full Senate or Assembly. I will be speaking against both Assembly bills.

To advance to the other house, each bill must pass by next Friday, May 27. Passage in the Senate requires 21 votes and in the Assembly 41 votes. See a list of the bills and their status [here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopHp8C5NAApBvI0WlVCOedu&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may20_final&n=2). Meanwhile, Democrat legislators are tweeting “Suspend the #GasTax NOW.” These are the same people who repeatedly voted against my bill. Next week, we’re giving them a chance to make good on their tweets: another floor fight. We’re now at $6.05 a gallon while the national average is "only" $4.56. In so many ways, California is a preview of what's in store for America if we don't change course: mandates, inflation, crime, an open border, sky-high taxes, a government that never stops growing. Elon Musk just said he’s voting Republican for the first time this year. He won’t be the only one. Kevin Kiley
California Legislator _*Ballots are out and people are voting every day._[Help our campaign get across the finish line](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G172QGsW76cwQP_qMTr_tK1&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=may20_final&n=3)
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

Friend,

I hope you don’t mind me dropping into your inbox today — I’m Charlie Crist, and I’m running for governor to defeat Gov. Ron DeSantis. Put simply, **Ron DeSantis is cruel. Ron DeSantis is a bully. Ron DeSantis has got to GO!**

name: Republican Majority Coalition
subject: Can conservatives count on YOU?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter,
---
Republicans across the country are firing up their campaigns to take back the House and stop Joe Biden from running America into the water.

We’re doing everything we can to earn your vote, but we want to know if we’re on the right track.

_**Do you plan on voting Republican this November?**_

[**Let us know today if conservatives can count on your vote!**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=317878cde6514c569ab6383b7ead6882&_e=Ovryuf5h2lheI6HRPEFi0zWpipFFauC8AODpVLQ9BjOia6vSHmmLjdb-z8p3MDwodGhpvL-UolkmO3-KwdKaNHjsJAIuECTQGK-A1I-WwXf6Ll6ptLJ0BrUjjnYUC9BqnUuaFAbUFUQ4PfLD3rcOCqyG2y8QDzz648ZGdmpO_A6-Fjoq0HVQ9B9HY4G5JhllCE2IBevGFISSCgjvfd7EdxraNZEHQ4VXgE3rTMhecYM7lr_ga8Rs3zNXZA9rQAv81U1AdlUKS-XNQEiKrWaKa0-YISPh8Am8IUAfeFH23L9smOj8GSPD9tTV0tqVGoD76oRMsBvWg8NciJxg11JAhhjAACzF6e14PwmcTNcHZIDk86hFW-5nhdoXm2hVV-7aNZgz2vRHqUDSRcVG8gJ0YA%3D%3D)
---

---

name: Team Mastriano
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DOUG MASTRIANO
body:
| |
---
Hi Team Mastriano,
A great big and overwhelming THANK YOU to each of you who worked tirelessly to make MAY 17th a reality. Our win this past Tuesday demonstrates how your dedication, commitment and focus is in our favor.
Operation Five Stones proved to be successful on many fronts. Most importantly though, we held the line to be a people of integrity. We remained pure, and we never criticized, condemned, nor spoke ill of any of the candidates in the Gubernatorial race. Our fight has been to restore freedom to all Pennsyvanians, and we will continue to be persistent in making this a reality, as we work effectively to see Doug Mastriano take the seat of Governor on November 8th.
Get some rest and enjoy time with your family. Stay tuned for more information to come as we move forward towards the General Election.
Vish

Peter**-** With under 100 days until the Primary Election, day, our opponent, the FAKE news, and the DC Swamp have begun attacking us.
They HATE that President Trump, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, and Republican Chair Elise Stefanik have endorsed our campaign. They despise that the Wyoming GOP has removed Liz Cheney from the State Party. And they are furious that WE ARE WINNING! They are so angry over our America First movement that they need to attack YOU and me. Liz Cheney calls anyone who disagrees with her “crazy.” In Wyoming, we understand that when you are under attack, especially by big government bureaucrats and elitists, it’s time to fight back. clean_body: | | | | Help us spread our message! | Peter- With under 100 days until the Primary Election, day, our opponent, the FAKE news, and the DC Swamp have begun attacking us. They HATE that President Trump, Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy, and Republican Chair Elise Stefanik have endorsed our campaign. They despise that the Wyoming GOP has removed Liz Cheney from the State Party. And they are furious that WE ARE WINNING! They are so angry over our America First movement that they need to attack YOU and me. Liz Cheney calls anyone who disagrees with her “crazy.” In Wyoming, we understand that when you are under attack, especially by big government bureaucrats and elitists, it’s time to fight back. | | | | | Our opponent and the DC elites will do whatever it takes to maintain power, even if they have to attack the very backbone of this country. That is why it is so important to make sure our campaign message is spread as far and wide as possible. have been so important to our campaign, please don’t let us down when we need your most Thank you, | | Harriet Hageman Republican Candidate Wyoming’s Lone Congressional Seat | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

name: Peter Welch
subject: In Vermont, we value listening before we talk. So I’m listening:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
Tell us which issues matter to you and your community the most:

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=427%2E61531%2EyKvZbT)
Hello,
I learned early on in my time in Vermont that Vermonters listen more than they talk—that’s the Vermont way.
It’s how we run this campaign, too: by listening more than talking. Hearing what matters to you, your family, and your community is important to everything we do.
That’s why we’re asking:
[**Which issues matter most to you? Take our survey right now.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220520_s_p_issues&t=3&akid=427%2E61531%2EyKvZbT)
[TAKE THE SURVEY ](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220520_s_p_issues&t=7&t=8&akid=427%2E61531%2EyKvZbT)
---
I take the term “representative” very seriously. I have since I first was elected to the Vermont state house, during my time in the U.S. House, and I will continue to if I get the honor of serving in the United States Senate.
Listening, the Vermont way, is essential to building relationships with friends, neighbors, and even political opponents.
Folks across the state have stopped me to talk about the importance of passing a Green New Deal, lowering the cost of prescription drugs, and defending our democracy.
It’s a privilege to listen to you, and to carry your stories with me to Washington.
[**Please take our survey and let us know which issues are impacting your community the most.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/survey/em-issues-survey_copy/?source=em_20220520_s_p_issues&t=4&akid=427%2E61531%2EyKvZbT)
Thanks so much,
Peter

---
| [DONATE ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pwfv-em-22may?refcode=em_20220520_s_p_issues&refcode2=427_61531_yKvZbT&akid=427%2E61531%2EyKvZbT)
---
---

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=427%2E61531%2EyKvZbT).

name: Scott Patterson
subject: Doug Gansler for Governor
body:
Doug has spent most of his life keeping people safe and standing up for justice. Here are some of his many accomplishments: | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnrbX48rtyZKDgfG4uTIuAkVGK4UdrmFlokRA4DqEE2-oudPk0FN3lFQpui2DuUwm37lv0eWRzQbkHB2GYaQf4ZGnOlBoVQ4hLhAz3C11W3_q99nYHBUFTADZVZO5DLOvCTpP1n_IrUH1FR_LIbjZ0ChbJqm-WgFtdVeCmKI_G0Wz-fq0m-qqNs_ebBDlzEXKzMEyWkIZ71ffqh6dKVgoy0-as_dyJ9OXjbT11ykIMDlj-MFfzjZIgIeVA_v5RZ5NY/3m7/6ijPqgq9QSmzM0taWE-1OQ/h0/WTJO014R8qcm-_u-YHHtypE2AzuzqN2sl6_o_UUiDEA)
---
Friends, My name is Scott Patterson and I have been the Talbot County State's Attorney for 36 years. Before that, I prosecuted criminals in the Montgomery and Anne Arundel State's Attorney's offices. **I am proudly endorsing Doug Gansler for Governor because he will keep Maryland safe. ** Doug served as Montgomery County's Chief Law Enforcement Officer for eight years, Maryland's Chief Law Enforcement Officer for eight years and, before that, he was a federal prosecutor personally putting murderers behind bars. Doug has been on the front lines of putting bad people behind bars. Doug has spent most of his life keeping people safe and standing up for justice.**Here are some of his many accomplishments:**
* Argued in front of the United States Supreme Court and won 9-0 to keep a sexual predator behind bars
* Led the Joint Sniper Task Force Legal Team and then prosecuted John Muhammad and Lee Boyd Malvo
* Prosecuted serial killer Hadden Clark for the murder of Michele Dorr before her body was even found
* Prosecuted the Georgian diplomat that killed a 16-year old Maryland girl at DuPont Circle while he was driving drunk
* Prosecuted Robert Lucas who savagely murdered Monsignor Thomas Wells in his parish home
* Prosecuted Terrence Green who shot one of his police officers at point-blank range
* Prosecuted Garrett Wilson who killed two of his own babies for life insurance money

At the same time,**Doug has been on the forefront of criminal justice reform,** working for underserved communities and innovating new approaches that were ahead of his time.
* Served as Chair of the NAACP Criminal Justice Committee over thirty years ago
* Set a policy to send all police shootings to the grand jury
* First in the nation to fully implement Community Prosecution
* Established the first Drug Courts and Domestic Violence Courts in Maryland
* Created the first Gang Unit in Maryland
* Allowed jurors to ask questions of witnesses

Doug has ceaselessly advocated for pro-victim legislation in Annapolis, and tirelessly worked to diversify the prosecutors in his offices. I was honored to serve on the Maryland Family Violence Council, which Doug chaired. **Doug is a champion in Maryland for public safety, which is why I am joined in this endorsement by current and former State's Attorneys throughout Maryland including:**
* Anne Colt Leitess (Anne Arundel County)
* Kristy Hickman (Somerset County)
* Leonard C. Collins, Jr. (Charles County)
* Joel Todd (Worcester County)
* Chris Eastridge (Cecil County)
* Dario Broccolino (Howard County)
* Michelle Barnes (Dorchester County)

**[If you agree that Doug is the best choice to be Maryland's next governor, will you join us by becoming a community endorser today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnrbX48rtyZKDgfG4uTIuAkVGK4UdrmFlokRA4DqEE2-oudPk0FN3lFQpui2DuUwm37lv0eWRzQbkHB2GYaQf4ZwiNvq47PoF1FKVjswMSPRtUWQutfh5P6w95_VeQceZRQmVi19mGPX3bOGXNOk3eHHPJYt00kOum57NkU9KdrjMpsW2nu-sbXMzgyIQAR3e7z7RXTbf06neWDoFgo4fKngsGBSlVr83FZdN9xXI2cQniP5yVsQVMGqGy7_1491Bg/3m7/6ijPqgq9QSmzM0taWE-1OQ/h1/YaObw_YslYCPnl0s2vdEYHtwqxCUFj_nzIsKDK7nVRM)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME**
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnrbX48rtyZKDgfG4uTIuAkVGK4UdrmFlokRA4DqEE2-oudPk0FN3lFQpui2DuUwm37lv0eWRzQbkHB2GYaQf4ZuhTuqkdvSxUUKKiwDpeTLUEuGbUfOC13A_YVjVpf9TGuZoSo8CXEWK0E07yWirSe9vwxmzp1_Jhnb5xIhK1rQMuxj1jjoR6XbEaXVTyD5vCKdSvezym2LTKbcFQoYTu8chsu4eQCDD3Rhw-D9xpOSe_l4TfTAkqXwLfLFRB24I8/3m7/6ijPqgq9QSmzM0taWE-1OQ/h2/pAKyleU3lyt4uxJc0SeEM8MkxP2QkmcsrFCTGmxBs04)
---
Sincerely, Scott Patterson _State's Attorney, Talbot County_

body:

## Republicans Selling Out on Surplus
### Friday, May 20th 2022
Friend, Please watch my important message on how your legislators are selling out and about to spend our surplus money! [](https://www.action4liberty.com/important_message_on_your_surplus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_have_an_important_message&n=2)
## [WATCH NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/important_message_on_your_surplus?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=i_have_an_important_message&n=3)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Benda=20for=20Congress?=
subject: While they fight, Matt Benda continues to propose solutions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, If you have not done so, please take a moment to listen to my [recent interview with Lynn Ketelsen](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=8e3dfa6ea7&e=58a207e9d5) of the Linder Farm Network in which I discuss real issues we face as a Country. While my opponents and their supporters are hurling accusations and attacking each other, I believe you want your member of Congress to be open, accessible, meet with voters face-to-face and propose actual solutions to our country's challenges.

In contrast, my opponent, Jeremy Munson, has made it clear he will join the House Freedom Caucus, a small group of hardline members who have advocated uncompromising positions that will hurt our district. One example is Freedom Caucus members voting against the farm bill in 2018. In contrast, I will be a conservative who sticks to my principles, but not to the blatant detriment of the interests of the district. That’s just common-sense legislating.

The priorities of our next member of Congress should align with our own. I am the candidate with actual experience in DC working on farm bill issues, experience I have used for 25 years in our communities. I will use those lessons learned to help our families, farmers, small businesses, and communities thrive.

This election presents First District voters the opportunity to fill Jim Hagedorn’s seat with a conservative problem solver. I respectfully ask for your vote as a candidate with the experience and work ethic needed to proudly defend the views and values of southern Minnesotans. In the Linder Farm Network interview, I talk about the unique opportunity this election presents to fill Jim Hagedorn’s seat with a pragmatic problem solver. I hope you agree with me that I am the only one in this race with the experience needed to find real solutions to put our economy back on track.

Please vote on May 24th for the only candidate with the experience and demeanor needed to find real solutions for southern Minnesota.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Matt Benda
507-383-4679
[matt@bendaforcongress.com](mailto:matt@bendaforcongress.com)

Please vote on May 24th for the only candidate with the experience and demeanor needed to find real solutions for southern Minnesota. name: Herschel Walker
subject: The racist hits just keep coming
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. |
---
Peter - It's happening again.

The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show.

FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy _**"white insult to Black people." **_

THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: _**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_

NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me _**"a token for white people." **_

Take a look at the clip:

clean_body: He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. | Peter - It's happening again. The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show. FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy "white insult to Black people." THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me "a token for white people." Take a look at the clip: I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character, the way I communicate, and my skin color have gone too far. I invited my critic to dinner so we could come together and find common ground, but he belittled my invitation. He doesn't understand how I can be a Black conservative. I won't be quiet about this. People who say horrible things about their fellow human beings based on the color of their skin are simply wrong. Peter, please stand with me today. Sincerely, Herschel Walker Republican for U.S. Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Ralph Rebandt For Governor
subject: Urgent Press Release
body:
Press Release

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=press_release_1931&n=1)
---
# **PRESS RELEASE**
PRESS RELEASE Candidate Ralph Rebandt for Michigan Governor reacted to the decision by Michigan Judge Elizabeth Gleicher who unilaterally nullified the Michigan 1931 Abortion Law. Rebandt was in Washington D.C. being prepped on national defense issues when he heard the news and responded passionately saying “Elizabeth Gleicher has overstepped her position, is responsible for an egregiously evil decision putting babies in Michigan at risk, and needs to be removed from office immediately because she has failed not only her oath, but the citizens of Michigan!” Rebandt continued “The problem with this type of judicial behavior is typical of tyrannical activists. She simply took her cue from Governor Whitmer who has been working unilaterally for years. Don’t hold your breath for Gretchen Whitmer or Dana Nessel to censure Gleicher, but things will change next January under a Rebandt administration!”
### **IF YOU ARE WILLING TO FIGHT WITH US TO TAKE BACK OUR STATE, WE NEED YOUR FINANCIAL SUPPORT**

name: Team Budd
subject: Biden’s Failures - answer our survey!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate
body:
No More Excuses - Poll

|
---

Fellow Conservative,

**Since Joe Biden took office, our country has endured crisis after crisis - often manufactured by Biden and the Democrats.**

Rather than taking responsibility for their own shortcomings, our radical left friends have made sure to have a list of scapegoats handy:
* Inflation **→** Putin’s invasion
* Surging gas prices **→** Climate change
* Border crisis **→** ?????
* COVID **→** Trump supporters

Yes, these are all ridiculous, but it’s politics as usual with the Democrats!

clean_body: No More Excuses - Poll | Fellow Conservative, Since Joe Biden took office, our country has endured crisis after crisis - often manufactured by Biden and the Democrats. Rather than taking responsibility for their own shortcomings, our radical left friends have made sure to have a list of scapegoats handy: Inflation → Putin’s invasion Surging gas prices → Climate change Border crisis → ????? COVID → Trump supporters Yes, these are all ridiculous, but it’s politics as usual with the Democrats! | OFFICIAL SURVEY: What is the biggest Biden failure? | There are so many to choose from! Thanks for your input! Sincerely, Team Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. | Team, as the most extreme politician in America, it’s no surprise that Wendy Rogers is making news for something unthinkable. But her latest statement went way too far!

After Rogers said the racist shooting in Buffalo, NY was a government-staged event, we pushed for her immediate removal from the Arizona legislature. **But the AZ GOP blocked our first attempt at removing her.**

We aren’t giving up, though. We’re launching a petition to show that Arizonans want Wendy Rogers removed immediately!

**[Team, will you add your name to our petition saying Wendy Rogers should be removed for her comments about the Buffalo shooting? We need 500 people to sign our petition ASAP to show the AZ GOP we're serious!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnOwAiN1j663266nYdQNhKM0mx_yZwB2PdCaL1s-ViDY0ssw8yygafS_v5R5Ou4mSq3V5mAXkOjuW6o19zfpDvhr8uUD8jBwrtJNgMNatCoUPWNfkpPHJr30AtigIea-s4vxLDydoit-bEq93LPvOQuuE87aPvoQU57hBhtOfZuQ0GtAT4fC0ndtBuVClvUp-Jd18Gg7SxCykv0H-Dp4CwL8_fZ7LPQBbQ9ikTEgvpcMGdN4UvH28QVgeltnrlH_K3zNOB3R5dQiYr5fc5qnBgXhbdCvKeiWjnRGI3E9plJEeEMr1iLyig06BBo2U9g8D1dzxllFSfsPdpPtB4dGyV9w7v94ViiC9GpBQ6xhWNET_PVV7mDKchrXYe31Tv3-bffcVptur3PilbliSAVm7rzm7Isxfgzg2sJDOepLGCqHodt-8uIML1yfX3a1Yec9YH_2p3jQok_AuF0_SupOLGQ/3m7/B69ZFS1fQlObpR0zQ9brAg/h1/JRobiFd4Zlkdjr75pbOH2Py3P4FNoEKGQXgLFWqkYHY)** [

Rogers has already been named the most extreme politician in America, but she uses this fame to become the biggest fundraiser the AZ GOP has.

So, of course, they will protect her at all costs, because they want her fundraising prowess to hold onto the AZ legislature – no matter the expense.

That’s disgusting and immoral. We’re not going to stand for Rogers’ extremism, and we want action for her latest comments.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dennis=20with=20Team=20Haugaard?=
subject: Will you volunteer for Steve Haugaard?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haugaard for Governor
body:
Phone calls, door knocking, getting out the vote. | | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter,

First, I want to say thank you for all of your support that has gotten us this far.

**We are looking for folks to make some grassroots volunteer phone calls and do door-knocking in these last weeks before the primary.**

We have only a couple weeks left and want to keep up the momentum and turn out our voters.

If you have interest in helping Steve get elected, **_please[CLICK HERE](mailto:Haugaardteam@gmail.com?subject=I%20would%20like%20to%20Volunteer%20for%20Steve%20Haugaard) to email us back the following info_ **so that we can get you set up:

* First and Last Name
* Cell Phone Number
* Email Address
* If you want to Door Knock, Call or Both

Also we will need to know the City, District, or Precinct that you would like to doorknock or call.

Once we have this information we will send you the information to get started.

We look forward to hearing from you. **THANK YOU for supporting Team Haugaard!**
---
|
---
| Sincerely,
---
|
\- Dennis with Team Haugaard
---
|
---

body:
Last call to sign Mike’s nomination papers | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fa644c26c72a/i-am-running-for-congress-8989278?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=6874c37737&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hey there,

We’re still working to gather signatures to get Mike on the ballot. To make it as easy and quick as possible, [**we can come to you!**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=8b0ff927b5&e=356c0699dd)

If you have completed nomination forms you haven’t had time to drop or mail, or want to sign and just need the papers to be able to do so, we have time available this weekend (5/21 & 5/22 and throughout the week until 5/27).

[**Just fill out this form and our team will swing by!**](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=dd37eb6ba2&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=ce3c2e7a5e&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [Sign Up for Signature Pick Up](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=3dbe6db8e9&e=356c0699dd "Sign Up for Signature Pick Up")
---
| **You can also mail or drop off any completed nomination forms, but please do so by Monday, May 23rd** so we have enough time to receive, process, and validate each signature. Don’t forget to sign the bottom as a circulator!

name: FINISH THE WALL!
subject: And name it after President Trump!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
**Under Joe Biden, 18,000 illegal immigrants cross our border every single day.**

**This is a crisis, and Biden is doing nothing about it. **

_In fact, he’s rolling out the red carpet for illegals and spending YOUR tax dollars on it._

There is only one solution to this dire problem: **we _must_ finish President Trump’s wall. **

We want to show the world that Americans haven’t given up on the wall, so we put together a survey for YOU to show that you still stand behind President Trump.

[**Take our “BUILD THE WALL” survey today and let us know if YOU want to finish President Trump’s border wall.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=e4bf6c4139af4149b7ba64059af28a03&_e=b4ktQYjqwMT14-sARRgnM3K4sYbnC_FixEnjwSJ1fY-PbFvzBPZQiEXNMesLtgJuThRGcVtdsBtaPfW1rlvZ9TFiA1hEOsXLHzVAD2a-gnASZottMJjZ2gQj7n_7vzLwzHxCOcwqePvMLA4sZQJgRv5V7SMh99vXrbyvNxhvFWynY0v-YQYyycDlvlS1sFJpXlSRfWfysG3Y6mrnbQIBsRhjcnDnI9wetgKGKte1BOUVvjlPA1Pjw5WQ54UbGgfKpWPcb10htL04O6ehg1JdY0nG0w6WCKb2YZ0eeY24ECslrbImCu0oB_1wD4xw2rGsUS_PB0_fURT1h26Zzsln9sMDgOhrtz9e8XntYBSDWD2SFR9Bqjs8-tT2USd96-SEqOUPr_QJEsSQSNubDWyhWiCYEbtWV76_-Sugi4Ey7Y8%3D)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Why is Nancy Pelosi collaborating with an anti-choice extremist?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| Peter Willis,

In just days, **Jessica Cisneros' runoff** against **Henry Cuellar, the last anti-choice Democrat in the US House** , will set the tone for how our party responds to the assault on women’s rights.

The **far-right** is laser-focused on dismantling reproductive and privacy rights in America, and right-wing Democrats like **Joe Manchin** helped kill a vote last week to codify Roe v. Wade. Sadly, the enemies of women are in both parties, and we can beat one of the worst on Tuesday.

Our Revolution is working hard to elect pro-choice candidates like Jessica Cisneros vs. anti-choice corporate puppets like Henry Cuellar — even if **Nancy Pelosi** and the most destructive special interest groups are standing with him instead of women's reproductive freedom.

**[With the future of our rights on the ballot on Tuesday, can we count on you to rush a donation to help beat the last anti-choice "Democrat" in the House? Super PACs are flooding money into Texas to fund attack ads that lie about Jessica Cisneros, and we need to fight back!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5549?t=11&akid=2943%2E5885482%2Et0ceX2)**
_If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately._ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW »](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5470?refcode=OR_EM_FR_12MO_20220520_1_1&t=12&akid=2943%2E5885482%2Et0ceX2)

---
Jessica Cisneros isn't our only champion on the ballot on Tuesday!

In the 30th District, we have endorsed **Jasmine Crockett** , an Our Revolution member who has been serving as a strong progressive fighter in the Texas House of Representatives.

Jasmine established herself as a national leader in the fight for voting rights during last summer's walkout to block Texas Republicans' package of ominous new election restrictions. She is also a champion for criminal justice reform and the environment and is a founding member of the Texas Progressive Caucus.

**[Can we count on you to support Jessica, Jasmine, and our other endorsed candidates before Tuesday's critical primary?](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5549?t=18&akid=2943%2E5885482%2Et0ceX2)**

In solidarity,

Our Revolution

I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13.

I understand the value of a dollar.

I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift.

Friend, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but _**[it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUctOwzAQ_Jrk5sh2nj3kgITKqRwQUo_Wxtk2BjuJnA0Vf8-mLQhOSJYPo52d2Zm-7W0Pyqau1VJrWfIvS5lXGUhVdQ00oEF3yhZJIcFjpCzivHbeWRgJlvfTFC1mdgrp0O5K1DvbWX3Ka1vYuih2spO5rlSXI-AuPR7MAZx34_kZAraRTiYuhj7MYiciMayh85-mFFoKrY1OfTsQzUuSPyR6z29Bu0bMLm6M2G-ijJEL4kZnK2LBEQgZfpvcKGhAUYp-8h6iIIRtPsn3cVsT2UWSP1JcebxaKRgLYQZ3Hhm9ZaGUOT6Jl9d9pqSsq8L8aBlSqpGyaYTSlbzzA_ZuDczGwEfOd3SZVk6I0T-rviWnkXCk34q3EARHywavN5UZByW-62EmhGm9kso0tv18cd67paq5ofOmfG2D_k33C_KHozI "it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal.")**_

Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is _**frightening**_.

If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come.

clean_body: | | | | Friend, We are just days away from our mid-month deadline. "If every person reading this email chips in just $5, we will blow past our goal." | | | "CHIP IN $5" I was raised in a single parent household in North Charleston, South Carolina. My mom worked 16-hour days to keep food on the table and a roof over our heads. I got my first job, changing oil at a gas station, when I was 13. I understand the value of a dollar. I don't take asking for money lightly. I know that every donation made is a sacrifice and I am forever grateful for each and every gift. Friend, I know we have been asking a lot lately, but "it would mean so much if you could give $5 to make sure we beat our goal." | | | "CHIP IN $5" -Tim | | | Friend, the difference between flipping just ONE more seat in the Senate means more than you might think. Without taking the Senate back from the hands of the dangerous Democrat agenda, I'm worried that the American Dream is going to become nothing but a distant memory. The direction this country is going under the Democrats is frightening. If Republicans have enough support to take back the Senate, we can secure hope, prosperity, and American values for generations to come. But we can only do that with YOUR support. There is no one else** we can rely on at this point. You've been such a valued member of our team since Day 1 - can you take this one crucial step with us? | | | "DONATE" Thank you for saving America with me today, Friend. | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 This message was originally sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Sent to Republican Task Force subscribers. name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: (bump) my opponent Ted Budd
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, while our families struggle with higher costs
body:
Within minutes of claiming the GOP nomination, he attacked Cheri in his speech AND released his first attack ad against us.

We wanted to make sure you saw Cheri’s note about our opponent, Congressman Ted Budd.
Within minutes of claiming the GOP nomination, he attacked Cheri in his speech AND released his first attack ad against us.
[**Please make a donation today to help us defeat Ted Budd and flip this seat. We cannot stand by while he and the Republican super PACs drag Cheri’s name through the mud.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220520-2-ma&refcode2=921.357359.9tzGis&t=1&akid=921%2E357359%2E9tzGis)**
-- Team Beasley
* * *
#
Thank you for putting your faith in me as the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in North Carolina. It’s humbling.
The Republican primary has been called, and our opponent is Trump-endorsed Congressman, Ted Budd.
I’ll tell you more about his radical and harmful agenda in a moment, but with the general election officially underway, I need to ask for your immediate support to start strong.
[**If you can, please make a $3 donation to our campaign right now to become a Founding General Election Donor and flip this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220520-2-ma&refcode2=921.357359.9tzGis&t=2&akid=921%2E357359%2E9tzGis)
Look, there’s a reason that this was one of the first Senate races Donald Trump got involved in this cycle. Ted Budd was one of Trump’s first endorsements because he’s proven himself a loyal foot soldier.
Ted Budd pushed Trump’s Big Lie and voted to overturn the election on January 6. He wants to ban abortions — even for cases of rape, incest or where the mother’s life is at risk.
He voted against the bipartisan infrastructure plan and sided with Big Pharma by voting against legislation to lower prescription drug prices. And he believes in tax cuts for big corporations and oil companies already making record profits paid for by us, while our families struggle with higher costs.
Ted Budd is a DC insider who looks out for himself and the big corporations and special interests who fund his campaigns, not North Carolina.
He must be stopped, and right now, the latest polling shows us tied at 45%. The Senate majority could come down to a handful of votes in this race, and we’re counting on a lot of grassroots support to make sure we have the resources to win.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina’s open Senate seat today? We need as many Founding General Election Donors as possible to prove that Democrats have what it takes to win and expand the majority.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220520-2-ma&refcode2=921.357359.9tzGis&t=3&akid=921%2E357359%2E9tzGis)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Unlike my opponent, we’re not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so grassroots support is crucial to ensure we are not drowned out by special interest money.
Thank you in advance for pitching in and standing with us today.
-- Cheri Beasley

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: Urgent pre-primary deadline TONIGHT
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Hey Peter,
We are going to keep this quick. Our most important and last deadline before the June Primary is tonight at midnight and we have just hours to raise $8746.
This deadline means that we have to report how much money we have raised since April 1st.
Why does this matter a great deal? It matters because we need to show that Congresswoman Porter has the power of our grassroots movement behind her. Can you chip in today to show your support at this critical moment? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]
This race is going to be a tough one.
Katie is running in the newly drawn 47th district in California. This purple district has an equal number of Democrats, Republican and independent voters. Republicans know that this is a must win race for Democrats and millions of dollars are pouring in to take this seat back.
This is why we are counting on you tonight to help us get through the next few weeks so that we can write postcards, train volunteers, fund our operations through June and defend our majority. Would you chip in what you can now to close our fundraising gap by tonight at midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatie]

Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace

name: Eric
subject: We’re behind. OPEN NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress
body:
We need to catch up

| [](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=ee0998a80489424d88811942a1c04a8d&_e=ez84UXxi7_mK_bxpgbf2NT7pSkd7mMpg5y9gKyppbw-LcMzofzzdVWTDhhyk7XyvexgXycK8enaM9H5-RG6Pk71-QJTeSsW691wVlRcgz55oPmoxv912wKgx5gLXwkryGInq4IqjYri3CoMQLrY6i5NQ1BxMSo2DKJ1VFtEmzxuWt54Ev3ZSZy3bfkkhe8G5Lc9WGprzYFrJAZcirt7NK2U4h1Tfz0AE7elAPhKoN_Em4yHfefVrnjnwDzcI5hkOMf30hUpTWPNqwzPKtyh2drombmxxDmg-yL-7v5rcfGLPYTVaK6_P0IuxyjOq5ZFB7L9SP2OtJrY9uA8taH6todaBb_gfpF8Ah0RIbzW2RPMhh28FyCkwDpxXjsNUx4Ifl1-on9eelYAHA3vMNgWUdNJaS8GyVCq0bupPyipoD_jLHPHiiKZ3oQzyPfCUBm1LM4i5dmNAtZznv3GRWITp4GBEKPeSfNnK_Tqimiz6l6qaWMmfCisx2Ut2MhonWaOeQOieBhJ7nOxpCFs51So7xx-WMWjcXJVJXHiaQp_KOCM%3D)
---
Friends,

I know you receive countless emails daily, **BUT** this will be the most critical email you will receive today, so **_PLEASE KEEP READING._**

subject: re: Joe Manchin RUINS Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Your signature is needed >>
| _To make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/8073?t=1&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg)._
---
**DISGUSTING: Joe Manchin lone Democratic NO vote on bill to save _Roe v. Wade_** We’re SEETHING with anger.

Senator Joe Manchin teamed up with MAGA cronies to block Democrats from codifying _Roe v. Wade_ and saving abortion rights. _**This is unacceptable.**_

So we’ve drafted an open letter to Manchin to condemn him for this blatant attack on women’s rights and reproductive freedom. [**DON’T WAIT - We need 49,000 Democrats to sign on RIGHT NOW:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=7&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg) | [**DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER AND CONDEMN JOE MANCHIN** »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=8&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg)
---

[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=9&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg) **_Dear Senator Manchin,_** _I’m LIVID._ As a Democratic Senator, I trusted you to protect women from the GOP’s vicious attack on reproductive rights. **But instead, you betrayed us by refusing to codify _Roe v. Wade._** You stood by Trump’s hand-picked MAGA Justices in the Supreme Court to obliterate the right to choose, and frankly, **I’m disgusted.** [**That’s why I’m more determined than ever to elect pro-choice Democrats to save our Senate majority from traitors like you and chipping in $5 to Voter Protection Project today »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=10&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg) | [**DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=11&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg)
---

**Senator Manchin, time and time again you join forces with far-right, MAGA extremists at the expense of the American people.**

But I won’t sit back and let you destroy our constitutional rights without a fight.

**That’s why I’m signing this letter to condemn your betrayal and stand up for abortion rights!** [**And it starts right now with my $5 donation to Voter Protection Project »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=12&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg)
[**DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER!**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=13&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg)
---

With conviction,

_X. YOUR NAME HERE_

_***SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION***_

[DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/12112?t=14&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg)
---
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=2528%2E878179%2EeOwiXg).**

You don’t have to climb a mountain to experience the woes of elevation. Plenty of favorite travel spots perch on high, such as Cusco, Peru, at 11,152 feet, and Leh, India, at 11,550 feet. At altitude, there’s less oxygen in the air, which can leave you gasping for breath just trying to walk up a street. (Discover nine mountains to summit in a lifetime.) What exactly is happening to the body? “First it increases breathing, which can feel like a shortness of breath,” says Peter Hackett, director of the Institute for Altitude Medicine in Colorado. “Second the blood vessels in the brain expand, so that there’s more blood and therefore more oxygen. That gives the sensation of a headache.” Symptoms of acute mountain sickness, or AMS as it’s known, include trouble sleeping, nausea, loss of appetite, and fatigue. If you keep going higher and ignore signals from your body, you could develop HAPE, high altitude pulmonary edema, or HACE, high altitude cerebral edema, both of which are very serious. All that said, some of the best views on Earth are seen from up high. The key to your success? Go up slowly. You may know my story – I’m a 22-year Army veteran, business owner, a father of six, and a Christian. My life was changed forever in October 1993 when I was held captive behind enemy lines for 11 days in Somalia. _**As a pilot in the 160th SOAR, I flew in some of the most dangerous missions and learned that we do not leave any man or woman behind.**_

I joined Jeff on the Unbeatable podcast to talk about my military career and why I’ve decided to sign up for one more tour of duty: one to serve my country and to serve Alabama.

**As you may know, my primary election is coming up this Tuesday, May 24th.** It’s going to be a very competitive race, but I hope to have your support. Together, we can fight for America First, stop Career Politicians, and end the woke Biden agenda. Together, we can truly fight for America and all she stands for.

I’ll fight for Alabama, because they sure won’t.

Thank you and God Bless,

[](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=c44c00b1f7684e479dea3e31eae9b960&_e=otWcnGd19Y4FfeO-M4LxYfH4wERgLCPdp-jCJcYkFicKvDVcHQq3xjYimwmO3kMOI580ofNqEmS5AiA1iDXGMKkhii48FCIXGj1aoOLK2s2tCrnZQcTlSJlUiZYjohWz_WZswyTTl-Ho4dqSY2WRPsiFPdXVawdekXTvBsuhTJqV04vJ8nLHZcxrPbSfcdEo-vTPLZ6zUseicwaCGPZUwOtrZrqteaN4oO83V5xVYEYR1zicfCmehDShoInuvvQ7SwDjcgJ1KIMPnW_nkbu8VWGmIIxgfPkuXVcVGHc9IfM%3D)

Mike Durant, Black Hawk Down

P.S. Have you made a plan to vote on Tuesday yet? You can find your local polling information here: [**vote.gop**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=c44c00b1f7684e479dea3e31eae9b960&_e=otWcnGd19Y4FfeO-M4LxYYSwtnIPC3gok1qAQUlX6UlerwKZdGpdwUrIvvIes3V11a1tUWsdMh-XzWQA2Kr-jC_VqhIokTPKAMHufR076hrNIs8IVEZSuvKtfO8wvXVoUSBwxID_IEcbZzfpJpavSTLUr7EojIQl7IxtisShP9eIlMHbncHSGrKsdwajwf_UsORQ6l9nc66gdEMoooYm2R6y-IyfqKrEnV_F_uZaf8aXUbL0eWbIs9Mn7-Ct3OH-)

** PAIN AT THE PUMP IS ONLY THE BEGINNING!
------------------------------------------------------------

Household incomes are being squeezed in order to afford a tank of gas for the family car. Whether we are traveling to school, soccer fields, medical centers, grocery stores or our workplace, we NEED fuel for our cars.

** DONATE TODAY (https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c4e716bb48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_20_07_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c4e716bb48-584862049)
------------------------------------------------------------

*We are all feeling the pain at the pump.

https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c4e716bb48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_20_07_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c4e716bb48-584862049

Gov. Polis and his “progressive” legislators are claiming they are helping you by suspending a two cents per gallon “fee,” a “fee” that they wrote and signed into law last year which conveniently goes into effect after the election. The motive behind this sounds suspicious to me. Why not repeal the gas “fee” altogether, forever? This would put more money into the pockets of hard-working Coloradans permanently.

** DONATE TODAY (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c4e716bb48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_20_07_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c4e716bb48-584862049)
------------------------------------------------------------

*Families are hurting because of policies put in place by Gov. Polis.

Colorado’s energy resources can and must be used. Coloradans need to pay less at the gas pump so that families have more money for groceries, medical needs, a summer vacation and other necessities.

Frivolous “fees” need to be repealed. The state government must tighten its belt just like families are doing.

** DONATE TODAY (https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c4e716bb48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_20_07_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c4e716bb48-584862049)
------------------------------------------------------------

*We can fix this!

We are innovative and creative problem solvers. This is what makes the people of Colorado unique. When I am elected governor, we will solve this together!

Sincerely,
Greg Lopez

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c4e716bb48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_20_07_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c4e716bb48-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.
** Make A Donation (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=c4e716bb48-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_20_07_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-c4e716bb48-584862049)

name: Tim
subject: on my last nerve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3844%2E3611125%2Ejrebe- ][IMG]

I’m on my last nerve, folks.

I’m fed up with watching key legislation—bills that would help working
families—get killed by the GOP’s constant abuse of the filibuster.

FIRST: Senate Republicans used the filibuster to gut legislation that
would make voting easier and more accessible for all Americans.

THEN: In the wake of the leaked SCOTUS opinion that outlined their plan to
overturn Roe, the Senate failed to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act,
which would codify abortion rights.

NOW: Mitch McConnell needs to flip a single seat to retake the Senate
majority. If he does, he won’t just block good bills, he’ll ram through
his dangerous agenda that rolls back the clock on civil rights.

I’m livid, folks, and the only way we can stop the madness is by
expanding our Democratic Senate majority and abolishing the damn
filibuster.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13104?t=1008&amount=25&akid=3844%2E3611125%2Ejrebe- ]Will you chip in
$25 to my
campaign right now so that we can get rid of the filibuster and finally
codify Roe, expand voting rights, and save our democracy?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13104?t=1009&amount=25&akid=3844%2E3611125%2Ejrebe- ]Chip in
$25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/13104?t=1010&amount=30&akid=3844%2E3611125%2Ejrebe- ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Tim Ryan
