name: Doug White
subject: Human rights are workers' rights
body:
Los derechos humanos son derechos de los trabajadores, y los derechos de los trabajadores son derechos humanos. Estas últimas semanas
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/5aO3YKv6i/c?w=OvoALsJrXacUT1DrzD1e-eoqzJ9YIEQwlqBFsPaR8Gc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG91Z3doaXRlNGNvbmdyZXNzLnVzL3NvLzVhTzNZS3Y2aT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | Human rights are workers' rights
---
| |
---
| | Los derechos humanos son derechos de los trabajadores, y los derechos de los trabajadores son derechos humanos. Estas últimas semanas nos hemos enfrentado a la cruda realidad de que una pequeña minoría de personas quiere quitarnos nuestros derechos y llevarnos de vuelta a una época de prejuicios aceptables, supresión de votantes, racismo, control de grupos de personas y subyugación de mujeres. Afortunadamente, esto es en un momento en que estamos viendo un resurgimiento de los sindicatos. Los sindicatos han estado y seguirán estando a la vanguardia del avance de los derechos de las personas: salarios familiares, semana laboral razonable, seguridad, salario equitativo, licencia y mucho más. Ahora más que nunca debemos mirar a todas nuestras herramientas y aliados para evitar el papel de vuelta de nuestros derechos. Cuando sea elegido, llevaré la lucha al Congreso para reforzar nuestros derechos humanos básicos protegidos por la constitución para que no se vean disminuidos o pervertidos por una lógica retorcida. Los sindicatos seguirán uniendo a las personas para que se unan en una causa; esta causa son los derechos de los trabajadores. Sé fuerte y vigilante.
---
| Human rights are workers' rights, and workers' rights are human rights. These last few weeks we have faced the stark reality that a small minority of the American people want to take away our rights and take us back to a time of acceptable prejudice, voter suppression, racism, control of minority populations and subjugation of women. Fortunately this is at a time when we are seeing a resurgence of unions. Unions have and will continue to be on the forefront of advancing rights of individuals: family wages, reasonable work week, safety, equitable pay, leave and so much more. Now more than ever we must look to all our tools and allies to prevent the role back of our rights. When elected I will take the fight to congress to reinforce our basic human rights as protected under the constitution so that they are not diminished or perverted by twisted logic. Unions will continue to bring people together to unite in a cause; this cause is worker’s rights. Stay strong and stay vigilant.
---
| | Seattle Saturday May 21:Washington State Labor Council COPE Convention
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Comunidades sin Fronteras en Moses Lake. Este grupo trabaja por todo el distrito en la participación y asistencia de la comunidad.*Comunidades sin Fronteras in Moses Lake. This group works up and down the district on community involvement and assistance.
---
| |
---
| ¡Su pancarta está aquí! Your yard sign is here!
---
| [**Reserve a Sign!**](https://www.dougwhite4congress.us/so/5aO3YKv6i/c?w=I0-Q4hNDbeZea_UHmiv_pvMv0yEf8ISGDQAKKuDumgc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2RvdWd3aGl0ZXlhcmRzaWduIiwiciI6ImNkMzM1ODNmLWZjZDgtNGM2Ni1iY2MzLWFjZDRhYmIxMmEzMSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjA0OTZmZmUwLWMwYmEtNDYwNi05OTg2LWMyODAzN2U4ZDE1NSJ9)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Fue un privilegio ser invitada a participar en mítines por los derechos de las mujeres. Todas las personas merecen respeto y autonomía corporal.
---
| It was a privilege to be invited to participate in rallies for women's rights. All people deserve respect and bodily autonomy.
---
| |

|

clean_body: Los derechos humanos son derechos de los trabajadores, y los derechos de los trabajadores son derechos humanos. Estas últimas semanas | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | Human rights are workers' rights | | | | Los derechos humanos son derechos de los trabajadores, y los derechos de los trabajadores son derechos humanos. Estas últimas semanas nos hemos enfrentado a la cruda realidad de que una pequeña minoría de personas quiere quitarnos nuestros derechos y llevarnos de vuelta a una época de prejuicios aceptables, supresión de votantes, racismo, control de grupos de personas y subyugación de mujeres. Afortunadamente, esto es en un momento en que estamos viendo un resurgimiento de los sindicatos. Los sindicatos han estado y seguirán estando a la vanguardia del avance de los derechos de las personas: salarios familiares, semana laboral razonable, seguridad, salario equitativo, licencia y mucho más. Ahora más que nunca debemos mirar a todas nuestras herramientas y aliados para evitar el papel de vuelta de nuestros derechos. Cuando sea elegido, llevaré la lucha al Congreso para reforzar nuestros derechos humanos básicos protegidos por la constitución para que no se vean disminuidos o pervertidos por una lógica retorcida. Los sindicatos seguirán uniendo a las personas para que se unan en una causa; esta causa son los derechos de los trabajadores. Sé fuerte y vigilante. | Human rights are workers' rights, and workers' rights are human rights. These last few weeks we have faced the stark reality that a small minority of the American people want to take away our rights and take us back to a time of acceptable prejudice, voter suppression, racism, control of minority populations and subjugation of women. Fortunately this is at a time when we are seeing a resurgence of unions. Unions have and will continue to be on the forefront of advancing rights of individuals: family wages, reasonable work week, safety, equitable pay, leave and so much more. Now more than ever we must look to all our tools and allies to prevent the role back of our rights. When elected I will take the fight to congress to reinforce our basic human rights as protected under the constitution so that they are not diminished or perverted by twisted logic. Unions will continue to bring people together to unite in a cause; this cause is worker’s rights. Stay strong and stay vigilant. | | Seattle Saturday May 21:Washington State Labor Council COPE Convention | | | | | | | Comunidades sin Fronteras en Moses Lake. clean_body: | Friend, If the spiking crime rates weren’t enough to deter families from staying in Illinois, the ridiculously high property taxes may shove them out of our once-great state. Only families on the Forbes List can afford to pay these taxes...It’s no wonder why JB doesn’t see the issue here. | When I’m elected Governor, families won’t be crippled by their property taxes. They’ll be able to keep more of their hard-earned money in their pockets and be able to decide how they want to spend it. It’s not a crazy idea, but it's certainly one that goes above the head of someone that happens to be the heir to the Hyatt Hotel chain. Thank you for joining the fight with me. Together we CAN save Illinois, but only if we keep this momentum going. God Bless, Gary Rabine | Gary Rabine fought the Biden Administrations vaccine mandate in front of the Supreme Court and won. He is the Conservative leader Illinois needs to get back on track. | Paid for by Rabine for Governor Our mailing address is: Rabine for Governor PO Box 59183 Schaumburg, IL 60159

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Gas prices at all time highs, while Biden approval hits all time low...
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0061693d3282/gas-prices-at-all-time-highs-while-biden-approval-hits-all-time-low?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | |
---
## Gas prices hit all time highs...
For multiple days in a row, gas prices have hit all time highs. Watch this clip of Biden back in March telling us that these prices were actually coming down and would continue to do so.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5a8201af8f&e=f6564bbe3b)
Don’t hold your breath on that...
| | | | | | |
---
## 5 Political Stories to wrap up the week...
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8d77230e2f&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[Pennsylvania US Senate candidate Fetterman suffers stroke but says he’s ‘well on my way to a full recovery’](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=950b39179a&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CNN[White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki And Fox News’ Peter Doocy Lay Down Their Weapons](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=dab1770996&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Yahoo“Lay down their weapons” — this such an inappropriate headline.[Reporter Who Interrupted WH Press Briefing Threatened With Suspension in Scathing Email ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=d8377fe197&e=f6564bbe3b)— via MediaiteHey WHCA, is this a new policy? For 4 years you guys never seemed to care about reporters yelling and interrupting during press briefings. [‘Privileged’ Clinton lawyer lied to fed in ‘plan’ to smear Trump: prosecutor ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=f048d94f4e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via NY Post[Canceled: Senate Dems Nix Jankowicz Hearing After Embarrassing Jankowicz Videos Surface ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0e1f5e9ba8&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Free Beacon[Abortion is not the way to help single Black mothers ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=a0d6af24da&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Senator Tim Scott in Washington Post[DHS warns of violence after Roe leak and threats to burn down SCOTUS](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3249b9296b&e=f6564bbe3b) — via Daily Mail
| | | | | | |
---
## Spicy Senate Primary Season...
On Tuesday, Pennsylvanians went to the polls to vote in the PA primary, however we still don’t have a clear winner. But this coming Tuesday, all eyes are on the Alabama senate primary. Reminder of the rules: put in your guess on who will win each primary by 11:59p ET the night before each primary (or do them all at once) and whoever has the most right by the end of primary season will win some sort of cool political swag I’ve collected (maybe hoarded).I’ll put out polls on Twitter for the races each week, but you have to have your answers in the Survey Monkey to be eligible to win.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c6da89ed3f&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6ab77aac74&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## Do you have a copy of _Radical Nation_ yet...
I wrote Radical Nation right after the election of Joe Biden as a warning of what was to come, its almost scary how many hypothetical policies I wrote about have come true. From abortion to the border its all there.|
---
[Get a copy here](newsmax.com/23)
---
| | | | | | |
---

name: Bob
subject: 1 death and 40 injuries in Northern Michigan after rare tornado
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
A rare northern Michigan tornado tore through Gaylord Friday, killing at least one person and injuring more than 40 others. Here's the latest.| | | **-_A rare northern Michigan tornado tore through Gaylord Friday, killing at least one person and injuring more than 40 others._**
---
**1 death and 40 injuries after tornado devastates Gaylord - Dr. Bob Lorinser Official Statement**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45570092/346535271/141992925?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA3MmFlMi1hZWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhWswX3F7H7zQU7DVsuH6OeiAZEbqvfGEMpRT74Vhic=&emci=457063be-add8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=35072ae2-aed8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15167427)

**_Dr. Bob Lorinser statement, 10 p.m. Fri. May 20_**
---

---
My heart is with all Gaylord residents impacted by the destruction tonight as a result of a devastating tornado. I urge the State and Federal government to provide adequate resources to heal and rebuild the community after this catastrophic loss. People are asked to avoid the area to give crews room to work and to shelter in place until morning. **Follow**[**@mspnorthernmi**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45570095/346535274/-314035749?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA3MmFlMi1hZWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhWswX3F7H7zQU7DVsuH6OeiAZEbqvfGEMpRT74Vhic=&emci=457063be-add8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&emdi=35072ae2-aed8-ec11-b656-281878b8c32f&ceid=15167427)**for important updates.** I am visiting in early June and my campaign will volunteer any additional assistance we can. Tonight, the entire 1st District offers our condolences and sympathies to everyone affected, and we extend our appreciation to the all the extraordinary first responders. Thank you.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45570096/346535275/1090971113?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTA3MmFlMi1hZWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XhWswX3F7H7zQU7DVsuH6OeiAZEbqvfGEMpRT74Vhic=)

But, when we're not on the same page as our readers, we've already sent our least favorite kind of message. I'm confident I can be an influential member of Congress for the First District and guide us on a national and worldwide stage under the ideals and principles of what it means to be a proud American. I genuinely care about every one of you, whether you are a democrat, republican, or independent. If elected, I will strive to be the voice for all district residents. My family, friends, and staff have put everything we have into turning our vision of this great state into a reality, and we will continue to work towards achieving that objective. Every day, we build and strengthen partnerships with voters and citizens alike who align with the vision we want to bring to the United States and Northern Michigan. I particularly love meeting and working with the younger generations. They are the voice of the future and are very active and enthusiastic in learning how to be involved. The United States is divided economically, politically, and culturally more than ever before. So, it's time to unite, and it's time to come together and push for government solutions that reflect the best of Northern Michigan's values and priorities. Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. For example, we collect any information you provide when you update your user account and profile ("User Account"); participate in contests, surveys, and other promotions; and sign up to receive newsletters and other communications. In addition, the Services may include features that rely on the use of information stored on, or made available through, your mobile device. We may also ask to collect or use the specific location of your mobile device (e.g., by accessing your Device's GPS). If you agree to allow access to your location, you agree that we and our service providers may collect such location-based information from your device. We may also collect other information based on your location and your device's proximity to "beacons" and other similar proximity systems, including, for example, the strength of the signal between the beacon and your device and the duration that your device is near the beacon. The type of location data we collect depends on several factors, including the type of device you are using (e.g., laptop, smartphone, tablet) and the type of connection enabled on your device (e.g., wifi, Bluetooth, broadband cable). Our Apps or other services features may rely on this location information to provide certain location-based services, such as our promotional offers, merchandise offers, event information, or other Save America-related content that may be of interest to you. We may also use location information to improve the functionality of our Apps and our other applications and services. If you do not wish to have this location information collected and used by us, you may opt out by disabling the location and Bluetooth features on your device and/or in our Apps. As a general note, you may choose not to provide certain information, but you may not be able to access certain content or take advantage of certain features of the Services. Depending on your device, we may use third-party services to provide mapping services. For example, we may use Google maps on specific devices. You can learn more about the information that Google collects through its mapping services at . D. User Submissions. You may have the ability to use the Services to communicate with other users of the Services and post comments to or otherwise interact with certain aspects of the Services that are available to the public and/or other users. Peter,
At a time when gas prices are at record highs in the United States, crippling our workers and families, Joe Biden and Deb Haaland are canceling more oil leases, right here in Alaska.

To make matters worse, Liberal Lisa Murkowski was the tie-breaking vote to advance the confirmation of Interior Secretary Deb Haaland, who brought this disastrous decision down, killing Alaskan jobs and energy.

This decision shows a reckless apathy for Americans and Alaskans. When oil isn't flowing, our dads can't provide for their families, our moms can't feed their children, and across the nation, workers can't fill up their cars to get to work. Over 1 million acres here in Alaska’s Cook Inlet have the potential to unleash American energy, but under this energy-annihilating Administration, we're out of business.

clean_body: | | | | Thanks Joe Biden and Deb Haaland | Peter, At a time when gas prices are at record highs in the United States, crippling our workers and families, Joe Biden and Deb Haaland are canceling more oil leases, right here in Alaska. To make matters worse, Liberal Lisa Murkowski was the tie-breaking vote to advance the confirmation of Interior Secretary Deb Haaland, who brought this disastrous decision down, killing Alaskan jobs and energy. This decision shows a reckless apathy for Americans and Alaskans. When oil isn't flowing, our dads can't provide for their families, our moms can't feed their children, and across the nation, workers can't fill up their cars to get to work. Over 1 million acres here in Alaska’s Cook Inlet have the potential to unleash American energy, but under this energy-annihilating Administration, we're out of business. When I am elected, I will fight to unleash Alaskan and American energy and bring down costs at the pump. We will use our God-given resources to create jobs and make America Energy Independent Again. | | | | | Thank you, | | Kelly Tshibaka | STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | =

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: The four words that scare Democrats the most.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia
body:
| | | Peter, Black. Christian. Conservative. Veteran. Put together, they’re the words that scare Democrats the most - and they’re the words that describe me the best. _As a West Point graduate and U.S. Intelligence officer in Ukraine, I learned the ins and outs of taking on our enemies and winning tough fights._ _As a pastor’s son in Georgia, I learned the importance of faith, family, and community._

clean_body: | | | | We just received word that a Louisiana U.S. District Court has issued an injunction... Dear Peter, We just received word that a Louisiana U.S. District Court has issued an injunction in our case blocking Biden from shutting down Title 42. Title 42 allows the US Border Patrol and US Customs and Border Protection to send illegal immigrants back across the border within hours of being detained. Over 1 million people were expelled using this policy in fiscal year 2021. I stepped up with my colleagues to SUE Biden and block his attempt to kill Title 42 because we need to put an end to our BORDER DISORDER. Will you stand with me celebrating today’s victory and help my colleagues and I get ready for the next fights? | | | | | Thank you. Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General | Follow us on Social Media ****|****|****|****|** Paid for by TEAM MORRISEY, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit of Morrisey for Attorney General, Morrisey for West Virginia, Inc., Blue and Gold Fund, and West Virginia Republican Party, Inc. c/o Red Curve Solutions 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor Beverly, MA 01915. Copyright (C) 2021 Team Morrisey. All rights reserved. Mailing Address** Team Morrisey P.O. Box 11903 Charleston, WV 25339-1903 \-

name: Rebecca Parson
subject: Phew!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca for Washington
body:
| | | Hi there, Phew! The past week has been busy. I went to a reproductive rights rally in North Kitsap, filed to be on the ballot in August, got first place on the ballot (meaning that out of six candidates, my name will appear first), had an endorsement interview with a national organization, and released our latest campaign ad. In just two days, the campaign ad has already gotten over 100,000 views on Twitter. Tomorrow I’ll release it on Facebook, and over the weekend, we’ll begin running YouTube ads featuring the video. (To view it right now, check out the pinned Tweet at the top of my Twitter profile.) [**Can you donate a couple bucks to help us run ads and show voters they have a non-corporate candidate to choose from? Thank you!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45570099/346535307/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTg3MzczNS1iMWQ4LWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiOGMzMmYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v66wjndYTqeVKnVntFHB5BUeZSQqPSJukQAeURJ8IFY=) Now that filing week is over, the candidates in my race are finalized. My opponents are a Chevron Democrat, a hard-right MAGA Republican, two other Republicans, and an independent. In August, all of us will run against each other, and the top two vote-getters will go to the general election. I am the only candidate in this race who stands for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, a federal jobs program, a $30 minimum wage, and Housing for All. If you can, chip in below to help me win, so I can fight for those policies in Congress. _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** clean_body: | | | Hi there, Phew! The past week has been busy. I went to a reproductive rights rally in North Kitsap, filed to be on the ballot in August, got first place on the ballot (meaning that out of six candidates, my name will appear first), had an endorsement interview with a national organization, and released our latest campaign ad. In just two days, the campaign ad has already gotten over 100,000 views on Twitter. Tomorrow I’ll release it on Facebook, and over the weekend, we’ll begin running YouTube ads featuring the video. (To view it right now, check out the pinned Tweet at the top of my Twitter profile.) = Now that filing week is over, the candidates in my race are finalized. My opponents are a Chevron Democrat, a hard-right MAGA Republican, two other Republicans, and an independent. In August, all of us will run against each other, and the top two vote-getters will go to the general election. I am the only candidate in this race who stands for Medicare for All, the Green New Deal, a federal jobs program, a $30 minimum wage, and Housing for All. If you can, chip in below to help me win, so I can fight for those policies in Congress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca ParsonCandidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to:Rebecca for WashingtonPO Box 111388Tacoma, WA 98411 | | | | Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States | | Paid for by Rebecca for Washington | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022
subject: Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022 - CA 25th District
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022 Committee
body:
Dear Peter Willis,

Thank you for your interest and support!
Winning the upcoming California Congressional 25th District primary election is vital as you are aware. Your involvement in the **Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022** Campaign is essential in making the difference between my getting elected so that I can represent your fundamental values and interests in a real and effective way, or losing the chance to those who would prefer to promote havoc and chaos according to their own personal agendas.
For this reason the **Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022** Campaign Committee is asking you to consider doing two things to help bring on this 2022 Victory:
THE FIRST is to please contribute whatever you might be able to toward the Campaign so that we are able to deliver the message to the Voters of the 25th District. You can do this by clicking on the Contribution Button on the Campaign website at **[www.votejonathanreissuscongress2022.org](http://www.votejonathanreissuscongress2022.org/)** to contribute via credit card, or you can mail a check to the "Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022" Campaign in any amount ($2,900 is the maximum per person allowed by law). Your show of support in an amount that will best serve you is greatly appreciated and will make the greatest difference in winning this Congressional seat for the Grand Old Party, its core values, and the causes that are so dear to you personally. Your contribution will help restore and preserve the ideals and way of life that are so essential to the well being and future of our local Communities and our great Country.
THE SECOND is to please **_personally contact_** _**people**_ , whether friends, family, neighbors, co-workers and acquaintances to tell them about the **Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022** Campaign and how much their support and contributions would mean to the cause of creating Good Government for us now, and to encourage them to at least inquire and to get involved in whatever way they can. Not every person will be favorable to Republican Party policies or this Campaign, however we only need a majority of the Votes on Election Day for a seismic Victory. This is well within reach if you can positively influence even just some of those you speak with!
Once again, I thank you personally and on behalf of the others who are working with heartfelt determination in creating a 2022 Victory. If you have any questions or would like to communicate with me or others working on the Campaign we look forward to hearing from you!
It is time for a change. **NOW IS THE TIME** to make this happen!
Very best regards,

Jonathan Reiss

Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022 Committee

PO Box 11464, Palm Desert, CA 92255

[**www.votejonathanreissuscongress2022.org**](http://www.votejonathanreissuscongress2022.org/)
jonathan@votejonathanreissuscongress2022.org

(760) 799-4370

Paid for by Vote Jonathan Reiss US Congress 2022 Committee

name: Jesse Jensen
subject: Peter, I need your input 🍼🍼🍼
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jesse Jensen for Congress
body:
Who do you hold responsible for the Baby Formula Shortage? | | |
---
Peter, I’m sure by now you’ve heard of the shortage of baby formula across the country. The very idea of a baby formula shortage in our country is _unAmerican_ and, quite frankly, _embarrassing_. **Something like this happens in 20th-century communist countries, NOT here.****** Something is deeply, deeply wrong in our nation’s capital if parents cannot simply feed their children. As a father, I can only imagine how desperate and scared families are feeling right now. There’s a lot of blaming and finger-pointing happening right now. But your opinion is the most important to me.
I want to know your thoughts, Peter. **Who do you blame for the Baby Formula Shortage?**
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Thank Goodness It's Friday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becky Edwards for U
body:
What are your weekend plans? We're getting involved. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e16bc1c36358/thank-goodness-its-friday?e=10c1db3257)
---
| | [ ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=d0ef0e90c7&e=10c1db3257)
---
|
---
| Friend,
---
| | Happy Friday!

If you're like me, **you probably have a lot of exciting things happening in your week.** Whether it's work, school, kids, or hobbies, this is a busy time of year for many of us; and **the weekend is always a breath of fresh air. **

With so many things to see and do in your week, **it can be hard to find time to engage in politics.** Here at Team Becky, we think **engaging in politics should be fun, easy, and something you could do on your weekend! **

Our #LetsDoIt campaign is showing Utahns that **political engagement can be easy!** If you're looking to get involved, **check out this weekend's actions** to help get out the vote, so you can say TGIF **while making a difference. **
---
|
---
| We only have **six weekends left until the Republican primary** **and three weekends until ballots drop into mailboxes!** Looking for more ways that you can make an impact, no matter what day of the week? **Here are four things that you can do:**
---
| | **1\. Make a plan to vote**
Those who are new voters or unaffiliated can register as Republicans online at [vote.utah.gov](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=be53bb969f&e=10c1db3257) through June 17th, or register in person at the time of voting. Ballots will begin to be mailed out on June 7th. Make a plan for how you intend to cast your ballot. If you choose mail-in ballot voting, place your ballot in a safe place and pick a date that you will fill out and mail it in.

**2\. Put out a yard sign**
Place one at your home, your business, or in an appropriate location in your community! You can request a yard sign [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=f6c8fa2abf&e=10c1db3257).

**3\. Make a donation**
We've seen wonderful support throughout the state by way of donations. The smallest amount helps. Donate [here](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=fe850e18a1&e=10c1db3257)!

**4\. Share our message with your friends and neighbors**
We have a wonderful social media presence that is fun and easy to pass around. Talk with the people in your social circles. Invite them to [join our newsletter](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=8fff4aae84&e=10c1db3257)!
---
| In other news, we had a **fantastic evening at the LoveLoud Festival** over the weekend! The inspiring words from local artists, activists, and community members **kept our spirits high all week**. I had the pleasure of speaking with **Imagine Dragons singer and LoveLoud founder Dan Reynolds,** who shared the message that **"One of the most important things you can do is vote,"** and I couldn't agree more.

**Thank you to everyone who attended and took the time to chat with me!** LoveLoud never fails to **bring our community together,** and I hope we can all **spread Dan's message** as we prepare for the primary election!
---

|

---
| I had the lovely opportunity of **speaking with fourth-graders** at Samuel Morgan Elementary about**state and local government!** They may not know words like bicameral, fiscal, or legislation, but **these future leaders sure know how to work together. **
---
|
---
| We got excited about voting with **new and future voters!** We spoke with 17 and 18-year-olds to ask them **why it was important to vote,** and let me say, **I'm excited and encouraged by the change they will bring** this election season. Hear our chat with them on [Instagram! ](https://beckyforutah.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb6d6dad27d2e4a00e5c44525&id=019e8e51e0&e=10c1db3257)

As always, **thank you for your support.** With just **39 days until the primary,** I hope the warm weather will get you **out into your community** so you can get voters **out to the voting booth.** Have a great weekend!

clean_body: What are your weekend plans? We're getting involved. | | | | | | | Friend, | | Happy Friday! If you're like me, you probably have a lot of exciting things happening in your week. Whether it's work, school, kids, or hobbies, this is a busy time of year for many of us; and the weekend is always a breath of fresh air. With so many things to see and do in your week, it can be hard to find time to engage in politics. Here at Team Becky, we think engaging in politics should be fun, easy, and something you could do on your weekend! Our #LetsDoIt campaign is showing Utahns that political engagement can be easy! If you're looking to get involved, check out this weekend's actions to help get out the vote, so you can say TGIF while making a difference. | | We only have six weekends left until the Republican primary and three weekends until ballots drop into mailboxes! Looking for more ways that you can make an impact, no matter what day of the week? Here are four things that you can do: | | 1\. Make a plan to vote Those who are new voters or unaffiliated can register as Republicans online at through June 17th, or register in person at the time of voting. Ballots will begin to be mailed out on June 7th. Make a plan for how you intend to cast your ballot. If you choose mail-in ballot voting, place your ballot in a safe place and pick a date that you will fill out and mail it in. 2\. Put out a yard sign Place one at your home, your business, or in an appropriate location in your community! You can request a yard sign . 3\. Make a donation We've seen wonderful support throughout the state by way of donations. The smallest amount helps. Donate ! 4\. Share our message with your friends and neighbors We have a wonderful social media presence that is fun and easy to pass around. Talk with the people in your social circles. Invite them to ! | In other news, we had a fantastic evening at the LoveLoud Festival over the weekend! The inspiring words from local artists, activists, and community members kept our spirits high all week. I had the pleasure of speaking with Imagine Dragons singer and LoveLoud founder Dan Reynolds, who shared the message that "One of the most important things you can do is vote," and I couldn't agree more. Thank you to everyone who attended and took the time to chat with me! body:
He doesn’t understand how I can be a Black conservative. |

Fellow American - It's happening again.

The same liberal commentator who has been attacking me and our campaign for the last month keeps getting invited to appear on new platforms to spew his racist attacks. His newest attack came on a YouTube show.

FIRST: He penned an article for The Nation calling my candidacy _**"white insult to Black people." **_

THEN: He doubled down in his attacks on me AND Senator Tim Scott for being Black conservatives: _**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." **_

NOW: He's continuing his racist attacks on a YouTube interview, calling me _**"a token for white people." **_

Take a look at the clip:

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=460bfcefe4a9417e9080bb8851fe272f&_e=rUO4D-OG7uYlO8yaQf0DN1Yoli0aCGCeM0eLZR9nz0KIgjvGl6j80MrgmFRiYmovGgB0XsUmrh1gxH0wi-g7CvP71i-S00ZC3FbZGLZzb7aNeIPFMedi0l0eu1eZR_hl1X_Kc_1hVliBkp1Rq4PYn6gINpouBd8TAioF-EiCu5-BdGTTyrH74OeRTujqi71T6bG64UW4alNxb0fVSh1BO11XVwLcotT2Vmgmcn0GttnxSsYnewn2KL320e189QKyxub13ckFLHvKcysTcyD_GhKX7EHJAxmDUmmIHSYXu9XC7m92PJJevdBHuEFEcF_AjH0QMCxXte9rM88WbtffRFO3DIaf5tm9KgZ16tqgMYg0JevWn8SHpYNrgTY3rTcgRPUDwnFryPLWluTrYbr7kbbFJG3aaLCp6JKYjeFMNj1opAb0bNGZf4mDCtuM5FcWzsOKFXMsq21hwBa4OmselbP5kS9KQLygzlJkw79uEAZULvrpcfUbKqgaQMuyiqMW)
I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character, the way I communicate, and my skin color have gone too far.

I invited my critic to dinner so we could come together and find common ground, but he belittled my invitation. He doesn't understand how I can be a Black conservative.

**[Will you help me send a clear message to people who think this way?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=460bfcefe4a9417e9080bb8851fe272f&_e=rUO4D-OG7uYlO8yaQf0DN1Yoli0aCGCeM0eLZR9nz0KIgjvGl6j80MrgmFRiYmovGgB0XsUmrh1gxH0wi-g7CvP71i-S00ZC3FbZGLZzb7aNeIPFMedi0l0eu1eZR_hl1X_Kc_1hVliBkp1Rq4PYn6gINpouBd8TAioF-EiCu5-BdGTTyrH74OeRTujqi71T6bG64UW4alNxb0fVSh1BO11XVwLcotT2Vmgmcn0GttnxSsYnewn2KL320e189QKyxub13ckFLHvKcysTcyD_GhKX7EHJAxmDUmmIHSYXu9VentdNIAGGlVMyzPzMRXEUBudPO04kpI2OruzvZolO022YIEyQISHnhTXG3-TeoIfQWRvrM22noU38schc1DDhPfa1WPa2QRWbD52BlcxiINX6L_ern58lJQycOh2bLAg32xk1_7CAQRe4bV7bEQpeJbOEbjLOpHwex5jA-221y6XeqRpr-VQeXo4eagJusZ9pnOTd5QzBfCUH5j2hJfPR)**

**I won't be quiet about this.** People who say horrible things about their fellow human beings based on the color of their skin are simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=460bfcefe4a9417e9080bb8851fe272f&_e=rUO4D-OG7uYlO8yaQf0DN1Yoli0aCGCeM0eLZR9nz0KIgjvGl6j80MrgmFRiYmovGgB0XsUmrh1gxH0wi-g7CvP71i-S00ZC3FbZGLZzb7aNeIPFMedi0l0eu1eZR_hl1X_Kc_1hVliBkp1Rq4PYn6gINpouBd8TAioF-EiCu5-BdGTTyrH74OeRTujqi71T6bG64UW4alNxb0fVSh1BO11XVwLcotT2Vmgmcn0GttnxSsYnewn2KL320e189QKyxub13ckFLHvKcysTcyD_GhKX7EHJAxmDUmmIHSYXu9XAWQydzHjv6ULEvN_34G6-nB_GFAMPo9OQRLSFUt1ES8TU-g4-ehUYQl0GRw8XN9mgm2-13TVFvTO1oEEkUA1OkBKb4MMTKvuH17gAWAq19qviboiN9YOqnSM85hB7-1iFA20RQ26zWe_qxOAOXd0gOfOVmxzWxiV2MxqydZ38jIq_NccrruF9UoNXOHHsUGoBmZCiyIWga2wWoimJfXjj)**

name: OFFICIAL POLL
subject: Topic: Biden’s Economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
Empty shelves. Formula shortages. Soaring inflation.

**America’s economy is in shambles, and Joe Biden is to blame.**

_But he’s so wrapped up in catering to the radical Left elites that he REFUSES to do anything to ease the burden on American families._

Americans aren’t stupid: we know that this is all Joe Biden’s fault.

Now, we want to show the world that our citizens will NEVER stand behind sleepy Joe.

[**Take our “Biden Economy” survey today and let us know if YOU think Joe Biden is destroying our economy.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=8426d2b7269345c3b1d3f503d487e457&_e=jPskSW5Od5EQoip4JZUge3KEAnK1aMTYWUMjVotVsto5vfAPvXJ9QznjSWq5azKgmrMEiPX-uR6ACG0Vk3xwzrKNGeX3DV2STQeVFrszBeOD31o9TRwIqKePf59eiOe7EXCRxTdaSdgipMqRSxtRHAbn4Lqjr6p285DRpTeThtC0CAdADHXgz1eI2wzYcdFtDGpaVZ6AnG7AKRRxI9yiLb5BVQHS37mTvpfrOuvhS4kIz99eQjD_r8vc8_mL78eZujnqTnf5m2fwipDShQSDLkMq_0v37BEHKmqbGa4NUwKRZMGq20yYhrM2jmU9hdB0YR5zcvqH3ZJDRL7MhenlvewnAOu9UEKk5exhLym0j1PMZiRiY63A7rMeuuLerur3zTtOPnEQ6lpG8asl-FEsWvXdHlp9WP0IoGImu_YWhkk%3D)

name: Eric Stern, John Fetterman for U.S. Senate
subject: Can I level with yinz?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here’s the reality we’re facing.
#
Hey, Derek, it’s Eric, John’s Deputy Campaign Manager. I’m so proud of this team!!!
But as the guy in charge of the finances can we talk about $ for just a second?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-3?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5919&refcode2=5919_434096_tjuGrt&akid=5919%2E434096%2EtjuGrt)
Look — in an ideal scenario, every Senate candidate would follow John’s lead, a.k.a. fund their campaigns by earning small-dollar donations + building real grassroots support with voters. It’s the right way to run a campaign.
But let me tell you right now — the Republicans do things *very* differently.
Our primary ended less than 72 hours ago, but **this is already the most expensive Senate race in the country** — thanks to self-funding Republican millionaires + their allied super PACs dumping obscene sums of cash into PA. 😱😱😱
If we’re going to compete, spread John’s message, + win, we need your help:
[**John and Gisele are really counting on you to be one of the grassroots donors from PA who steps up in the first days of this campaign, Derek. Can you chip in now to stake your claim as a Founding Donor and help defeat the Republicans?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-3?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5919&refcode2=5919_434096_tjuGrt&akid=5919%2E434096%2EtjuGrt)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-3?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5919&refcode2=5919_434096_tjuGrt&akid=5919%2E434096%2EtjuGrt)**
John said from day one of this campaign that this was gonna be a strong, honest, and inclusive movement for all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. So, we're always gonna keep it real with you!
**The reality we're facing right now is Republicans will spend *anything* to keep John from flipping PA’s Senate seat blue.**
We can't afford to come up even a few bucks short of our grassroots fundraising goals, and that means putting in the work now, before the GOP can drown us out.
**[Please contribute to become a Founding Donor to John, Derek. Your support today will help us stay on track all the way until November.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220520-3?amount=5&refcode=em20220520-5919&refcode2=5919_434096_tjuGrt&akid=5919%2E434096%2EtjuGrt)**
Thank you, Derek — let's do this!!!
Eric 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220520-5919-footer&t=1&refcode2=5919_434096_tjuGrt&akid=5919%2E434096%2EtjuGrt)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: Here’s the reality we’re facing. Hey, Derek, it’s Eric, John’s Deputy Campaign Manager. I’m so proud of this team!!! But as the guy in charge of the finances can we talk about $ for just a second? Look — in an ideal scenario, every Senate candidate would follow John’s lead, a.k.a. fund their campaigns by earning small-dollar donations + building real grassroots support with voters. It’s the right way to run a campaign. But let me tell you right now — the Republicans do things very differently. Our primary ended less than 72 hours ago, but this is already the most expensive Senate race in the country — thanks to self-funding Republican millionaires + their allied super PACs dumping obscene sums of cash into PA. 😱😱😱 If we’re going to compete, spread John’s message, + win, we need your help: John said from day one of this campaign that this was gonna be a strong, honest, and inclusive movement for all of Pennsylvania's 67 counties. So, we're always gonna keep it real with you! The reality we're facing right now is Republicans will spend anything to keep John from flipping PA’s Senate seat blue. We can't afford to come up even a few bucks short of our grassroots fundraising goals, and that means putting in the work now, before the GOP can drown us out. Thank you, Derek — let's do this!!! Eric 💙 Eric Stern Deputy Campaign Manager John Fetterman for U.S. Senate | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: 180,000 (and some change)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
Grassroots supporters like you will be the reason we defeat Abbott.
#
Today we want to share a number with you that we're really proud of: **_180,000._** That number (and some change!) represents how many grassroots donors have individually pitched in to our campaign to elect Beto.
Here's why that's important: Beto doesn't accept a cent from corporate PACs so it's donations of $5, $10, and $15 that fund our travel across Texas, make our organizing and advertising possible, and help us compete with Abbott's $50 million in the bank. _That's where you come in._
Make no mistake — grassroots supporters like you will be the reason we defeat Abbott. Because of small-dollar donations from across Texas, we've been able to go toe-to-toe with Abbott's corporate mega-donors. **But according to our records, it looks like you have yet to chip in to power this campaign.**
We understand you may not have been in a position to donate before, but we're setting a goal to bring in 20,000 donations from new donors today and we're hoping we can count on your support. A recent poll had Beto and Abbott neck and neck, and we need to capitalize on this momentum immediately.
**[Will you consider making your first donation to help elect Beto as Texas' next Governor today? Every dollar goes directly to defeating Greg Abbott once and for all.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220520-2?refcode=ema20220520-190215&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=190215_444211_-wiofE&akid=190215%2E444211%2E-wiofE)**
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220520-2?refcode=ema20220520-190215&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&refcode2=190215_444211_-wiofE&akid=190215%2E444211%2E-wiofE)**
It's clear Texas is ready to fire Abbott. **For starters, his disapproval rating just shot up to 50%!** And, the number of Texans that think this state is heading in the right direction has dropped **_14%_** since February.
Beto can beat Abbott. But with him planning to spend $100,000,000 against us before Election Day, we need every grassroots supporter who can to step up now:
**[With less than six months until Election Day, we can't slow down. If you're able, please make your first $3 donation today to finally elect a governor who will represent ALL Texans.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220520-2?refcode=ema20220520-190215&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&refcode2=190215_444211_-wiofE&akid=190215%2E444211%2E-wiofE)**
Thank you,
Beto for Texas
_*This data only reflects donations made online with this email address. If you’ve made a previous contribution via check or with a different email address, you may not see it here — but know that Beto and our entire team are deeply grateful for your support._

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-footer?refcode=em20220520-190215-footer&t=6&refcode2=190215_444211_-wiofE&akid=190215%2E444211%2E-wiofE)**
---
Email us: info@betofortexas.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Grassroots supporters like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Beto for Texas, PO Box 302647, Austin, TX 78703.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/bft-receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.betoorourke.com/sign/bft-personal-info/?t=7&akid=190215%2E444211%2E-wiofE)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=190215%2E444211%2E-wiofE)

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUJDHUzkvKcpZgEXkYauh9f7Zv3L_UFa5uxrO4p2W9Z-m8LWozRifoYnUytLB_GraLjjzwKxlJ6dGLqDjhqjdC6MsnRv9n8L3DHprfIU4I9OunsA5vkBQEkDP3lnBSfkWruB0h2HOgDsE0k-A60UKaQEcD2-vPVZHFULfWqopHMR0x-ftE38PeD5a1ecucTsW4nEo_MjuxcIPUpswMGoe0dF3ymZjVvp7Uc67ST0r8fPYxpwUjOwuVOjnBFet8tJi-DbA8yLsQ-15ws8dlhXNon4RYxNfasBFvgwmczkbF6xV0k6g_VsglnWdGjzGIJEg6fmmWKvYsWix6ddelzMU0PXMHb0ABPu5sIbfcrfU4I0AVC7-s6AWWdNk2C_eRmBi2g%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
| | **Relief...Or Thief 👀**
---
| |
---
| | Congress has already voted to spend a whopping [$6 trillion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUIIjnjb9DrG-5D_Syyw0TfIpeLAMZUUIvxMxMePMNc5ljuwRPMlL1p4MKpRvEKK8dSSq5D_sMpsadd-7D7ypYZ-PIk1BJIo9ZMEcXI0yYz5eW33Yb5q3807YRlPuWAjYGUs0RLgCXJoYzh1yfSFyzzftqVIMBnCohdad7jJwkJ8q7sY17-WS9UDU8G9phvfmoDfy4lCv3bDqO1Koq69bMyE9HfEkQMO7qAwgofYCv_6UQO50vM407uOoeYnQDsxnj5NXGXExIqdXdY75oNdfck_x6_WCND7oVnql5Lb8va8f8Ae6FW_I2VZP1OG9maWk4yY_mRnT7qrjp2zcfUvPQcWGPCNvZWS_cTDQNdRfrTua) on Covid “relief” bills. Now, the Democrats [want to spend EVEN more](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpULKMKozM-xoPXsq0zdjlnYGflbW7YnR92DPqUnD7KtvnMhBdvT5BgoOHUGsyubQxV-Dcub47T32rsU9AIh1DQBc7GxgpcqFROXKyM0T-3gg4aQZEJGYawfe15zyjEl2D8eHrx_V8WILWlaVLkeoWeJE7rOrgthTFPsX7DtELEqfZ_fLTlTmX0fx3A0uroTV_pAxP9s19PFnrmFY-bAc21ElF9naY8Taryg8U2zP-kRV3OFj1pDLb5r2LqOH9USQozZvctttMjiz58qHc8VplZfGsB4WtRQ0BObG7UUa0ohW77TViLktuV-HuvTJJCZDBU513UJ_wQzEeV9W4fT6Bp0I%3D). Are you kidding me? Let’s look at how well the government spent the money it already authorized. Spoiler alert: It’s not good. There are hardworking folks who truly needed help, but the trillion-dollar boondoggles have been [plagued](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUPHf4qPWTBmJ0A5lrWGobh1OcNcDjXxXN3zJHsiPZkJx_cQbM3-o4l4fisOdw4W_INF_7AC6v2Nk7G88LmMHEoTvbeLsnv7xuuBLfkpJH4Yy0wi4oJi8qsE334XExESRImb2Z88zqbQrdLfFsXu6L66PI_SNlwd0jVhaDxy-wtKG_NhYDwGznxKveRIZnDQT-7H505IAvAd92GVXpk6ETim9dR7Hmg3E_n3B4ndMOcU25hEgCN-9rcXZ2d-RUPnGPKp4068l6syKP7bWKw2frfgk7iJAlAmjl5AT-kQIiuRcoj74OhpWgHRb_woBPlKTjUVU521-9zkjVy3GzzSs2BTxOsT_3bOSO958p2nCmxIt-A5CwW4No2fCu58Ct8vfs0RsSJMjamaG8-1rRG7Bp9b_LV1WVoa1aoa2Zn4j8Fxe) by fraud, waste, straight-up stealing, and good old government incompetence. Just take a look at the numbers. In the “biggest fraud in a generation,” fraudsters stole nearly [$80 billion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUPBJb7VhncKEYsrCRt3OHSdfWhK22Hm1f1sherP8Jc3nVjXNhil-plIPvpPq_Vkzl3IxvshxwSTQTcTaNwmMfas2FAVLfFb_JPu_QB9oaw1E1UzfXynvFXPZ-R5SUqYigQ1sxVArlO7NNnMlaF3RIl6RbX0LmAeucZiAVI5reO4YpMyBuhu5XbJVhJwR0V9o8Nusga2ULMNARYNw72gomhQacL2T91tsMItb7JXpnxB_swMBtA2tnWW2e1n_4fXVqGdaUGYTnMJgBk-WL5hsmyD9ZhW6GH_bp6pOZd9F-j3ULl_BXRwHv40x2TlTZcm-ZreHwDWgDRwLvWJullEVLFynpFt12OLmUawdLnTIFxL7LK_2ylBIR79vAqg7mAGe5w%3D%3D) of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). International criminals, prisoners, and drug gangs [stole](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUPBJb7VhncKEYsrCRt3OHScaDhRGEkmPIHQvdZPAIR5oos0UbROBjVoU3YhgMdUKeb5qIWXsvg3mSR7yI30cxOIAsCTl0UeIAYIiX3gquxdQl4e9JWrgdgIpss7Clh_q5sCSXJUjzTZ32TpFDWLtjgysS0te8e0mXwELoqeEhC0vj3tgOHrgxag75rYFMYq0UeYU_yl8uNxNtf8PE9JU_9yp9nRC5AQ_-fFeiPjpY26JgI2g7-kna3SJQ5wLbsFG9IWWbkhtPh9MrNGpjC28hEO3tu0f_wpP-nyfSBOzwvLAgzPrpB5U-xG4AGydmK6d5Dzg4nRSGiysts3SLnxTzaOreZbXz5H5xWARCJo1NJao) between $87 billion and $400 billion from the $900 billion Covid unemployment program. And another $80 billion was [stolen](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUMy4wsb052-B7h7prrfNyl0haGrSgdLWF1oZzmhl1J221TFJStJWTeTuk8OSn-3wiCqUIi3c3sNO8WVLhcMmRXqQ-UQ0RAAJg6r9nESrsJCfxt3k3oEfzMdBBBFIQ3-2legF38cAWzkmWCEVfegMtKs016vbQWD3zclSwUfTVwxAR1iYjr1pOGAHEUVoQulH1nsBspNHdbOXQ3ofu794FiutBOV0SxNtmPtcM_Fv04x3XRnh8p5_jz10-eTuV0Jc-oIbXERPfvUD1qZPKUhaNbwK7luFidJkfKtlmjhJG906WVUybMnfv1tZBAW56_qR0sCaoD6MDKS4pIGCutsGZlU%3D) from the SBA’s Covid relief program. While Americans were struggling, fraudsters [bought](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUPBJb7VhncKEYsrCRt3OHSdfWhK22Hm1f1sherP8Jc3nVjXNhil-plIPvpPq_Vkzl3IxvshxwSTQTcTaNwmMfas2FAVLfFb_JPu_QB9oaw1E1UzfXynvFXPZ-R5SUqYigQ1sxVArlO7NNnMlaF3RIl6RbX0LmAeucZiAVI5reO4YoY2yX5SyMq_nuGj9L_o57c87gVutMVo1hFvwsncpA1t6-4IWm_bKJaFO0j5t4kn5qalgxq9-Rw_aQxbDtJcPz6-_kUj_5_qs8UeWXvjM5WnruaGMli4RaYaGpVXq3dDRnkcUfu5LCSRPDhlpM-0QW7clBZBNaIrhYr2s1AmwpTN5rIutYlhIJ6nLAdctuE7r7jbFMija63kqEybfv54t5Q%3D%3D) Lamborghinis, Ferraris and Bentleys, all on the taxpayer’s dime. ENOUGH. While most of the stolen money is not recoverable, there is some good news. Some of the Covid money has not yet been spent. Schools [still haven’t spent](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUGuD8177-MS3lWFQ76qSA_uJIa6eeXMEFadnZxTdg9V2H-QFwzcg1MvQzuXY9i_EeBPawcxbKFXmtocNo-KkWom1ZAdTMOAXDIAV9Xv08Ee3ePyN97piulxxgMBhmoIuNqqJ3lbS9jsh6U0Jw4vHGtuNo4GUYOuT4scMQT0KdU9OoLYbjmADU13rQnv4l_PJ2TuPBjBLLDU1_kqVsQD4XzJgLaYBhjFxbODgSQvQqKZH-uPDf1OqAm79uPeVA497vLoAsEqv4_oQk8wncQr8MfgLhRMM69jQ1k-hdPC3XGuv4ABWO8yq0FXG5gBX8OkF8YZfeCnCD6QnqoQowepLZ1f0isA4VVumVg8kEMky3UT1) billions of dollars and there are hundreds of billions of dollars that [haven’t gone out](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=a04c79ff2fbc4bb191a5ba07db804f8c&_e=RRbzLTDqY5r5ypXVMYzpUPBJb7VhncKEYsrCRt3OHSdfWhK22Hm1f1sherP8Jc3nVjXNhil-plIPvpPq_Vkzl3IxvshxwSTQTcTaNwmMfas2FAVLfFb_JPu_QB9oaw1E1UzfXynvFXPZ-R5SUqYigQ1sxVArlO7NNnMlaF3RIl6RbX0LmAeucZiAVI5reO4YCOKefeiGGY7i9R4ai4ZJkKGCluqfsq2Y4oj3hoYLg-JfJ5wRS-W0zCia4SkkKg_ctiB_VQgGWAXQxJfs1uCe21rI084fNI39rHet0iRQ2GnCnkRLbK4ijSsAnn8wXMDXfRGGGh7cFwR8OXEGADDQ3XWIsmqPS-_W9y3Z6pXS2Xk8-JIfrVVt2xq6QKjF7WSgfh_7UeqQCmAssm-zX9o3iQ%3D%3D) the door yet. I voted against a lot of the Covid “relief” bills because they were thousand-page monstrosities rushed through Congress with no security checks, no oversight, and no way of knowing if the recipients were truly needy. With this kind of track record, the last thing we should do is spend EVEN more money on so-called Covid relief.
**→ Read more:** Where did $6 trillion in Covid funding go? clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | Relief...Or Thief 👀 | | | | Congress has already voted to spend a whopping on Covid “relief” bills. Now, the Democrats . Are you kidding me? Let’s look at how well the government spent the money it already authorized. Spoiler alert: It’s not good. There are hardworking folks who truly needed help, but the trillion-dollar boondoggles have been by fraud, waste, straight-up stealing, and good old government incompetence. Just take a look at the numbers. In the “biggest fraud in a generation,” fraudsters stole nearly of the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). International criminals, prisoners, and drug gangs between $87 billion and $400 billion from the $900 billion Covid unemployment program. And another $80 billion was from the SBA’s Covid relief program. While Americans were struggling, fraudsters Lamborghinis, Ferraris and Bentleys, all on the taxpayer’s dime. ENOUGH. While most of the stolen money is not recoverable, there is some good news. Some of the Covid money has not yet been spent. Schools billions of dollars and there are hundreds of billions of dollars that the door yet. I voted against a lot of the Covid “relief” bills because they were thousand-page monstrosities rushed through Congress with no security checks, no oversight, and no way of knowing if the recipients were truly needy. With this kind of track record, the last thing we should do is spend EVEN more money on so-called Covid relief. → Read more: Where did $6 trillion in Covid funding go? The Democrats are causing chaos over the leaked draft opinion the Supreme Court made on Roe v Wade.

They are doing everything they can to intimidate the Justices, and their top target is Justice Samuel Alito.

Justice Samuel Alito has received death threats and around-the-clock proteMAGANEWS at his home (something never seen in the history of our country).

He needs to hear from patriotic Americans like you to help him brave this storm of venom and violence, [**so please sign your letter today.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=36f9fe3d67bf4b44a5c5fbf1f8a69640&_e=t-K0LcLE1ql305iBbcGRtqJAl30LuwcrQCjhvWiuWKIu5bpfSDKnRysyeCTi_mVFbxgCMQzjH3kmcXKcnsDiqktIKS21hy8UoVMXqZarkcSkYCFBy3dJ7uMSC2DCe47901ahUxzjgLG0hGe1IUNpyHXPp9bm6Axrhq8S6mdP8w3yRRQHKMki_a9n_EGNseUCR8-umXDocCLG3PQuubJYXxI3HOwnjWRHaGpkf8PLpLFvu88sSR2w2VvHF-uYQBPXAZLO06Ckth4Qh7-2Bc1v7FEcWaDwUN8slGXLN4byCtnFMr8V1DvYJTmm_vRdfgHSakdqZl7ElTe4PI2n4TL-OS1_kZuiJPa217Iz3u9urJp9qlS3Rb5bgLRTPlF9AQv-71952KeeZXMSO_wQ5K3qVk0l0V9Js4nAfq2Ip_NKtKNVcEdj8o4Y-N6x7zUinAnlx5AY9WltKBPNJVE-03mJz_BO-aXHA40zMr0G5m0hlVjb5IDFZ04earj5A_QaJk6YawFYB0AXqtHC8KRJ9y1X6g%3D%3D)

| May. 20 2022

_Dear Justice Samuel Alito,

Thank you for your brave stance in protecting the lives of the unborn.

The Democrats are trying to threaten and intimidate you, destroying the very foundations of the Supreme Court, but please know millions and millions of Americans like me support you and will not let the Democrats tear down yet another sacred institution of our great nation.

I hope reading this letter will give you strength when you need it. _

Signed,

| | | Derek
******Make no mistake about it - as part of the Biden-Hassan agenda, our state and country have now been forced to deal with an**** _all-out, dangerous, record-setting_**** _BORDER CRISIS._** And as a consequence, crime, drugs, and even _terror threats_ are entering our country at an increasing rate... They’ve made every town in America a border town, and we have THEM to thank for the fentanyl deaths that tragically affect New Hampshire communities and communities across the country. The immigration policies of Maggie Hassan and the Democrats only aim to please illegal immigrants - **not U.S. citizens.** I will fight this reckless Open Borders agenda when I’m in the Senate.
